name: Green Beret Pat Harrigan
subject: Ban China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from our Military Bases
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
Keep China off our military bases NOW!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=230be1f0ce2140498eb28a18cc8c6a94&_e=cceLBiZEs0zvXvE02SFXyExFer7BJrBmOPSs36lz9YgfaJRDmdTjGn-eHRmfksdVoG9P-XVObu9IwOYRRf-F-I3X3KYuxUTrajLKSkU-z0RzCmFs-zCgH9iWcUAk5DVWLzZ2hL9F5LfyqW2w6oPhYvfsDGHbnEUBWwsb7a5QhPMYvCFbiK8IPH7tDBWc6GgXsQrY1MDBZ3AXnz5HXzx-ijLpeO-GOBKx2CK_Y4MIuC62w33d3d4Hek0CVQV1zC83InGfqWd4-wFnJ_HtuMwJQCktymfvmhvOERhkKRBssbooz5IhBNILjBwRdWMk_i9IVqyWnlREzNg2e8kp0BE4wRsvbSpIw9s9aW3sHXM8zkg%3D)
---

Patriot,

I introduced the Military Installation Retail Security Act, a bill that does what should've been done a long time ago:

_**It bans companies owned or controlled by China, Russia, North Korea, or Iran from operating on U.S. military bases.**_

It's unbelievable that the Chinese Communist Party currently owns and operates over 80 stores on our most sensitive military installations, potentially collecting personal data from our troops, including elite units like our Green Berets and Navy SEALs.

**That 's a national security threat hiding in plain sight, and it ends with this bill.**

We owe it to our servicemen and women to protect them from the moment they step onto base. That means locking down their data, cutting off foreign influence, and shutting the door on adversaries who never should've been allowed on our military bases to begin with.

**[This isn't political. It's common sense. Keep China off our military bases NOW!](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=230be1f0ce2140498eb28a18cc8c6a94&_e=cceLBiZEs0zvXvE02SFXyExFer7BJrBmOPSs36lz9YgfaJRDmdTjGn-eHRmfksdVoG9P-XVObu9IwOYRRf-F-I3X3KYuxUTrajLKSkU-z0RzCmFs-zCgH9iWcUAk5DVWLzZ2hL9F5LfyqW2w6oPhYvfsDGHbnEUBWwsb7a5QhPMYvCFbiK8IPH7tDBWc6GgXX69rfyS_wyNZmpL_TaLL5vDtb861Mv7-74OALkd1BFu-ZMscQQP49Ztaq03b_0yBANfV9CKD7St7kecKKjNatLZism8dprZ4P-12Zyv0AZXWm6zEyWrBJRo2oJWdDx4VZ58FZ_Mh3iN_C7OkimuY-wcvUZZAP0ZO8jQ2jz8y3tU%3D)**

[image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Homan: Trump administration ‘did the right thing’ deporting Abrego Garcia [] Source: ABC News [] Border czar Tom Homan criticized Sen. Chris Van Hollen’s trip to El Salvador to visit deported Kilmar Abrego Garcia. "Van Hollen never went to the border the last four years under Joe Biden. What shocks me is he's remained silent on the travesty that happened on the southern border. Many people died, thousands of people died." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] January 23, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Chicago Mayor for Records on Pledge to Resist Trump’s Mass Deportation Efforts [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] November 13, 2024 Tom Fitton: Chaos on our Border [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "It's a human trafficking operation never seen before in history. It's an operation that involves the trafficking and abuse of children." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] October 01, 2024 Over Half a Million Criminal Illegal Aliens on ICE “Non-Detained Docket” Roaming Free in U.S. [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Over half a million illegal aliens with criminal histories are roaming freely in the United States, 435,719 with convictions and another 226,847 with pending charges. name: Adam Kopel
subject: Need your input: are mRNA vaccines weapons of mass destruction?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi there,

I really thought the days of Republicans shocking me were gone, but the House GOP just introduced a bill that would classify mRNA vaccines as weapons of mass destruction.

This is next-level hysteria, team, and we need to show Minnesota Republicans just how out of touch they are. We’re looking for Minnesotans from every county to take our poll by 10AM tomorrow. Will you submit the poll right now and let us know if you agree or disagree: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/guJNggbEOEe0JrLgkOry3Q2]

Are mRNA Vaccines Weapons of Mass Destruction? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/guJNggbEOEe0JrLgkOry3Q2]
HECK, NO! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/guJNggbEOEe0JrLgkOry3Q2]
YES [https://secure.ngpvan.com/guJNggbEOEe0JrLgkOry3Q2]

It’s absurd that Minnesota Republicans would be wasting taxpayer money on a political stunt like this when Trump is scheming to strip health care from millions of Minnesotans. Instead of coming up with a plan to protect your Medicare and keep lowering costs, the GOP is engaging in conspiracy theories that will only hurt us.

So, we’re looking for Minnesotans to let us know how they really feel about all this. Will you take our short poll right now? Are mRNA Vaccines Weapons of Mass Destruction? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/guJNggbEOEe0JrLgkOry3Q2]

Thanks for speaking up,

Adam Kopel
Campaign Director
Minnesota House DFL

body:
What's really going on behind the scenes in our nation's courts - and how you can stop it.

We've seen it time and time again - rogue judges issuing sweeping injunctions to block the President's lawful actions, and Democrats cheering them on every step of the way. **[Just recently, the House passed a crucial bill to limit judges' ability to place injunctions on Trump orders](https://hdeliseforcongress.nationbuilder.com/r?u=pMx7Rp5MWHa-xXJHbz9Qn-drU3C8A6kEVwECbtsstjzCRypNqYIjM1HjsQ4lyNPHzDEo3TeHgoke1GV2uHEZoHGaKHAqJsacEoEV2rozDfbaFh8SnSjRJLaD3U0pmpkELcfFkgo-JYfypYn8qBQE2Fpjv_Y3tLHXUl_JC_IGOvCqLLs4Hi3g3y41n8xDbdicZp9zaM03gNyHxsylI9SmGKHqRjy97cltu5_L2Zzd2d5OZGmSWEDk8qEwlwUiHovjJUPAhkEFxuAOYHKYma85Q6JpC6DwJAt8dOJPekdIP93PcpC2B2LJ8W8rYAQhvIwsV1LUMYUKmtDlOLoT_AQjAK0lPLGubi_JnPm4M8DLvdcC_lXHiNHZao1gG2dvHj6ybckghPB1dpuLcN1gFhB4vkEK8m6WYIN88DvYYSQjp14K9m5s6XMoWZEmGi_NciOsvDEUA0t1FaYd19pB4tVIf2Efk5o04uMt2wq_4mrZgKA&e=f045ec7ded0fef0d79f85bdcebb2e817&utm_source=hdeliseforcongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_724e4d7a938568a7b545ee1887c&n=3)** , but Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to stop it. name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: This is what representation looks like.
body:
An Evening with Congressman Clyburn

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83c0666bb766/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6419067?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# This is what representation looks like.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Thank you to Congressman Clyburn for showing up tonight in Spartanburg for “The People’s Town Hall.” While our South Carolina Republican Delegation (looking at you William Timmons) dodges in-person town halls, Congressman Jim Clyburn is doing what real leaders do: meeting voters face-to-face across the state, including in Republican strongholds. At a time when democracy is under threat, Congressman Clyburn is sounding the alarm and urging South Carolinians to break the silence and stay engaged.When someone asked “What can we do to fight this?” Clyburn replied, **"I am using what is the best of me to fight this - and I want you to use the best of you to fight this.”** Thank you Congressman Clyburn. It was an honor.
---
| [Click here to watch the Town Hall! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6fa630630b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# Introducing “The Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey”
---
| | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9cddfbc211&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| My first episode of **The Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey** , a weekly installation of **Frogmore Stew is LIVE!**
I dive deeper into what is happening at our Statehouse in a conversation with Rep Wendell Jones from Greenville. Make sure to Tune in **Every Wednesday** as I join the crew from [Frogmore Stew - SC’s pop-politics podcast](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e448c9f792&e=edbde6c9b1) \- as their weekly contributor from the Upstate.
---
| [Click here to listen! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6b12f3dedb&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=341e2aff54&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **Mahjong with The Spartanburg Dem Dames****April 24th at 6pm at SPCDP HQ** Join The Spartanburg Dem Dames for a fun Mahjong 101 class! We will go over all of the basics of gameplay, this class is open to all levels of experience.
---
| [Get tickets here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=485e1d9484&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **An evening with Dr. Amalia Luxardo, CEO of Women’s Rights and Empowerment Network****April 28 at 5:30 pm Wofford College** A reception will be held before the event at 4:30pm at the York Family Portico. This is not a ticketed event.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | **A Candid Conversation****April 29th at 6pm Wofford College** Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster.
---
| April 24 Mahjong Class with Spartanburg Dem Dames. [Get tickets here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0804718ec4&e=edbde6c9b1). April 26 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at 10:30am at the Taylors Library & SPCDP Office.April 28 WREN Advocacy Session with Amalia Luxardo, CEO of WREN.April 29 A Conversation with Bakari Sellers & Trey Gowdy at Wofford. [Learn more here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b8a48f8494&e=edbde6c9b1)May 3 Resistance Protest at 4pm at 180 Magnolia St. May 5 SPCDP Monthly Meeting at TK Gregg Community Center at 6pm. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ec6bff2511&e=edbde6c9b1)May 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. [RSVP here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=317ecc7256&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **190,000+ SC Voters: Check Your Mail!** In an ongoing effort to maintain the integrity of South Carolina’s statewide voter registration list, [**State Election Commission is sending voter confirmation postcards**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=71339167f4&e=edbde6c9b1) to 190,000+ who haven't voted since 2020 General Election and not updated their voter info. That you? When it arrives: sign it, date it, and drop it back in the mail within 90 days _(will already be stamped & addressed)_
_**REMINDER:**_**Get your Real ID or start carrying your passport** Starting May 7th, 2025, U.S. air travelers (including those flying domestically) **who** do not present a real ID-compliant license or acceptable alternative like a passport will face additional screening, delays, and may not be permitted past security checkpoint.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Just three more weeks until the end of legislative session, which boils down to NINE state house working days left to pass any new laws. Bills that don't make it out by May 8th will have to go on the back burner until January 2026. So far, **926** bills introduced, and **9** bills signed into law _(this time in last year's session 31 bills had been signed into law)._
| **State Senators voted to remove Curtis Loftis** South Carolina senators voted 33-8 Monday night to approve a resolution to remove the state treasurer from office after an eight-hour hearing. The resolution needed 31 votes to pass the resolution to oust Curtis Loftis from his position. But he’s not out of a job just yet. The South Carolina House would then have to take up the house where two-thirds of that body would also need to approve a resolution for Loftis to be removed.
**Oppose Senate Bill 32 -**[**Contact your Senator**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a7ac014468&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[ Senate Bill 32](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d481aa7c79&e=edbde6c9b1), which would provide taxpayer-funded incentives to crisis pregnancy centers, has passed its third reading in the Senate and is now headed to the House.
These centers often present themselves as medical facilities but frequently provide misleading or incomplete information about reproductive health.

**Improving care in South Carolina with Senate Bill 2** Last week, while the House was on furlough, the Senate gave final approval to [**Senate Bill 2**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9bdface162&e=edbde6c9b1) , a significant step toward improving how South Carolina delivers services for people with disabilities, mental health needs, and substance use disorders. The bill creates a new Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Disabilities by consolidating three existing agencies, aiming to streamline services and improve access.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9ef622c724&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Over two thousand people showed up for the 50501 protest at Unity Park in Greenville this past weekend. Thank you to Rep. Wendell Jones for such powerful words. We have to keep showing up!
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| Thank goodness y’all — baseball is back in Spartanburg! I had such a fun time this weekend watching the Spartanburgers for the first time with my family.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---

Congresswoman Haley Stevens – who flipped a battleground House seat from red to blue in 2018 – is running to fill Michigan’s open Senate seat to stop Trump’s chaos in Michigan and help Democrats take back the Senate majority.
But in addition to this being the most competitive Senate race on the map, Haley’s opponent, Trump-aligned Mike Rogers, spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat – _coming within just_ _20,000 votes of winning._
**With Trump and Republicans slated to spend _tens of millions of dollars_ once again trying to buy Mike Rogers’ way into the Senate, we’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $1 million in grassroots contributions to fight back. Haley needs these resources from _day one_ to compete and win, so can she count on your support at this urgent moment?**

body:
"Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good!" (Psalm 107:1)
Dear Peter,
As I sit down to write this email, I'm filled with gratitude and thanksgiving for the incredible support you've shown us. Your generosity, encouragement, and prayers have been a blessing to our efforts. I want to express my deepest appreciation for all that you've done.
As we look to the future, I want to invite you to be a part of shaping our plans and strategies. We value your input and insights, and we believe that your perspective will help us create a brighter future for our country. We're not just asking for your financial support; we're asking for your wisdom, your guidance, and your prayers.
To that end, we're offering you a no-obligation chance to weigh in on our plans and provide your feedback. We've created a brief survey that will help us to better understand your thoughts, concerns, and ideas.
The survey is completely optional. We simply want to hear from you and learn from your perspective.

](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/m2eo5GZ7TgY4_rtfWmtwU3qIpj_-BmqqWB5Dnhe20hNI1pBZkddc-4fTnUujqPp_7qtBk7L7WoTEldyHQP8FzkYtmMA1uvhSoZBQsXcqAcuOorHG8OZdxH-sPIse9QXFtlbntkzXpKALV4DfY_yDKLDnmOuUkvd7FIlsqwX8aT27UJSsFCtihfV6KtcZzuLAPHfefBQseTARrPs17Wan8F_l08IvmpQigXhtbBV_wIcfjEr0KUvqR2dbJZCurkYOUH7lj3aQIh-ZlQ_S0LRQZY3xb2ZKCCrso52p-BilSyJJtODfGFABLG98INdzbAdHJhTmDl5s9IngUlo7lfnIeCrEMHqklLA2npAzmmKNMkt-FBWnWxllLyjYULGsn1T19NC2RnJR8MoIGwqcsjAmPxPGDHwDyXZNqHmYF5-g7P_AmZn1rY_kM_PXx3R79l_NEHNvSyr5fYhCmcwTysdUujY2ZrkqbDJYZhysuzxdQBCNZG_25ERpKHgsGlIoYzTWR644F4UXL6W1uP5j6PPqkjvw/5jp2MkiMEoDVUU7f71h2EKS_W4gJAaK7/8)In closing, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for your partnership and support. body:
My seat in South Texas is the Democrats' number one target.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2nm9341r143sto0971mecbs5le5almfkgbuncjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)Friend, I'm writing to you with a sense of desperation. **I've been sounding the alarm for weeks, but I've yet to hear back from you. The Democrats are unloading a war chest of up to _$50 MILLION_ to take me down and flip Texas Blue.**********[SKIP TO THE END:
RUSH A DONATION >>

But it's like my warnings are falling on deaf ears._ Let me be crystal clear: My seat in South Texas is the Democrats' number one target. They're hell-bent on revenge after we humiliated them in 2022. And if they succeed, it won't just be my seat that's at risk - **it's the entire state of Texas.** I don't have the luxury of billionaire backers like my opponents. But I have something they don't: _The support of patriots like you._ That's why I'm begging you, Friend - please don't sit on the sidelines any longer. I need your help to fight back against the Democrats' relentless attacks.
[Will you lend a hand?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlqdqeg9m932guaarg7uj4qc50oepithneacr8do_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs) [RUSH A DONATION >>

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5gklnqb2hk05tmvtf00gousd4hinu3uj1m9m4og_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0vpqph7fqp2pcdu6jtsssce0fircbkoest7p77g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl64si0crdhpic7gvbnvhee8hs2hcaear1v9qd1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv23p0800fsoikbgjjjhho0e7ogpd61ld1rog640_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z573hevbs5pu2phsmj1qkmorjq1qr3liu0spesd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcr9gek3mjakfqp44f3l7jgretqnguuohod3uf68_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zronqvbdo5og4orjka0suq2djhoccdht9tmilr20_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qr8a4cci4ddmgudqar4bn2d62oliqn3re56790_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What the media hides about birthright citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb1u1vq9vd24dn7cqpboktrs1c59r8dhrv4llsr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm0mlsepup2vtv0272tmm2as5775simoots9s5r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g64ob6cjh2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zh836vu349v2d7m7r06p0867no5i7r9v645gc5sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zem9chinm3o01av12h72nnbhgkkc79188uf04dg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj4cdh2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfnsc98cj1jrnekmsu2c6n42qp6jakhsvssd6520_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj4cdh2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zovuab986qnikkjdqnj1eesbrhjb81p439nj8350_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj4cdh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt5m01n8k4i95251n9ngt7djqd0hd2pua4f0r1r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8sst3nr8olu4gc8vnl0o4aukm45gld82ogaojto_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2upnhd2tqsa919q3c4gdp3esa26ncvlhf2j12r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3hbdkv0r41clpskvr712cri0s0ekd9p080keab8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7s939lg6apfgbcerbpo9hepu70dv7cbbjlt9om0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpto2u604k06bmbts2iltel63ukqp6pv15tb07n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfhgklcbcvqkcd0mr520ir4rj1ip47a576l4vmag_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaj424pvhsru1ep4tv3mblt2jofmh6p8qkgfvhk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9m1cul287ikgbhn3bvvil2av65t7h9toebbmbvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrdfp7kva4pt6m9u2vnk0hocakapukh5lv7q2n9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g6cpj2c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z22917p4ansgemi1gd6ckck81lbrrcdglt66b7u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeckaronu4vp6v8pnl88mdqu60cfd22olm0bbarg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zscj51gejf27fm2lihrmgmupsdhe1plcptqapueo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfqf52nqg3s3n2o8hmcq5a75ukom0qradlmlmcvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z66a4nmqf9h2c5sf0hthpuvok9anc4a2fhpmq16o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z42bcke7hhh4oivmhmkrofh4f3p3l9ekdmbgohno_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g62oj4c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Iowa House Passes Bill To Legalize Psychedelic Mushrooms
body:
The Iowa House passed legislation Monday to legalize the use of psilocybin, the psychoactive compound found in “magic mushrooms,” for psychiatric treatment through a state program. House File 978, passed 84-6, would establish a Psilocybin Production Establishment Licensing Board within the Iowa Department of Health and Human Services, operating in a similar fashion to the [...]...Click to read more | [](http://trk.libertyledger._FMiBGEzrkt4WesYBA)

**We send you our deepest gratitude for reading his message.**
It’s been nothing short of chaos since President Trump handpicked Elon to take a deep-dive into the corruption of the Federal Government.
What Elon was able to accomplish in such a short time was simply groundbreaking.
But for every MAGA Truth Bomb that Elon drops on the radical-left, a **Molotov Cocktail** is thrown his way.
Elon’s Tesla dealerships are being firebombed. His employees attacked. Death threats against him have reached new heights.
And the worst thing about all of this - there haven’t been any calls from Democrat leadership to _**CEASE**_ the violence.
We all know that President Donald Trump and Elon Musk will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, but they can’t without your IMMEDIATE SUPPORT.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdf4b6c93gu8nt65a4jlhlb3mr1dndul2kbdj458_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66o36c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z645f1eoj0u1l0akvsv3vp1asva8mfcrdmdqh260_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66o36c9h2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4cu6st4f0gsvmfc56suqssb5mugjq0uqqi70m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66o36c9h2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidi6tjgdca6kn9743surd4lr54on6c4ehuhh5so_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66o36c9h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zashl15dgdpmmb9qbkoet193o0t2i4riiggp5eho_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66p71chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqgeol97ki7elk3fqpofsi8ddco3607jqisaess0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66p71chh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9m1hapmdmklnc0qmk2u5g2qj8si7q0g9m0hu3e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66p71chh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdkibu4r08008ki8b5j5o7i1i584vp27t3p1113o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66p71chh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk7qi4d8nqeevqvef6ke33oclbpblhsl6sie6kd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5g66p71chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziie3r5udt95lu9qvid0jo32ebj46ktirn89okmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5i60pb0cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zebjg8j9e7s5m4p5gc17b2r8evfgvi3v9b6al7g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5i60pb0cth2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zutpivvdh13t3s41kcroie1dofg8uk2pll0mdsug_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5i60pb0cth2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9e20lcghglvgbfjgh2jhe058kg9f2j9hmcb56lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5i60pb0cth2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znktjn430vfgtck3a04445sga1arp07dtahmvth8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5i60pb0cth2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: Military Border Control, Smiley Space Face, and Dating After 50
body:
U.S. military personnel now have the authority to [detain and search illegal immigrants in New Mexico](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp8Gd0TkgrG3oNjGXbbd0iJwHd8RPxbcScZvP8q8wtSf9J2j8_-23jwlKo9_PqPjra4FXz0hM7Y1UyL27bzXFrGFWrjV1DOlFRSMUhkJeo2e0rmaIboNEVAP6K6TGY2CSY_D7qZtDhZn2LT3ATEYFY0JEII10artz0Du_aYM6KtSo9YXPdrpfh_1DDMYEydhFEbi2i4flQrvuKWzPrFdQs1Dcjvz0YX-K2ARsPCOO6X03gQsR00UTgFLxA1LRwHLCFbZ2crPLrnVenQZkT0V2dG3sMtMj-YLd1nwJTN-UagClqG5eLwoJer2LfTInn4gA_-q2tPBdwAAAP__cKCCDA) after President Trump transferred control of border land from the Interior Department to the Defense Department.

# Wednesday, April 23, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 2005, YouTube co-founder Jawed Karim uploaded the platform’s first video, _Me at the zoo_ , marking the humble beginnings of what would become the world’s largest video-sharing site. ## U.S. Military Authorized for Border Control
U.S. military personnel now have the authority to [detain and search illegal immigrants in New Mexico](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp8Gd0TkgrG3oNjGXbbd0iJwHd8RPxbcScZvP8q8wtSf9J2j8_-23jwlKo9_PqPjra4FXz0hM7Y1UyL27bzXFrGFWrjV1DOlFRSMUhkJeo2e0rmaIboNEVAP6K6TGY2CSY_D7qZtDhZn2LT3ATEYFY0JEII10artz0Du_aYM6KtSo9YXPdrpfh_1DDMYEydhFEbi2i4flQrvuKWzPrFdQs1Dcjvz0YX-K2ARsPCOO6X03gQsR00UTgFLxA1LRwHLCFbZ2crPLrnVenQZkT0V2dG3sMtMj-YLd1nwJTN-UagClqG5eLwoJer2LfTInn4gA_-q2tPBdwAAAP__cKCCDA) after President Trump transferred control of border land from the Interior Department to the Defense Department. The move, announced Monday by U.S. Northern Command, designates a 170-mile stretch along the U.S.-Mexico border as part of Arizona's Fort Huachuca, allowing troops to operate outside the constraints of [federal laws that limit military involvement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1urDAQBeCngc7IjP-2cXEbur1tSmTwsExk45WZLOHtIxLlCVKPNOd85-0-3gMl2h7_Q0bPSxk3PPaEzFjHTIk41HMqNWKdy8a1pD1TGkGCEVILUGMMlM5Rt9EviICqRd87bbQEp0y7ehdsr6WZcMJ5idFEFxYrbS91AOtsaMlf36QG1UtplOqUsW6ajLrBDbSOrtESI3Gp3XuhjVdc0lleWLu55Db5lfm5N-pfA0MDw3Ec3RnWUq5rA8PFaWD42MWvRuwcmMqGUfzARMZPmouAXkmpnLXdyjm11cfnQSnRbq8KjxwofUfyn3Z6efgKAAD__1I9fNU) in domestic law enforcement. Service members can temporarily detain trespassers, provide medical assistance, and implement crowd control until customs officials take custody, marking a significant shift from their previous supporting role at the border. The White House indicated similar authority will soon extend to parts of Texas.
## Roche Commits $50 Billion to U.S.
[Swiss pharmaceutical giant Roche](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcuK40AMRb_G3ilU6hG7F16kabzr2QzMLE05JcearodRKTH5-8HD_EGvBBIcce79_Tl9eoqU7z98wkGWMmXca0QR5ClRJPH8mgsH5FvJwiXWRHHSSjtQFrSZgqf4mmwbhgVRo2lxOHfWWaU749p1sCr4zi6me7Pena26qMu8dH3vzJvujfctDQdNWW3OSjljTsZdunl2pte9tjZ0jVUYSAqf_hTKsuISX-WJfLqV1MZhFdlqY66NHhs97vt-SjUft0aPmOFRGz2mkvF1TM9fKMem7lQrBH7ck_9CBi63FSGizxUoSwHhR9pAPNOywFI4PaKHnWQFp2CmGKlk2LgkqghSgPITqwD9_-gZrtfzR37_lRszlhuFxny8H0HjXn8iby0PYdsPTr0civfkKf5Tkm_18Bz03wAAAP__qRaeyQ) is joining a new surge of corporate reshoring with a $50 billion commitment to expand U.S. manufacturing, driven by new White House tariffs and policy incentives. ## NCAA: Schools Can Pay Student-Athletes
The NCAA approved [sweeping and historic changes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUDtuxCAQPY3dYbEDrHcLijTuNm1Ki89gE42NBWQt3z4iV0g10ryn9_t6zS8TKe7Lp9lQ15DmHc9CWCvmeYsUq8mXTdljdmmvOVHZIs3AQTEuGYjZm0jXLHuvAyKg6FHfRqkkh1GoftV2DNJZL3yA4IzlhtsQrH06h6hu8OyjbmpcgrhxroQYhLqP1irxgAdI6cdOcvSxpjx8p7jXFQNd6Y15cGnrSa-1HqUTHx1MHUzneQ7Oltai4R1Mbo3OLKmDqT3bccaww5SCheUfwsKKW1Oiwg5zsYPMhbnx-qz9cUaiWO4txLKZSH-m9V9LvTX8BgAA___zz3_C) to the compensation structure of college sports, allowing student-athletes to be paid directly by their schools for the first time. While expected, this move represents a landmark moment in college sports history. Just five years ago, student-athletes weren’t allowed to make money at all. Now, price tags from school-backed “collectives” can [stretch into the millions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQubNjFg9d2NK1IzJwTq497Mi4Qbx9RfsInX_S95e-j9t4Cyyc7u9hJV9jHhPtm1CtVMaVhWsox5TLQmXOqZYs28oyggZ70eYCOC6B5RhNs_hIBIQN-c4ZazQ4tM3Du4mgtxgdAvVmvoZudsaZGWMfZzBdw_5c0waw09oitmivbpos9tCDMYtTRtPCNZf2M3OqD4py5BeVds5rI_5R63NT-KZgUDDs-97mhKcpGBKLgqGE9MXpvikYnhIOKn9yeQX5DpVzOqUpfnnuLMLb9Uze18Dym6j_-uXl4ScAAP__CpV2lg). The new rules now permit the schools to pay students directly without having to use outside groups. However, all of this is dependent on the [House v. NCAA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOiIzHptQuNgmXbbdEtl4CLMacGTmJsrbX3Ff4ZZHRzo_37_7dI8svD_-xo2CLmXa6X0IqVKdNhbWWD-p1Ex1LrvWIsfGMoEB1xnswE45snwmbHNYiIBsS6Ef0KGBwbp2DQYNwIjRDjblZBxA9KnHAefs8riklsOZZhBsb4yz9mKdH1Jy9gpXQMxDg4Yya6mX_4V3XWmRT3lRvcxlayWsqs-jsX8auDVwi8_zwGmdoirPQg3cdpZun2Ps1vJ1UHeQqtBGu3Z9ns1iPdGIvcXs40xXv2STsvcLjKatIT_fLMKHP6c8tsjyU62_4vUK8B0AAP__8FB9pQ) settlement’s approval, which would set parameters on _how_ revenues would be distributed. If approved, each school would have about $20.5 million to share with its student-athletes, constituting [a salary cap of sorts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSozAQAF8DGZQ8ksAXKLjAOLGdXHDOKMGM8HgFUgmtWX6_5f3CfqC7q_9f-6tlz8t0szOZ7EK_0LZ6yplSP7PnbNM-hISUxrDkFPw6s-9BgK6EqkD2aNnvvSrROCIgWZI5tEorAa3U5cOg-ONgbEELRKdc6xqhhlZYwAMOiLpk86YJBfIghJaylrpph0HLIxxBKWwLJQg5h1Q_Ay_5Qc7v4UWpHsNcevPIOa6F_FtAV0C3bVsdKUVPX5z32nIBXbQTFdAto7WVjTGFF61V-vS0Vi6kCjnRmKuxOdn7qTn_u8x3EM-P23K-yKlMBuPG3vPavEum2bL_Medf7XoZ-A4AAP__Brp_pg).

If you're looking for your next investment opportunity, be sure to check out today's sponsor, . | U.S. Military Authorized for Border Control U.S. military personnel now have the authority to after President Trump transferred control of border land from the Interior Department to the Defense Department. The move, announced Monday by U.S. Northern Command, designates a 170-mile stretch along the U.S.-Mexico border as part of Arizona's Fort Huachuca, allowing troops to operate outside the constraints of in domestic law enforcement. Service members can temporarily detain trespassers, provide medical assistance, and implement crowd control until customs officials take custody, marking a significant shift from their previous supporting role at the border. The White House indicated similar authority will soon extend to parts of Texas. Roche Commits $50 Billion to U.S. is joining a new surge of corporate reshoring with a $50 billion commitment to expand U.S. manufacturing, driven by new White House tariffs and policy incentives. The investment includes major upgrades in Indiana, Pennsylvania, Massachusetts, and California, along with a 900,000-square-foot facility for next-generation weight-loss drugs at a yet-to-be-disclosed location. include TSMC's $100 billion investment in advanced chip plants in Arizona, Eli Lilly's doubling of its U.S. footprint with four new pharmaceutical sites, and Apple pledging $500 billion toward AI-driven manufacturing and training, including a Houston facility. Nvidia is launching domestic production of its AI supercomputers in Texas, while Hyundai plans to invest $21 billion to expand its U.S. auto output and innovation efforts. NCAA: Schools Can Pay Student-Athletes The NCAA approved to the compensation structure of college sports, allowing student-athletes to be paid directly by their schools for the first time. While expected, this move represents a landmark moment in college sports history. Just five years ago, student-athletes weren’t allowed to make money at all. Now, price tags from school-backed “collectives” can . The new rules now permit the schools to pay students directly without having to use outside groups. However, all of this is dependent on the settlement’s approval, which would set parameters on how revenues would be distributed. If approved, each school would have about $20.5 million to share with its student-athletes, constituting . name: History Facts
subject: The legendary film that was initially a flop
body:
The 1941 film Citizen Kane is often cited as the greatest movie of all time, topping the lauded once-per-decade Sight and Sound poll in 1962, 1972, 1982, 1992, and 2002 before finally being dethroned by Vertigo in 2012.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ofd9elwec09n9thj8ehslacwj85d46m293b5cn28vbsqq8vvn8zm99v9xze648j2ivh6m6fsn84i11e69bb8wsz8b10vo5fpua6cz56jw1hvef8vzuw9ynglt3fxtsttc23nypnnvj5bif8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Citizen Kane was a financial flop until a rerelease 15 years later.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he 1941 film _Citizen Kane_ is often cited as the greatest movie of all time, [topping](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the lauded once-per-decade _Sight and Sound_ poll in 1962, 1972, 1982, 1992, and 2002 before finally being dethroned by _Vertigo_ in 2012. It received nine Academy Award nominations, winning Best Screenplay while famously [losing](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Best Picture to John Ford’s _How Green Was My Valley_ , and has influenced nearly a century’s worth of filmmakers. It also attracted no shortage of controversy, as director and star Orson Welles’ feature debut was clearly inspired by newspaper magnate William Randolph Hearst, who did everything in his power to prevent the movie from being seen. As a result of his successful (and devious) efforts, _Citizen Kane_ was initially a [financial failure](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), losing RKO Pictures some $150,000 (about $3 million today).
---
It wasn’t until the film was rereleased 15 years later, after Hearst’s death, that the movie got its due. This was partially thanks to the [critical acclaim](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the film received upon its initial release and in the years that followed. _Cahiers du Cinéma_ co-founder André Bazin called _Citizen Kane_ “a revolution in film language,” and John O’Hara of _Newsweek_ wrote that “your faithful bystander reports that he has just seen a picture which he thinks must be the best picture he ever saw.” With Hearst out of the picture and more than a decade’s worth of glowing reviews, the controversy that overshadowed the film’s initial release had more than subsided by the time _Citizen Kane_ was rereleased.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

---
2

---

| Year Welles received an Honorary Academy Award
---
1971
| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## One of Welles’ final roles was in “Transformers: The Movie.”
Welles had an illustrious career both behind and in front of the camera, directing such classics as _The Magnificent Ambersons_ and _F for Fake_ after _Citizen Kane_ , in addition to appearing in the likes of _A Man for All Seasons_ and _The Third Man_. His [penultimate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) appearance was a voice role in 1986’s _Transformers: The Movie_ , in which he played the villainous Unicron. It wasn’t exactly a passion project for Welles: “I played the voice of a toy,” he said in an interview conducted five days before his death. “Some terrible robot toys from Japan that change from one thing to another... I play a planet. I menace somebody called Something-or-other. Then I'm destroyed. My plan to destroy Whatever-it-is is thwarted and I tear myself apart on the screen.” Welles took the job, as well as several [commercials](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=107jrez3mcm32bmk2yy4nqv6f4g1fwrcnxczpcvpjvzt56q2wvbttn6mhadq358lot6xkob0r5sz8tgsfffdpld7npzqozq3etzbfaoqvettymh21semfgmmap14i85nysihph7l6hz34ug434w4klhfu3vr666f4fsdrtzqhcidrip614f26yrd6x8pcfah4zyplt8em9c0uzlyqz993u3aq8wwexppi7p56zwvf7qo4xv2aix5p6vqfswb7waanffnkwrc02uu35b9k6fkdp8vn2gkaytja53lte&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv6232&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), to finance his own filmmaking projects. _Transformers: The Movie_ was released 10 months after Welles died, initially failing both critically and financially before developing a cult following of its own.

clean_body: The 1941 film Citizen Kane is often cited as the greatest movie of all time, topping the lauded once-per-decade Sight and Sound poll in 1962, 1972, 1982, 1992, and 2002 before finally being dethroned by Vertigo in 2012. | T he 1941 film Citizen Kane is often cited as the greatest movie of all time, the lauded once-per-decade Sight and Sound poll in 1962, 1972, 1982, 1992, and 2002 before finally being dethroned by Vertigo in 2012. It received nine Academy Award nominations, winning Best Screenplay while famously Best Picture to John Ford’s How Green Was My Valley , and has influenced nearly a century’s worth of filmmakers. It also attracted no shortage of controversy, as director and star Orson Welles’ feature debut was clearly inspired by newspaper magnate William Randolph Hearst, who did everything in his power to prevent the movie from being seen. As a result of his successful (and devious) efforts, Citizen Kane was initially a , losing RKO Pictures some $150,000 (about $3 million today). It wasn’t until the film was rereleased 15 years later, after Hearst’s death, that the movie got its due. This was partially thanks to the the film received upon its initial release and in the years that followed. Cahiers du Cinéma co-founder André Bazin called Citizen Kane “a revolution in film language,” and John O’Hara of Newsweek wrote that “your faithful bystander reports that he has just seen a picture which he thinks must be the best picture he ever saw.” With Hearst out of the picture and more than a decade’s worth of glowing reviews, the controversy that overshadowed the film’s initial release had more than subsided by the time Citizen Kane was rereleased. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Welles’ age when he made Citizen Kane 25 | | Films directed by Orson Welles 13 | Films directed by Orson Welles 13 | | Stars on the Hollywood Walk of Fame for Orson Welles 2 | | Year Welles received an Honorary Academy Award 1971 | Year Welles received an Honorary Academy Award 1971 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- One of Welles’ final roles was in “Transformers: The Movie.” Welles had an illustrious career both behind and in front of the camera, directing such classics as The Magnificent Ambersons and F for Fake after Citizen Kane , in addition to appearing in the likes of A Man for All Seasons and The Third Man. His appearance was a voice role in 1986’s Transformers: The Movie , in which he played the villainous Unicron. It wasn’t exactly a passion project for Welles: “I played the voice of a toy,” he said in an interview conducted five days before his death. “Some terrible robot toys from Japan that change from one thing to another... I play a planet. I menace somebody called Something-or-other. Then I'm destroyed. My plan to destroy Whatever-it-is is thwarted and I tear myself apart on the screen.” Welles took the job, as well as several , to finance his own filmmaking projects. Transformers: The Movie was released 10 months after Welles died, initially failing both critically and financially before developing a cult following of its own.
