## Lottery Director Resigns
Ryan Mindell [resigned as director](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ8Gd0T4ACYUFNu4u9tuaWFzHJDARHCUn7dfOcob3GqKkb7RN_9-lh-fcjpuf31BR6-9Lgc-e0YibEuuZ7xDarhRbQ17uh3dN1pAgOZCcZBL8Cm_FzUEt4pgxwHdaJRWYhLTdYhuhX21Slq9ohGorRmNBLubVajNa6uH5E6YUCDHUYxCX-Sq16sEE6yRwfuNKYEhUW0Xikj48n3P7_rAdtlqGbKLRPfO5B8GM4OZIsaU89kxmGMteAoxmDt5Qv70tEUGswZtzXTlHx7_ivKtlpJ6T_XgW_SpFX_wrzWDeWgu3J8p59Qnw5S4FZ8-QwP97rqHg_8BAAD__3IShLc) of the Texas Lottery Commission on Monday. The _New York Times_ published a story on Sunday about the fraudulent April 2023 drawing, in which a consortium spent $25.8 million to purchase nearly every possible combination of numbers to win a $95 million jackpot. Although Mindell was not the commission’s executive director at the time of that drawing, he has faced intense scrutiny over his role in allowing companies known as [couriers to purchase lottery tickets](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAMBuCnCRsoOAnQIcMtbL31RmSIWyIFghK3lLc_UfWe4CZ7sH75-3-uwxV98Ov9Gxey_LrFYaU9B2KmNIR4jsP5RBPHlCj7-5ox8QASTCl1CWpw6MMx6MLZUbpLXZCtW220bGTTFbN10JGEdlKmxg5HU6PrpDaqUw4AJyq8PcOkBlXXspamUqMZOwWtu7TKIU5CS3KeY6p4JqYX5ls44pNSNcWlCHZm3rJQXwJ6Af2-79VyZFxx5bj6eB4J6E-VgB4fmf16Lon9FEhA_04sP9SSXjQ92D-p_FOXH3YJEroWGlNt81Yk67bdh-Bz0wot7wv68P6H_9fi08JvAAAA__8HJIlt) on behalf of customers. The Texas Rangers and Attorney General Ken Paxton have launched investigations into the lottery. The payout for a recent $83.5 million jackpot—with the winning ticket purchased through a courier—is [on hold](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAUhZ8GOxy4gJiCYhu7bLulQ-QamUHJwN1E337HTN5gq9Ocn_nOz3W8-pjidv_2Kzra5zxu-KoJibCMKZ9yhFhwolwK1njfqi80ggDDheagxuBjOkbdBHcT4SIbdNJqo0Unur5ZXIezttbMEmzQpkM5gZTQWwAfQCrdRHeWCQ1KSiGFadXN3HoFNlysCt5PTAsMkXJpaUHC3dc5HfmJpZ3y2iS3ED0qU18MBgbDHDe_Tdgefsn5dDAYTiQGwzvLP1CVU35w3HH6pfhE_oHjslfSaGNUu9CamuLC4xVTirWzTIv76mN679L_3no6-AsAAP__f4t_gQ) until those probes wrap up. The Texas House recently passed a budget that stripped the Texas Lottery [of all funding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAURE9jd1j4AzYuKLZJl223tDB8bLQkRPAVx7dfOcoNtppmNE9vfq7z1cYU7-u3vaGhV8jzHfeakAjLnPIZh48FHeVSsMb1Xm2hGTgoxiUDMXsb0zHL1puF-6lv0fSjVJIPfNDtZtwkFiE1Bxk0aiVckCpIcHoQ1k1atNGcY1yC6Hvec9WJRS1awOinUXhrXSM5-ki5dLQh4cvWkI78xNK5fGuT2YgetRFfDVwauOz73p0KO-LvWWjg8tFgbosY2MeC2UBY2BLXFSsx2jAQ22KlXA72pjDgAygJbTH-sceUYh3GRvL1ZmN6s-l_jz0N_AUAAP__cu6COQ), jeopardizing the commission’s future if lawmakers in the two chambers can’t agree on a compromise.
## Former Houston ISD Official Convicted of Bribery
Former HISD Chief Operating Officer Brian Busby and former district vendor Anthony Hutchison were [found guilty on Friday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u3SAUBODV4I4rOOC_giKNu5c2pcXPwT4S11iA37vefeRsIdUUnzQazZ-v9ctSomP7bd9o2ifm9cCfmrA1LGvKT9yBCvqWS8FK21FtaSsI6LnQHNQaLKV71V0wToRZdmjkqHstBjFM3W4C2snCMI_B9zBMTkUxwjB5FCrMHkJH5ikTGpSUQor-pVzvJgVjmEcVrPVMCwzUcnm1HRt-bI3pzt9YXj6_u2T21s7K1C8GC4PFOi_VIwyWM9fGYIm5vLHwPV-15YNTDdzvhJHnE4ttdGw8x0geC3eF7MHdVd3NY76OwLeLUrsfcFhuBosc5DzpUTJYumLC-UMpUR1GpsX2tpT-rWr_9-W3gb8BAAD__93-ioo) of 33 federal charges, including bribery, witness tampering, wire fraud, and tax fraud. Between 2011 and 2020, Busby bypassed district procedures to direct construction and groundskeeping contracts to Hutchison’s company, Southwest Wholesale, in exchange for cash and free home renovations. Southwest Wholesale [overbilled the district](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OozAQAJ8GOiNj7BAKF9fQfddeidY_4JUcb2QvSXj7U-4VrppuNJo_P9sPYMZy_IZHtPzZaSvx3XJkjnXL9MUVsEbPVGtseJQGlTcllRFSCzVtATBfm-6DdTIsYx_tOGuj5U3e7n2yftE-ODXDuMvFeBO10RPs4Azsd_B7j_Yrk1pN4yhHaYbJGXef1ByWeQoAvtMyBmSqA6fI8QNtzxe9Yh08PfpsE_OzddOvTq2dWhOdjalkKAHLMVA9OrW6ilCEO5u7BBROVC6RTvYJGxWx01mCOE7MfAkqAnIWns7CTWARCVsQnmo9n4xUBFeE3Km1rzY835gzttvcaXk8APO_JP6_kS-r_gYAAP__vTSNZg) more than $6 million during this period. When Busby and Hutchison learned they were being investigated, they pressured colleagues and subordinates to lie and falsified deductions on their tax returns to conceal income. Five former HISD officials who previously pleaded guilty to their involvement in the scheme [testified for the prosecution](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdBMZG0IoKCKt6N5rV1uhwR5gVsaOxk4If7_K_sKrbnGlq3vO76_pCzlwXL9xp6G8lzRFOnKgUkimkD5xehZyJYlQ5jVmlDIZbVrQDRg7eeRwTk3lh1n7vq5oqLumbfRVX2_VNtRI82x63-PStqh71AvWRNh3pr3Vtq14-Izpxti61rVuL3Zu55s1ne876xGdajR5LkkuZaNCb8xLONOL5OLSXoVhK-WRlb0rMyozHsdx2XP8dMqMFOGZlRk_UMqMTngnZca_Tzlh4egzLEl2Etg4e3CU4EXRJ4H1yaGckCJYC25DWSlDWsClmB8s6E6YhWeSEzB6OFgIFsGnV2ZEgfu9_uXyn-9KBv84OATO1041et2Rw__f5We2X4P5FwAA__99y5dx). Each charge carries a prison sentence between 3 and 20 years and a fine up to $250,000. A sentencing hearing is [scheduled for July 28](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0R4wLFduNiG7m27pYWZcTx6GJ6AxMnfr9hf2OpOcXVH5_z5Wr8cB46P3-6kpb73tEa6SqBaKa8htfggZ_I15UyFH7G4XFdQMEhlJOgVHYfPajpcNoVz39HSj2Yw6q7uU3csk9_1NE80oEKHs-7vCkjvBkfU86BNx0sbUwZ036teDTe9DdukYcR51OicF0YRck35Vg-q9HZlD5_0onzz6ezCctT6U4T-JcAKsNd13Xxg_w1HepaaYmsJsA1LgA3JuyDAtp8CrDICbD8JsKWSayLkntMpiz9SCvKbsUh6y4MLSp-SdLFlrNk1Ie18sa-EkqM8n6GyPDkETlFiCsFluWXeKH_aIJ0kwHZ5wZ-rlcp9FEY9TsfhH0n9P_-vBf4GAAD__9rmnOA).
## Bass House Art Being Sold
Over $60 million worth of modern art from the iconic Bass House in Fort Worth will be [sold by New York auction house Christie’s](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ9G3hToz3YyeEhxoe126dDRoC06JipLgcR7nbx9ob5CB4IECJyD7_v9OX8CRUqPn3DgxK8tzwnPGpEZyxxzW-9ABVfOpWClR6pQeDbK9FI5aewcgOJ7dl2YFhVuusNJj653alDDtdunXq1wXa6DdqsyYblp16M2g17Qjqh71dHUwpQzVmulVX-xS79crRnDbbQBYBVOYSDO5cI7Mr6gbvGdv7Fc1nx0cdqZn1XYuzBeGH-e5-Woqf2E8ZjkVxXGNyhhfOYdizB-UIekJKGw3Eo-ZKUgIbVJKBeoVW5wYJAnVm5NcqcY5QGpUk5yJ5bwtXK7l5jXP8J4KPJ-1x-ZPAvr80pB2I8fTSye9ReWZ1em8DwpRqrDKJx6HEDxHwH_n_fvyfwNAAD__7mhmWE) next month. The sale will include nine pieces from [seven well-known 20th-century artists](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO6yAURb8Gd1g8_SgobuMut53SAs5xjIRNBGfi5O9HmV-YajdbS0vr67befMrpvP_3Bzp6bWU98WoZibCuuXzmDalipFIrtnQ_m6-0KqEsF4YrvYJP-b2aDlwQMMsOnRyNNWIQw9TtLk5hmAWCiWqGYRvGSQUI1g5blAaE7JL7wIRRWkohhe11sGHSaoR51OB9ZEYgJCq1px0JX75t-V2eWPtYji67nejRmP7H1MLUcl1XH_eaGiVsnwdTC55MLY1KTdiYWnwlvtVycNqRB98a38t3Qx5LzhgplZN7O3uN0s4alYlG-lGCEAAxKhtmnLrq4HGlnFMbRmbE_fAp__rQ3yo-nfoJAAD__yebh0E), including Ellsworth Kelly, Agnes Martin, and Frank Stella. Among the highlights is Mark Rothko’s _No. 4 (Two Dominants)_ , expected to fetch around $35 million. The Westover Hills mansion was designed by architect Paul Rudolph in the 1970s for Sid and Anne Bass to showcase their growing postwar art collection. The four-story home is considered one of the [most significant works of residential architecture](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8Gd0R4GGynoNjGXbbd0sIwjkciJoLJ39uvcl_hVl_xSedI599luQTOfFz_hht5eW9lOejVMolQXXL5zidxpSilVmp8PVqosoABpw1qsEsKnD8LdsmvJp37jnw_okMzmGHqdm_QWHQ29RNOEVJAY6PDRG5COG_b0LH_wgyC7XvTG3eyq1snC2M6jzaFEBUaSiylnmQnoXdoW_6UJ9VTLLcu-13k3pT9o2BWMG8veX8PBXN8ZHlUUjCvoTW9l0cjHaroWHKmKFwOvVNITUvRca_chKkpmLvq0_3FOXMbRoXmegucf2zyu0ZPD_8DAAD___7YfOI) in the country. Sid Bass, the great-nephew of oilman Sid Richardson, is an 83-year-old investor and philanthropist worth an estimated $3.6 billion. His ex-wife, Anne, passed away in 2020. A 12-piece art collection belonging to her was [auctioned for more than $363 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuu4zAQO43cyZBH8q9QsY27bLulMbImsRDZMqRJnNx-4XeFVxEECYLkv9t8wxDD_viLG1n-3NO801kiMVOeY7rg60OmhVPOVMJjL5h5BgWtVEaCnj2G-J1N5a1Tfmwqsk1vWqM61Q3Vap1HTabrnMGxUQZcO9x7bLsBaRl1D1WwV5gyoJtGNaqttWvdoKH3Y6894iKMIh845ZpXYvpgucdvelOul7RV0a7MRxH6j4BJwHSeZ42ZrxWXLmDCzPKiAqYN85NYwLSsORQOVCS-Fg5pl7jvJEvw0mEp8jLKnHh9JnngK8r88ikeq2xAm16P0I4Cpipbf5whxlC6Xhj12DDEn1b8uy_fFv4HAAD__9ZFim4) in 2022.

The New York Times published a story on Sunday about the fraudulent April 2023 drawing, in which a consortium spent $25.8 million to purchase nearly every possible combination of numbers to win a $95 million jackpot. Although Mindell was not the commission’s executive director at the time of that drawing, he has faced intense scrutiny over his role in allowing companies known as on behalf of customers. The Texas Rangers and Attorney General Ken Paxton have launched investigations into the lottery. The payout for a recent $83.5 million jackpot—with the winning ticket purchased through a courier—is until those probes wrap up. The Texas House recently passed a budget that stripped the Texas Lottery , jeopardizing the commission’s future if lawmakers in the two chambers can’t agree on a compromise. Former Houston ISD Official Convicted of Bribery Former HISD Chief Operating Officer Brian Busby and former district vendor Anthony Hutchison were of 33 federal charges, including bribery, witness tampering, wire fraud, and tax fraud. Between 2011 and 2020, Busby bypassed district procedures to direct construction and groundskeeping contracts to Hutchison’s company, Southwest Wholesale, in exchange for cash and free home renovations. Southwest Wholesale more than $6 million during this period. When Busby and Hutchison learned they were being investigated, they pressured colleagues and subordinates to lie and falsified deductions on their tax returns to conceal income. Five former HISD officials who previously pleaded guilty to their involvement in the scheme . Each charge carries a prison sentence between 3 and 20 years and a fine up to $250,000. A sentencing hearing is . Bass House Art Being Sold Over $60 million worth of modern art from the iconic Bass House in Fort Worth will be next month. The sale will include nine pieces from , including Ellsworth Kelly, Agnes Martin, and Frank Stella. Among the highlights is Mark Rothko’s No. 4 (Two Dominants) , expected to fetch around $35 million. The Westover Hills mansion was designed by architect Paul Rudolph in the 1970s for Sid and Anne Bass to showcase their growing postwar art collection. The four-story home is considered one of the in the country. Sid Bass, the great-nephew of oilman Sid Richardson, is an 83-year-old investor and philanthropist worth an estimated $3.6 billion. His ex-wife, Anne, passed away in 2020. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Lia Thomas Vows to Fight Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project](https://go
body:
He just won’t go away. We’re standing our ground, because we’re sick and tired of it. We need...

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, In March of 2022, I tied with Lia Thomas at the NCAA swimming championships. I poured my life into that moment, years of grueling training and sacrifice, and I watched him smirk as **_he_** took the trophy that I earned.
I saw girls in the locker room _freeze_ , _terrified_ , _forced to strip down_ next to **a 6’4” man insisting he was a woman**.
And I watched them get shattered when they missed going All-American by one spot – a spot they’d have owned if they weren’t being forced to compete against a delusional man.
**_[The injustice still burns](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)._****_[It wasn’t fair then, and it’s not fair now](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**** _._**

[DEFEND WOMEN'S SPORTS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
President Trump saw the injustice for what it was.

That’s why he signed an Executive Order banning biological men from women’s sports, delivering justice when spineless bureaucrats and woke cowards wouldn’t.

We thought the fight was over but we were wrong _._ Now, Lia Thomas - with the backing of _the radical mob_ ,_woke corporations_ , and _far-left Universities_ \- just came out and said **_he_** will do everything in his power to fight against President Trump’s Executive Order.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[DEFEND WOMEN'S SPORTS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Lia Thomas isn’t just fighting by himself.
**He’s vowing to drag this battle back into the courts and he's backed by deep-pocketed extremists who don’t care about _fairness_ , _science_ , or _the girls who’ve trained their whole lives for a shot that he wants stolen from them_.**
I’m not standing by while Lia Thomas and his allies try to tear down what’s right. I’m fighting back and I need you with me.
Friend, I am launching a campaign to crush Lia Thomas before he can even begin, because this is not just about me: **This is about every girl who dreams of competing fairly.**
**_If Lia Thomas succeeds in his challenge of President Trump’s Executive Order, the next victim could be a young woman that you love having her victory snatched away, or experiencing a life altering injury at the hands of a man on the field._**

I’m throwing everything I’ve got at this: every dime, and every ounce of grit but I can’t stop him alone.
The deep-pocketed extremists behind him are counting on us to back down. They’re wrong. With your help, we’ll win this fight.
I’m staring down Lia Thomas and his army of woke elitists, just like I did in March of 2022, but for the outcome to be different than it was back then, I need you in this fight.
We can't let them steamroll us torch every girl’s shot at fairness.
**__[Please help me defend women’s sports today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**

[DEFEND WOMEN'S SPORTS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Yours,_

**Riley Gaines** American Principles Project

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7r/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

body:

---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Lawmakers passed a [$43.9B budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), closing a $1.2B shortfall by cutting transportation and social programs while protecting K–12, Medicaid, and higher ed. Meanwhile, Democrats [rammed through SB25-276](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), a controversial immigration bill that blocks ICE access and expands protections for non-citizens.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Concealed carry permit applications are spiking ahead of new training and testing rules [starting July 1](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In Montrose, commissioners formally requested [federal intervention](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over SB25-003. And Rep. Boebert is fighting to halt federal funding for the [Front Range rail project](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), warning it could harm Douglas County communities.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** RFK Jr. is pushing to [ban eight petroleum-based food dyes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by 2026, citing risks to children’s health. The move aligns with Trump’s “Make America Healthy Again” push and mirrors European standards. Meanwhile, El Paso Commissioner Cory Applegate is urging U.S. leaders to [keep Space Command in Colorado Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to preserve national security and local jobs.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Shaina Cole highlights how SSDI delays are [devastating Colorado families](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—creating years-long waits and financial hardship. After Governor Polis vetoed an open records bill that would’ve let bureaucrats decide who counts as “real media,” the left-leaning Sentinel called us out—in a good way. Their message? You may not like RMV, but we still [deserve the same rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, April 23, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado Democrats ram through radical immigration bill with last-minute amendments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV STAFF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
In a move that’s drawing outrage from conservatives and constitutional advocates alike, Colorado Senate Democrats passed Senate Bill 25-276, a sweeping immigration “protection” bill, after rushing through five major amendments on third reading—sidestepping standard legislative norms and undermining federal immigration enforcement in the name of “civil rights.”
Democrats hailed the bill as a firewall against what they call “mass deportation policies” under President Trump. But critics argue it’s the most pro-illegal immigration legislation in Colorado history—and that it was pushed through without transparency, proper debate, or concern for the rule of law.
“We are proceeding into debate around a very important bill,” said Sen. Paul Lundeen (R) during the third reading. “These amendments are substantial in nature and should be laid over. The process matters—especially when you’re talking about fundamentally changing how Colorado deals with federal law.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Not political theater: Montrose federal intervention request grounded in Constitutional oath](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* MCiting recent state laws like SB25-003, Commissioners Sean Pond and Scott Mijares sent a formal letter to national leaders, including Donald Trump and the Supreme Court, arguing that Colorado is violating constitutional rights related to guns, parental authority, and property.
* The letter, designed to make an impact, has already gained interest from about a dozen other counties. Pond and Mijares say they acted out of duty to defend the Constitution—not for political theater.
* While some residents praised the move as overdue, others criticized it as symbolic or unrepresentative. Commissioner Sue Hansen abstained, voicing concerns about whether the board speaks for all county residents.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Cole: Bureaucracy is crushing the people SSDI was meant to help](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* SSDI applicants in Colorado face an average 7.3-month wait just for an initial decision, with only 39% approved. Denials lead to appeals that can take up to three years, leaving families in financial and emotional crisis.
* Strict rules, missing documentation, and delays block access to benefits—especially for those without healthcare. Many are forced to choose between essentials like rent, food, and medication.
* The author calls for more SSA staff, simpler applications, access to legal advocates, and compassionate rule changes to fix a system that’s failing the people it was designed to support.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[El Paso Commissioner Applegate: America’s space advantage depends on keeping command in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Commissioner Cory Applegate argues that relocating U.S. Space Command from Colorado Springs would jeopardize national defense, as Peterson Space Force Base provides unmatched infrastructure and access to key military assets.
* Moving the command could cost taxpayers billions and disrupt a thriving aerospace ecosystem that supports thousands of local jobs and boosts innovation in Colorado Springs.
* Applegate emphasizes that the synergy between military installations and skilled personnel in Colorado can’t be replicated elsewhere—warning against treating the relocation as a political or economic reward for other states.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Polis Vetoes Open Records Bill—But Conservatives Say It’s Too Little, Too Late](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF****| STATE | APRIL 21** _Governor Jared Polis vetoed a controversial bill last Thursday that would have made it more difficult—and more expensive—for Coloradans to access public records. But transparency advocates across the political spectrum say his sudden concern about responsive governance contradicts years of actions that have consistently chipped away at public accountability._
__
**[Treta: Denver’s broken permitting system is driving up housing costs—and it’s time to fix it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY ROBERT TRETA | COMMENTARY | APRIL 21** _I’ve been designing and building homes in Denver for 28 years. I pulled my first permit in 1997—for a small room addition on a house. It took one day. One._
__
**[Home Rule Charter Commission candidates must file by April 24 in Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | APRIL 18** _Writing the rules that will shape Douglas County’s future might sound like a job you’d rely on lawmakers to handle. But in this case, it could be your neighbor, your coworker – or you._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!

It remains the only urban center in the nation with a street layout and architectural style distinctly shaped by its Spanish heritage.

GOP Rep. Nancy Mace was **[confronted by a rude man in Ulta Beauty while shopping](https://substack.com/redirect/89664c42-f60f-433e-a1fa-d277458039ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for face wash, leading to a tense confrontation she managed to capture on video with her phone.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/89664c42-f60f-433e-a1fa-d277458039ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/89664c42-f60f-433e-a1fa-d277458039ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mace told the man, who apparently asked off camera, that she holds town hall events every year with her constituents.
"Every year?" the man asked sarcastically. "Are you going to do any more this year?"
By the time Mace was able to pull out her phone, the conversation was already hostile.
"Do you want to keep going?!" Mace fired back at the man. "I've already done one, I'll do plenty more. You're always invited. And by the way, I voted for gay marriage twice."
"What does that have to do with me?!" the man snapped, offended by the statement.
Mace calmly answered back, "It has everything to do with you..."
The man began to walk away saying "you're insane" and "you're a nasty bitch!"
**["F*** you!" Mace shouted back. ](https://substack.com/redirect/89664c42-f60f-433e-a1fa-d277458039ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**"You couldn't take me on baby! Stay the f*** away from me!!"
Watch the altercation go from 0-60 in no time:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/89664c42-f60f-433e-a1fa-d277458039ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Protesters love Abrego Garcia but have NOTHING to say to Patty Morin
PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller asked anti-Trump protesters, what was their message to Kilmar Abrego Garcia, the illegal immigrant and accused wife beater and MS-13 affiliate that Trump deported.
"Hang in there,... we're bringing you home!" they said.
Miller then asked what is their message to Patty Morin, the mother of Rachel Morin who was brutally raped and murdered by an illegal immigrant.
**[Watch what they had to say:](https://substack.com/redirect/ec6f7c7b-2d2c-4a80-a143-627b174be678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ec6f7c7b-2d2c-4a80-a143-627b174be678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Tired of AARP? There 's a Much Better Option - And It's FREE**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b62f5067-6733-487d-a6e0-a52fe3360be2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **[FREE membership](https://substack.com/redirect/b62f5067-6733-487d-a6e0-a52fe3360be2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
**[👉 Join the movement today and claim your free membership at:](https://substack.com/redirect/b62f5067-6733-487d-a6e0-a52fe3360be2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans.

Florida gubernatorial candidate Byron Donalds **[held a fiery town hall even at Estero High School Monday night](https://substack.com/redirect/a878e196-68ae-4ecd-af21-d281844e60ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , where he faced a mob of screaming, angry protesters determined to heckle and disrupt his event.

Apr 23 | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Nancy Mace was for face wash, leading to a tense confrontation she managed to capture on video with her phone. Mace told the man, who apparently asked off camera, that she holds town hall events every year with her constituents. "Every year?" the man asked sarcastically. "Are you going to do any more this year?" By the time Mace was able to pull out her phone, the conversation was already hostile. "Do you want to keep going?!" Mace fired back at the man. "I've already done one, I'll do plenty more. You're always invited. And by the way, I voted for gay marriage twice." "What does that have to do with me?!" the man snapped, offended by the statement. Mace calmly answered back, "It has everything to do with you..." The man began to walk away saying "you're insane" and "you're a nasty bitch!" "You couldn't take me on baby! Stay the f away from me!!" body:
Democrats think they’ve found a bulletproof loophole...

Democrats think they’ve found a bulletproof loophole...
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znthpinn49fhgq8js222cjml48rs50mof81bvam8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
For the sake of my life, I hope to God they’re wrong...
---
...But Democrats believe they’ve finally found the bulletproof loophole to send me to prison until I’m 100 years old.
---
Because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, a corrupt Democrat Attorney General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.
---
But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon, he’s calling on _YOU_ to join the cause to save me.
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvqiaja77lv1jk9aup7qlv5lcorp1rdbrmgfmto0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)
__
---

Back in 2021, after the Biden FBI raided my home, the media pronounced me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_.”
---
**And yet, despite all odds against me, here I am – ALIVE and _FIGHTING_. We’ve won _every_ single battle up until now.**
---
_How did we win?_ The same way President Trump won the White House despite four sham arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet... thanks to _YOU_.
---
**Patriots like _you_ refused to surrender our country to a corrupt Deep State hellbent on using lawfare to overthrow our Free Republic.**
---
But now I’m in my final fight that will determine whether I spend 20 years in a prison cell or if I live as a free man.
---
That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this is. And now I am **_humbly_** echoing the President’s call to “save” me.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $50,000 I need to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zckeehsfsnafsgqs9gkvc0h3moauc677s4otnu68_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)

__
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsla2jglco507mfq5ee97rtlgrejgpdvsm4mjsb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdhif7qt3e5h0o760sjjs62etkk4ruen4v5tsiag_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj8d0ua3l9camatvh8khq2d0gda1t0pcv9uehjr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs7rlim1ssvnd17prptk2pd4plotj5gjb74m5v5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c5h6ao72c5h2bs)

## With Tesla Earnings Down, Musk Says His Time at DOGE Will ‘Drop Significantly’ – HotAir
Elon Musk is clearly proud of his time at DOGE. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: 2026 Attorney General Race: An Attorney for Texans
disclaimer_text: paid for by Jaworski for Texas
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/elpasowithbetoandjoe-14185550?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=60ac24ca08&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | Good Afternoon!

Looking ahead to the 2026 election cycle, I recognize there is an opportunity for new leadership in the Texas Attorney General's office. As the former Mayor of Galveston who led my city's recovery from Hurricane Ike, I know what it takes to fight for the people you care about and the place you call home.

It's no secret that Texas needs new leadership rooted in transparency, integrity and justice for _all_ Texans. After thoughtful conversations with my family, I am seriously considering a run for Texas Attorney General. Although I will make my decision in the coming months, I’m exploring how best to continue serving the people of Texas and will be sure to keep you informed.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=bd7b49e0fc&e=5d8d80652b)
_Matt Angle, Founder/Director of the Lone Star Project discussing my potential candidacy for Texas Attorney General._

In the meantime, please feel free to reach out and send me your thoughts at joe@jaworskifortexas.com.
Keep the faith and Onward!
####

Joe Jaworski

## Keir Starmer brands Kemi Badenoch a ‘spectator, not a leader’
Conservative Leader Kemi Badenoch has called on Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer to apologise to Rosie Duffield during a heated exchange during Prime Minister's Questions. ## Free Speech and Government Grants
The Trump Administration has announced that it was freezing grants to Harvard, and demanding that Harvard change many of its policies and practices in order to get back in the Administration's good graces. President Trump has also suggested that Harvard might lose its tax-exempt status for "pushing political, ideological, and terrorist inspired/supporting 'Sickness.'" name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
A final chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMAqw5JSmgsGcYTD9cBQoGakOy2fHmIhhntAtlFgjWCbl1CwuEDzE-XTORKjjdK3zG7pwxxEQ_fY60Gfa63QT28c2ldqBNcaIN5dRfBDqhEs7XPb40ZU0Hb-SxfhYnCxmR-1GgaIiLgBNfVzsvk5M0WU)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMDvqKZ0yVoJc59aamP2HT0v3V7LDgxX9HWh5eviFeUWuXF0r1A1vwGcsVB-qzGs8iDUcQpzPk_m4cN9HJND1jbdUij0SM_pTIhV7tV7e5kxTYcL90_O9D9qQ12oD3onglkOKVHhyic21m33hGX_c2Gf)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMB6FBU8k9ow_CdYXc_dRZJBhqnOcozeHMCWZS7faxsE6MICxZZrhxXcjKQyzT6gbWzabQ6pqNdcIaUkEYIyGsfqJ3ktHCpQgJML7z76S_K9-HyX0Wm3neo3WFy5ZsqRyEMU1KRWWQB0lZArNwipN1p3)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMAINCoTXQImNsLIOsRsn8S72xAHifV3LTK6Xx8pNtc4flc5Aqo08WCiGErCAyfNnDEhIK7ddlEIArRRVLURX_xCCPVd7BsFfClheM8RTbxJEkh8HSDSeFjwLBXcZZuixUZDV6mxZGqBxqT4ATOQnXPb)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3ElhwA0N_80r4AmBH-sTrIgHw7mqM1bt8F_rWHNA-86JS3B3ojbjO4Mse055GGLZOSyVY3fgV1suO3xcZCGE6QQqIrqTMU7En86J7aUArbrf1sz8M8H2N5t7ivc1TdvzLlgLDlu6clzdXgNUJEFnXiMV1Je23YEMTom44xb_Y3NikQNbLw3b5Fp5llQIlsSyEOBWC1DHy9TK27g9pOwtIT102bTHDPU79F3ngenErIjvZ4s%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMBVJupixz2fXV5CCxavtaKyzO9rSa3uVtn07UyhgntNJ4zRbW-KJx8B4rsp_lEiXZQuXkPcnRhN47vaTPt_6M1DdXTaK6lnFP5nUTOjT4saRVgXoCYs20wZZG8fJ43QVREo3vlRwWtPRcwEsIRxVxOG) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMAmtYiGZVQ6nb_pmIoGAlGU6s2EH5qtfWNhYjh0jxe3I3pd6mppLOH2151NF2tR6zt52TABvqmhKIqm9TfG4K6BhRnoSTb0Cd672Z03c6YdfsH0jElNAl7lvEBaAHwIPJEzEjDkcRrbb70en91XJwzn)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMAF_W56o5qaggPGa95Vx1k3o2ElIftIVOaOHd3eYEq9Q-wXZG0NvhqmB7fqupqyIFVpPUVk6iflx9ueG3qvY9iROKJeKcBNzOPScajxB9IQqciaW70r1Xhz86PG7s8-gXeQ78ptIc07CjMxEWf6nyOx)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMBkoqKvFDIk8lRW13NrrBzOqFaRsPeE6d4eW1FF9PP7qSlVjZ8hsmBk0lvDM4MHRp6-6wZmTqSx0NKLNknk5RbQU-Hen86da3lmBef_ZI4xuGGVAms66FN6udlpQlixIORsR1cj40bqdvw751p2mY-x)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=933fa9955d454087b59d0f696f42b8e6&_e=Q9_-FaE2QKOkxAYtxXrseKs-LngXDq0HWFk6YdIAzCoFoWGvol2gR9B0wAPH3Elhmn2Apd7K44SCW5il2eUDg6SMdoJxSxdYt6axO631RYt73kxSePo4HPAt1-7jAmE9qjvYQi2wIQecfZ51x5RtYa9YoqX6H-VwNYgtOWBGwMCvz59Mag1r6FxoDVc_jJs87T1VtGcgeAJC0NiISFFmPlSXgLzA4QVPExYAIGW2JvfeKCqRhgdxoRpNPI7bDIe2jyExIFEmpf6VUNL__6dd4Y1hQCTE-zu7cx1X2ogXDIvjZmZOw57ip8hNCMVfqmvP)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Peter, democracy is a muscle: To make it stronger, you have to exercise it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help power the work to build a truly representative democracy.
|
---

Peter, democracy is a muscle: To make it stronger, you have to exercise it.
But right now, Florida state lawmakers are trying to stop citizens from exercising that muscle through aggressive rollbacks on citizen-led democracy.
The Florida legislature is advancing three bills that would make it nearly impossible for ordinary Floridians to introduce amendments to the state constitution.
These barriers are designed not to protect democracy, but to silence it.
These measures would impose excessive fines for even minor violations and drastically shorten petition deadlines — blocking grassroots efforts before they even begin. And the House version of these bills would require a $1 million bond just to begin collecting signatures.
**In a state with a proud history of citizen-led ballot initiatives driving meaningful change, these bills would effectively shut down this vital democratic process and silence the voice of everyday Floridians.**
Let's be clear about what this really is: the same decades-old tactics to keep power out of the hands of the many and consolidate it in the hands of a few.
All On The Line is organizing Floridians to fight back against this assault on our democracy. Together, we're applying pressure on state lawmakers and raising public awareness about what's at stake.
**The fight in Florida is emblematic of what we're seeing nationwide — a coordinated effort by the far right to silence the voice of the people and undermine the foundations of our democracy.**
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is currently litigating in five states — including Florida — to dismantle illegal gerrymanders and protect fair maps.
Meanwhile, we're preparing to stop Republicans from potentially stealing more seats in Congress through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where new congressional maps will be drawn this year.
And we must be prepared to protect the 2030 Census from any efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
**When I think about these fights, I'm reminded of what it really takes to make history.** It's ordinary people refusing to concede their most basic rights who ultimately change the course of our nation.
[**Today, I’m asking you to be one of those courageous people, Peter. Will you make a gift to All On The Line to power the work to build a truly representative democracy**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106340001/541208543/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGonFL_email_20250423-AOTL-Tier1-AGonFL-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250423-AOTL-Tier1-AGonFL-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGonFL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzYmRmMWU1LTQyMjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d6Wuo5CyGQx9KyydqSCDAupydznH6kNUv5TYz-Y8DAE=)

name: Steve Roberts
subject: Let the People Decide
body:
| | | | Upholding Prop A and the Will of the Voters
---
| |
# **STEVE ROBERTS**
# **St. Louis**
---
Weekly Update - April 23, 2025
---
| |
---
**Senator Steven Roberts - "Let the People Decide"** _"Upholding Prop A and the Will of the Voters"_
In November 2024, nearly 58% of Missouri voters approved Proposition A (Prop A), a measure to raise the state’s minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2026 and guarantee paid sick leave for workers. This was more than a policy decision — it was a clear, democratic mandate to improve the lives of working Missourians. Yet, before the measure can take effect, Republican lawmakers are already moving to dismantle it, undermining the will of the people and the very foundation of our democratic process.
Prop A is more than just economic policy — it is a public health initiative. By raising wages and ensuring paid sick leave, it addresses longstanding disparities in health and economic opportunity. When workers no longer have to choose between seeing a doctor and putting food on the table, they gain more than just financial security — they gain dignity.
Prop A means a parent can stay home with a sick child without risking eviction. It means workers can recover from illness without fearing lost wages. It means fewer Missouri families will have to work multiple jobs just to stay afloat. These are not radical ideas. They are fundamental protections that reflect our
shared values.
_Salus Populi Suprema Lex Esto_ — “Let the welfare of the people be the supreme law” — is not just a phrase etched into Missouri’s Great Seal. It’s a guiding principle. And right now, that principle is being tested.
That’s why we must uphold the decision made at the ballot box. Prop A represents a collective choice to prioritize the health, dignity, and economic security of Missouri’s workforce. Efforts to overturn it not only harm working families —they weaken our democracy.
The people of Missouri have spoken. It’s time their leaders listened.

---
|
---
**About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.
---

clean_body: | | | | Upholding Prop A and the Will of the Voters | | STEVE ROBERTS St. Louis Weekly Update - April 23, 2025 | | Senator Steven Roberts - "Let the People Decide" "Upholding Prop A and the Will of the Voters" In November 2024, nearly 58% of Missouri voters approved Proposition A (Prop A), a measure to raise the state’s minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2026 and guarantee paid sick leave for workers. This was more than a policy decision — it was a clear, democratic mandate to improve the lives of working Missourians. Yet, before the measure can take effect, Republican lawmakers are already moving to dismantle it, undermining the will of the people and the very foundation of our democratic process. Prop A is more than just economic policy — it is a public health initiative. By raising wages and ensuring paid sick leave, it addresses longstanding disparities in health and economic opportunity. When workers no longer have to choose between seeing a doctor and putting food on the table, they gain more than just financial security — they gain dignity. Prop A means a parent can stay home with a sick child without risking eviction. It means workers can recover from illness without fearing lost wages. It means fewer Missouri families will have to work multiple jobs just to stay afloat. These are not radical ideas. They are fundamental protections that reflect our shared values. Salus Populi Suprema Lex Esto — “Let the welfare of the people be the supreme law” — is not just a phrase etched into Missouri’s Great Seal. It’s a guiding principle. And right now, that principle is being tested. That’s why we must uphold the decision made at the ballot box. Prop A represents a collective choice to prioritize the health, dignity, and economic security of Missouri’s workforce. Efforts to overturn it not only harm working families —they weaken our democracy. The people of Missouri have spoken. It’s time their leaders listened. | About Steve Roberts Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities. | | Steve Roberts P.O. Box 771671, St. Louis, MO 63177

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Corruption. Chaos. Vouchers. We’re fighting back.

body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
The first session of the 114th Tennessee General Assembly has officially adjourned—and not a moment too soon for Tennessee families. The Republican supermajority once again pushed through a harmful agenda.
Republicans’ misguided and fiscally irresponsible MAGA agenda:
🔺 Increased costs and fees on working families
🔺 Diverted hundreds of millions of YOUR hard-earned tax dollars to privately-run schools
🔺 Inflated the state budget in favor of special interests and corporations without any significant investments towards improving transportation, increasing healthcare access or improving quality of life for working families
🔺 Targeted innocent families seeking refuge and opportunity in our country
🔺 Expanded protections for firearm manufacturers—while doing absolutely nothing to make our communities safer
Additionally, as this session ends, Republicans’ corruption is on full display. Today, the long-awaited federal trial of disgraced former Speaker Glen Casada and his chief of staff got underway. They’re facing 20 counts of bribery, money laundering, and wire fraud .
The House rushed to adjourn today because so many Republican lawmakers have been subpoenaed as fact witnesses for the trial. This alleged corruption at the highest levels of Republican leadership is an embarrassment to our once-great state.
Will you chip in today to help us hold them accountable and flip seats in 2026?
We have an opportunity to flip seats in 2026, but it’s going to take everything we’ve got, and we must start NOW. Building competitive campaigns takes time, people and serious resources.
If you’re ready to help us compete across the state, chip in now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dems25email]
The choice is clear. Our families cannot afford continued Republican leadership of our state.
With you on our side, we can win.
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
Chairman, House Democratic Caucus

name: Democrats.org
subject: We need to elect as many Democrats as possible
body:
---
**Derek, it’s clear that Republicans won’t check Trump or Musk’s power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will. But to do that, we need your help.** Let us explain: The American people did not elect Elon Musk. But Trump has given him unrestricted access to our government, letting him set up a new agency that has worked to dismantle other government agencies and has fired thousands of federal workers. Meanwhile, Secretary of Defense — former Fox News host Pete Hegseth — has been talking about war plans on insecure messaging apps. Not only with other members of the Trump administration but also with his _own wife and brother._ Employees have come out to expose the total chaos and severe dysfunction that people like Elon Musk and Pete Hegseth are causing. But Republicans have done absolutely nothing. The lack of oversight and accountability that’s happening right now is extraordinarily dangerous. And the consequences of crippling these agencies and putting our national security at risk could be disastrous. That’s why right now, it’s so important that we build up the long-lasting infrastructure we need to build a strong Democratic Party that will vote these Republicans out of office and elect Democrats who will actually check Trump’s power. [**So if you can, make a $7 contribution now to support the DNC’s work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. ## New Book Details How TDS, Media Hacks, and Heathcare ‘Experts’ Lied Us Into COVID Lockdowns – RedState

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Another session in the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
We’ve put another legislative session in the books and, once again, the GOP supermajority didn’t do anything to tackle issues like gun violence, improving public education, or affordability for working families. Instead, they handed out participation trophies [https://www.timesfreepress.com/news/2025/jan/16/resolution-to-honor-anti-trans-activist-riley/] and focused on the divisive issues we’re seeing in Washington. [https://tennesseelookout.com/2025/04/21/trump-like-policies-dominate-the-tennessee-legislature/]
I had hoped that my colleagues across the aisle would focus on what matters most to Tennesseans, but I can’t say I’m surprised. I was proud to get legislation signed into law that increases accountability for mental health systems, supports our children, provides paid family leave, increases teacher pay, and honors our veterans, among others.
More than ever, it is important to support each other, and I am honored that you’ve been a supporter. We’re facing challenges across a broad spectrum of issues, but at our Capitol, I have fought for you every day. I don’t have deep pockets or billionaire patrons. I rely on supporters like you to power my campaign. Would you consider showing your support with a contribution of $5,$10, or even $25? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025hcemail] Every bit helps and shows the Supermajority that we aren’t backing down.
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025hcemail]
Thank you so much for your support.
Heidi Campbell
Senator Heidi Campbell is running for re-election in TN Senate District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbellforsenate?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]

name: Erica Henry
subject: 0 women in attendance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
It appears no women were invited to the world’s most important meeting... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106349159/541231790/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250423table_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzODQ2NzJmLTQ5MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EzGN7AfVKu_lP0rCTFbQUAv4e8uaBR0qcwGVuoJuCtM=)
---
Hi Peter,

Over the past week, the Trump administration has enacted significant changes in U.S. foreign policy:

-Yesterday, Secretary of State Marco Rubio announced that he will be eliminating more than 100 offices worldwide focused on diversity, inclusion, women’s global issues, and crisis zone expertise, while scaling back human rights and democratic efforts.

-President Trump escalated the ongoing trade war with China even further by announcing new tariffs on Chinese-owned ships docking in the U.S.

-Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is under fire after the public learned of yet another Signal chat in which details of the Yemen attack were sent to his wife, his brother, his personal attorney and many others.

-The Trump administration suspended all military aid to Ukraine and Marco Rubio told reporters, “If it is not possible to end the war in Ukraine, we need to move on,” as he departed meetings in Paris.

Here’s a picture of the folks involved in those high-level “peace” talks in Paris:
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106349160/541231791/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250423table_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzODQ2NzJmLTQ5MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EzGN7AfVKu_lP0rCTFbQUAv4e8uaBR0qcwGVuoJuCtM=)
---
You might notice everyone in that photo has a few things in common... At Her Bold Move, we can’t help but notice that these meetings – arguably the most important meetings in the _world_ – **had 0 women in attendance.**

[**It is undeniable that we need more women in government on the defensive lines blocking the Trump administration’s efforts to destroy our economy and our standing on the global stage. Help support more pro-choice and pro-women women running for elected office by chipping in $20.25 or more today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106349161/541231792/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250423table_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzODQ2NzJmLTQ5MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EzGN7AfVKu_lP0rCTFbQUAv4e8uaBR0qcwGVuoJuCtM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106349162/541231809/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250423table_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzODQ2NzJmLTQ5MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EzGN7AfVKu_lP0rCTFbQUAv4e8uaBR0qcwGVuoJuCtM=)

And here’s the thing: **According to international data, when women are involved in peace agreements, peace is 35% more likely to last 15+ years.** On the flipside, war disproportionately impacts women – often in radical and unimaginably dangerous ways. A trade war and global recession will be no different.

The news coming out of Washington has been a stark reminder that we need more pragmatic women in our government. This isn’t just a symbolic point about the vast benefits of DEI or representation (though that point cannot be overstated). It’s a valid concern on behalf of anyone in the world who isn’t a white man, **as these are the people making the decisions about our lives, our safety, and our futures.**

At Her Bold Move, we understand our responsibility in this moment. We know that our best defense against the dangerous (and yes, truly toxic masculinity) of the Trump administration is to elect MORE WOMEN to the U.S. government. **It is critical to our pursuit of national security and to getting as close to world peace as possible.**

[**Thanks to Trump and the unqualified loyalists he has brought into our government, our democracy, our economy, and our national security remain as fragile as ever. But brave women continue to serve as much-needed checks and balances, blocking potential damage at every turn. Help us elect more of them to office in 2025 and 2026 by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106349185/541231900/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250423table_N_EH_90DO_12_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzODQ2NzJmLTQ5MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EzGN7AfVKu_lP0rCTFbQUAv4e8uaBR0qcwGVuoJuCtM=)

Together,

Erica Henry

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42734fa2-ac4b-4699-810d-d1cc8c478b88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1011&refcode=email-20230423_v&akid=8314%2E5885482%2EP5e7Q7 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump and his MAGA backers are hell bent on destroying independent
journalism so that THEY can control what the public knows. Now they’re
*this* close to striking a fatal blow to our public media....and together WE
are going to stop them.

In less than two weeks, Congress will vote on Donald Trump's request to
wipe out federal funding for PBS and NPR. And major conservative groups
have launched a MASSIVE effort to pressure Congress to do it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21084?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20230423nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8314%2E5885482%2EP5e7Q7 ]Our Revolution is mobilizing thousands to stop them, delivering our voices
STRAIGHT to Congress, but we urgently need your support to keep this vital
fight alive. Will you rush a donation right now and help us protect
independent public media from Trump?

My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.

**As you know, House Republicans are clinging to a razor-thin majority - just a handful of seats stand between us and the radical Left taking control. And the Democrats will stop at nothing to flip it.**

name: Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones
subject: ADL reports record increase in antisemitic incidents. But is that data trustworthy?
body:
The American Defamation League (ADL) released its annual audit of antisemitic incidents this week, showing its highest number of "antisemitic" incidents in the organization's 46-year history, with 9,354 alleged events.

The American Defamation League (ADL) released its [annual audit ](https://substack.com/redirect/d5139df4-ee6d-425e-a4bb-8a12036d0778?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)of antisemitic incidents this week, showing its highest number of "antisemitic" incidents in the organization's 46-year history, with 9,354 alleged events.
The new report covers all of 2024, using the same database and methods that I've raised alarms about in the previous two years of this report.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d253381-145f-4578-892e-43ac61f590ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Since October 2023, the ADL has included opposition to Zionism, as well as support for resistance against Israel and Zionists, as perceived support for terrorism and attacks on Jews...

body:

Celebrate Victory with the 47th President Donald Trump in 2025!

The BIG Trump Knife is [laser-etched on a stainless steel blade with a waving American Flag and a stainless steel half-guard keeps your fingers from slipping.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21260/6374453/1b1e6253792d7f0c9c7b00bd0875b6f379ff7991/43f78e06bb5f5704c359d8e26c839975dd00ec7a)

---
The patriotic handle scales are crafted of a **[blue pakkawood panel that has“Donald Trump” in white, surrounded by white stars, and a red andwhite-striped acrylic panel.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21260/6374453/1b1e6253792d7f0c9c7b00bd0875b6f379ff7991/43f78e06bb5f5704c359d8e26c839975dd00ec7a)**

The fixed blade knife comes with a belt sheath for ease of carry.
**Get Your Trump Knife Today &
Let Folks Know Where You Stand** The Limited Edition Trump Knife is not just a rare collectible, but a symbol of your support for President Trump, who always stood for "True American" freedom.

Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa _by just 0.19 points_ after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- **they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to _0.15 points_.** But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? _Of course not._ Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. **This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power.** The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. **[Team, chip $25 or whatever you can today as we fight bills like this around the country and protect our right to be heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106357092/541256456/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=mqWW7yQw1u0MOQDLhvweCpdVTL1l0J+fhlKHpZZqUzB1Q7PCOXgvHcwbgdNMUWUfSRbIBnI4G1Hq59K40sAFBOzxSALfndCqbGfmlV2rto0=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2MWViNzBmLTU0MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iQ4I4dP4jWdsOkNPkm-kcrdfQ7iVjktzsvw5pbAE0I4=&emci=215a7118-4d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=461eb70f-5420-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: Des Moines Register: Iowa is changing when candidates can request a recount — and who conducts them. Here's how.| | | | | Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa by just 0.19 points after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to 0.15 points. But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? Of course not. Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power. The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Those aren't the only changes -- this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race. Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged ," she said. "But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair. " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we're seeing in North Carolina with a race still not settled almost 6 months after Election Day. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. clean_body: Peter, Democrats are on the move. Jon Ossoff set a fundraising record in Georgia. Democrats outraised Republicans 10:1 and 3:1 in special elections. If they keep outraising us, they have a better chance of taking back the Senate. And if they take back the Senate, it will be even more difficult to keep prices low, the border secure, and President Trump's agenda moving. Thank you, Tim Scott NRSC Chairman ******************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Keith Ellison
subject: This is bullying, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump is threatening to withhold federal funding for Minnesota schools unless we strip away the rights of transgender people.

This is bullying, plan and simple. Trump has issued executive orders to ban trans kids from playing school sports and broadly deny the civil rights of transgender people, and now his administration is trying to punish our state for refusing to comply with his cruel demands.

That’s not just wrong—it’s illegal.

Trump’s executive orders violate the Constitution, Title IX, and Minnesota laws that protect trans youth. And he doesn’t have the authority to cut off federal funding without congressional approval.

Trump is trying to destroy trans kids and punish our state for helping them live and thrive. He won’t stop at one community—when he’s destroyed one, he’ll go after another, and another, and another.

But as the Attorney General of Minnesota, I have the power to say “no” to the Trump administration. I’m using it.

Yesterday, I filed a federal lawsuit to stop these unconscionable attacks on vulnerable children. I’ll use every tool at my disposal to stop Trump’s unconstitutional orders, protect our schools from political retaliation, and uphold the basic rights of transgender people.

According to our records, you’re eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make a fully refundable $75 donation right now to help us as we stand up for Minnesota children?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250423ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States

**LAST CHANCE:** [We’re sending our BIGGEST thank you card yet to Bernie Sanders for leading the charge against Trump! Don’t miss your chance to add your signature before we send the letter off tomorrow at 9AM »](https://udpac.us/l/LfwlNO1CTYkv) [](https://udpac.us/l/NGFs02IhFJuu) | **[SIGN THE LETTER NOW TO TELL BERNIE SANDERS YOU’VE GOT HIS BACK! »](https://udpac.us/l/3C0Dyizr47Aw)**
---
**_Senator Bernie Sanders,_**

I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the rest of the MAGA mob.

You’re one of the only people standing in the way of Project 2025, and I know the GOP has been relentlessly attacking you for standing up for the American people.

**That’s why I want you to know I’ve got your back!**

Your continued strength gives me hope that Democrats can save our Democracy from the barrage of MAGA threats.

[I can’t thank you enough for all of your work. So I’m signing this card alongside thousands of Democrats to tell you we’ve got your back, and chipping in $3 to UNITEDemocrats now to help leaders like you in the fight against Trump! »](https://udpac.us/l/7nCbiWkh2noV)

**_X Peter_**
