Peter, There’s no better way to show your DFL pride than by rocking some of our bold new merch made for the organizers, the dreamers, the doers, and everyone working to keep Minnesota blue. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106358920/541261755/1722866335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGU1NTJhMC01NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7TdvAz8K78nT8xXMFxDO6Qup1XIRdRdgWicudFC0Dk=&emci=20a7c7cd-b41f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dde552a0-5620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=27213119) We have the classic DFL staples, state fair merch, and our newest “Don’t Look at Me — I Didn’t Vote for Him” gear that is here and making a statement. Did you catch Haley on MSNBC last night? **She joined Lawrence O’Donnell to talk about the launch of her campaign for Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat – and how critical it is for Democrats to win in Michigan to take back the Senate.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106359104/541262400/-1649021094?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk50-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU5NzUyNy01NzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P0nD3GGPwJpDNMKe2vEliofyW1m7s9OEPuHZW-S16cs=)
Having flipped a battleground House district from red to blue – and defended that seat three times in a row – Haley has the track record it’s going to take to win this Senate race!
But the road ahead won’t be easy: Haley’s GOP opponent, Mike Rogers, ran for Senate last year and lost by fewer than 20,000 votes after Trump and Republicans shelled out nearly $80 million to support him. Now he’s running again, and everything indicates that Trump and his billionaire buddies like Elon Musk will dump _tens of millions_ in Michigan to protect their majorities in Congress.
Haley won’t let that happen. She’ll fight with everything she has against Trump and Musk’s chaos and endless funds, but she needs your immediate support to build up the resources it will take to win a race that The Cook Political Report has already rated as a “TOSS UP.”

name: Indivisible Team (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Don't let Trump gut Medicaid
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friend, Lawmakers were elected to protect the people and advocate for our best interests. So why are Republicans [laying the groundwork to decimate lifesaving programs like Medicaid and SNAP](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16c5ac74-b217-4714-ab0e-b3582ff20974/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)? It’s because Donald Trump wants to make billionaires like Elon Musk even richer. It’s an extremely unpopular idea, even among Trump’s own voters, but the GOP plans to use a familiar legislative trick -- budget reconciliation -- to get it done. But there’s good news: Republicans in Congress remain deeply divided about the specifics of the final bill. That gives us a huge opening to exploit their divisions and obstruct this process as long as we can. **Right now, Indivisible is sounding the alarm to turn public attention against any cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, to make Republicans pay a political price, and ultimately, to better our chances to stop it from passing. Will you join us?** **[If you’re in the fight to protect lifesaving programs that countless Americans depend on, add your name right away.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde9b0161-d180-4c24-88ad-97670cde269d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T300b85e5-5e71-481a-ad72-9f06eb9976bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Budget Reconciliation is a Senate maneuver allowing some bills -- namely those related to spending -- to pass with just 51 votes, instead of the 60 normally needed to bypass the filibuster. Put simply, it lets the party in power push bills through the Senate without any bipartisan support. You may remember Republicans using reconciliation to cram Trump’s billionaire tax cuts down our throats during his first term -- or to try repealing the Affordable Care Act in 2017. (We stopped them.) This time around, Republicans are using reconciliation to slash Medicaid and give more tax cuts to billionaires like Elon Musk. They’re early in the process right now -- fighting among themselves over how many trillions to cut -- but we know one of the most destructive, partisan bills in American history is coming. And we need to be ready. [**We need all hands on deck to stop their attack on lifesaving programs. If you’re in all, please add your name to join the fight >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcadee498-e0b2-432e-bb8e-cc4381bfc0cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9c52da1-2a0d-4780-b03b-db434c4263c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thanks for taking action, Indivisible Team
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54ae29bb-2bb9-4d2e-bbb2-d27c2a1f0e6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cdc3528-5bc1-4fe6-ba19-dd2baa2f5c56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc2f7dce-2820-4385-b88f-dcf4b98c31fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ee7d966-2035-4463-b9a3-cd4189e457b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Rep. Nancy Mace
subject: From high school dropout to Citadel grad.

My parents — a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher — gave me two choices: __**go back to school, or get a job.**__ So I went to work... at a fine-dining establishment some of you may know as Waffle House. Graveyard shift. Sticky floors. And no silver spoons. Just a spatula, grit, and God's grace. That wasn’t my destination — just the beginning. _**25 years ago, I made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel.**_ A campus where we _**SALUTE the flag**_ — we don’t burn it. _**[Now, I’m a single mom, a two-term Congresswoman, and the first Republican woman EVER elected from South Carolina.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/dT96-L7GXkWOX5ZkrYL7hd4Ece4HySFA2zF_Ze_izWvoaw9L3YUENviT-Y_ujte7S1ZEunq3ahCwAmaxBrCAJgBm5KyfEJj_aZWfVP9THbHUzvSVzzyMIB5pSIjWyoCBbq0k5PylFDxJmkwF77-lQy8zW6Z085k2sLxZplJ8fM9IrDQGPGTLQxsZIhhU8rMlFd3JiIT5eLtLthiX4JEtaTF8VJBKuNwDEDVe3_6EoyYpLB9C-dY8nsG-w8BTNIvz2ILhXfNoXnv4mqsz0fCRbu2TlRqWwVxb5-NpvxN_y5cya6a25Aq5RCCM3Jgf1wJcZo_8PseAeTrJ7uvNDCegVhkDg8gpapO-7y92n6KyVAcl4hRyuxvibjmshwIgJkrZW9JqMsnrqIEg0pMfjuwjBWk-FmdMNADdq0SqEJpcOPbbD4PSizTwWupgSxfTv8A75R-x4lL_h7Y2iDhaY5fAUelAOfFuX39ufhJ0FzSMGmvztWegYWw/wO1kARqYb_pLSC08V6sCpjCOI7XoLPC8/8)**_ _I didn’t get here because of connections._ I got here the hard way. And I’ve been FIGHTING ever since: 💥 I stood up to race-baiting CNN anchors on live TV. 💥 I called out trans activists trying to protest me in a women’s restroom.💥 I’ve suffered DEATH THREATS for fighting to keep MEN out of women’s bathrooms. This isn’t about headlines. _**It’s about honoring God, defending freedom, and telling the truth.**_ **[Peter, if you're tired of spineless politicians and fake fighters —](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Acmh4pUWXyg8-ZNBLbwP15JXFwJMbaOia0aS7owVCmqKgFElXjscnS_4V2mJ74BNd05EMoJwy-G-64Wwtq-WdpFvUsy7fedvivQz4FV1rNancCJ1tltWkiJ4tIBePJ6iwIhh4spswj75Ig_UzSBFPCYPM2cRCewWwg86tajTVV6kbGQxPpQuzqdb9Oyr10z7dfZRHR2u-nbKLipt_bqZyKsJRSTE-038CqVuZ2uo5dupQ-LBU7MvJIvtSchJIqHX2rtNyR_yQ5qOamSTd3GXv5SoV_RV5N5ji0f7uwcf3kzALbjxmylk8NGcN0ocwcyyYq2T8l0skL_Rlq-JXns4cF9REdjhL1UFGT7Yt3wofqsSEXRG0QnzCg2M_2Qz8SczIE6M-07s3J679pR1B4-Ccn582h3rAXPgeItmnR2vgUzZ64McsXE3AAsJ19PBByRon-VU4uDifyks7uxmJT4kG9OZbcJRvD16DCge6M6X_AEsNgP9SfE/2-8NAhGUJR3kuDSApGTQzNbQnmkRdndK/8)** **Stand with me.**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join my focus group? -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20101%2E9716520%2E7JfdRm)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20101%2E9716520%2E7JfdRm)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20101%2E9716520%2E7JfdRm)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20101%2E9716520%2E7JfdRm)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250423-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20101%2E9716520%2E7JfdRm)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Jordan Wood is running to flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)
Derek,
Katie Porter here with exciting news: my friend, former Congressional Chief of Staff, and one of my favorite champions for democracy—Jordan Wood—is **running to flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat blue.** More below, but first, can you split a donation between our two campaigns?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250423-wood?refcode=em20250423-39664&refcode2=39664_3422442_8k4L72&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)
Jordan is a born and raised Mainer, father, and husband who has spent his career battling corruption and getting big money out of our politics. Now he’s taking that fight directly to Republican Susan Collins.
**Flipping Maine’s Senate seat is one of Democrats’ top priorities this cycle.** Simply put: If we ever want to regain the Senate majority, this seat is a must win.
Winning against an entrenched incumbent like Republican Susan Collins is going to take serious resources. But Jordan has always believed that we don’t need to take corporate money to win. That’s why just like me, he isn’t taking any money from corporate PACs.
Both Jordan and I are really relying on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaigns. Whether it’s $5 or $50, it all adds up to make a real difference. **[These first few months of both of our campaigns are some of the most important—can you chip in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250423-wood?refcode=em20250423-39664&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39664_3422442_8k4L72&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250423-wood?refcode=em20250423-39664&refcode2=39664_3422442_8k4L72&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)
Thanks for considering,
Katie
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250423-wood?refcode=em20250423-39664&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39664_3422442_8k4L72&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)
_Color-coordinating for democracy!_

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250423-39664&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39664_3422442_8k4L72&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39664&t=4&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39664&t=5&akid=39664%2E3422442%2E8k4L72)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026

body:
You can do something really impactful today.
#

Friends,
In just 24 hours, the NRA is hosting their annual meeting in Atlanta. This is the NRA’s first meeting since Donald Trump took office again, and it’s clear they feel more emboldened than ever.
**Tickets to their VIP banquet are going for as much $16,000. Instead of giving $16,000 to the NRA, you can do something more impactful today:**
[**Can you contribute $16 or more right now to help GIFFORDS PAC defeat the NRA, once and for all?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/61690?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D6BSwb&refcode=em250423-1-b&t=1&akid=10340%2E3935704%2EKUW19C)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/61690?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D6BSwb&refcode=em250423-1-b&t=2&akid=10340%2E3935704%2EKUW19C)**
We all know the NRA’s playbook by now.
They will spend this weekend attacking the work Gabby and our movement has done to make our country safer from gun violence.
They will plan their strategy to undo all the progress we’ve accomplished.
And they will lie, say, and do whatever it takes to sell more guns.
We have done incredible work over the past decade to challenge the gun lobby, but it’s clear the NRA still ranks among the most influential advocacy groups in the country.
The only way we can defeat their influence is by working together. Right here, right now.
[**So before the NRA’s annual meeting begins, will you make a contribution of $16 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today? Lives are on the line, and we cannot afford to stay quiet.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/61690?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D6BSwb&refcode=em250423-1-b&t=3&akid=10340%2E3935704%2EKUW19C)

body:

# [ Grading Trump's First 100 Days](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161973180&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxOTczMTgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MjQzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAxNjMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2NWbuk-2q6-99WbMCpqFajBgmhA0oAEacZCsqoqHnqI)
### What's working, what's unraveling, and what it means for America
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Apr 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161973180&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxOTczMTgwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTQyNDMzNSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4MDE2MzM1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xeCm4TI4ghIdXnZa5GBAnY2M-rzqO44W6QUN18jIJEk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161973180&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxOTczMTgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MjQzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAxNjMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2NWbuk-2q6-99WbMCpqFajBgmhA0oAEacZCsqoqHnqI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161973180&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxOTczMTgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MjQzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAxNjMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2NWbuk-2q6-99WbMCpqFajBgmhA0oAEacZCsqoqHnqI)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF0cmlja211cnBoeXBhL3AvZ3JhZGluZy10cnVtcHMtZmlyc3QtMTAwLWRheXM_.E0fLOUXO7frq7y-Md-iRMCVjgWZgM656vCq69TSn_NQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/grading-trumps-first-100-days?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The first 100 days of any presidency are a moment to separate campaign promises from the governing realities and to understand where we're heading as a country. That's true for every president--and it's especially true for the second term of Donald Trump.
Here's my report card of Trump's first 100 days.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjE5NzMxODAsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MjQzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAxNjMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.gAyyXkiV04uWDvG_LOMYeXM3fxkTe5Id7ACyTc8PKtI?)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60482352-af66-4460-ac03-a732f0809b3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump signing one of many Executive Orders
**Tariffs**
On April 2nd, President Trump declared "Liberation Day," announcing sweeping tariffs on nearly every major U.S. trading partner. The stated goal was simple enough: bring back manufacturing, pressure China, and negotiate better deals. In theory, it was a show of strength. In practice, it set off economic disaster.
In the days that followed, over **$6 trillion** in value was sold off in the stock market. Keep in mind most Americans have their retirement tied to the stock market. And while the administration has pointed to new trade deals supposedly in the works, the immediate effects tell a different story.
Despite the cheering from a few sectors, small business owners, entrepreneurs, and everyday Americans are feeling the most pain.
The price of everything from car parts to groceries will get more expensive (it's like an added tax on top of inflation). While Trump's team claims the long game will pay off, the immediate pain is real--and it's being felt hardest by the very people this policy was supposed to help.
Separately, the price of eggs went from $3.65 in November to $6.23 now in April. So much for campaign promises about lowering prices on day one!
**Grade: D**(which is being optimistic)
**Russia & Ukraine**
If there was any doubt about where Donald Trump stood on the war in Ukraine, the first 100 days have put it to rest.
When Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Washington pleading for continued support to defend his country against Russia's brutal invasion, he wasn't greeted with warmth. He was berated like a child.
The decision to effectively abandon a democratic ally fighting for its survival after after his country was invaded two years ago sends a message far beyond Kyiv. It tells autocrats around the world that American support for freedom and sovereignty is negotiable.
It also tells Vladimir Putin exactly what he wants to hear.
For decades, American leadership across the political aisle stood by nations fighting for freedom. Trump has flipped that script, choosing alignment with authoritarian strongmen over imperfect, but vital allies.
**Grade: F**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/327b2bb5-fff9-4161-a137-0bd537ab7d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Zelensky and President Trump's infamous Oval Office encounter
**Israel, Gaza, and the Hostages**
One of the few silver linings has been President Trump's sustained effort to secure the release of Israeli hostages held by Hamas since their horrific attack on October 7, 2023.
From the moment he returned to office, Trump made the hostages a central priority, and unlike many of his other promises, this one translated into real action.
The pressure he applied mattered. Working in coordination with the outgoing Biden administration, the two sides helped broker a deal that brought [33 hostages](https://substack.com/redirect/1576747b-7d8d-48f0-ba96-d005a448d854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) home. It was a rare and welcome moment of bipartisan cooperation.
If you disregard his social media posts declaring "Shalom, Hamas" or his big talk of wanting to turn Gaza into the next Mediterranean Riviera, something real and meaningful happened: lives were saved.
The ceasefire ended on March 1st, leaving 59 hostages captive in Gaza. Only [24 of which are believed to be alive.](https://substack.com/redirect/0e94383d-5ea5-4b4e-b72d-0bc54e1ce8f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Unclear when new talks will resume.
**Grade: B+**
**Free Speech on College Campuses**
One of the most polarizing issues in President Trump's second term has been his campaign to crack down on elite universities over their handling of pro-Gaza student encampments from 2024. The administration has waged war, threatening to pull billions in federal funding if these schools don't meet its demands.
Antisemitism on college campuses is a real issue. Some of the protests crossed over into harassment, hate speech, and intimidation of Jewish students. That deserves serious reckoning. Jewish students deserve to feel safe, and schools that fail to protect them must be held accountable.
But what's happening now is something else. It's the executive branch turning campus discourse into a political spectacle impeding basic freedoms. It's for these reasons that the [Anti-Defamation League ](https://substack.com/redirect/fc661261-ab16-4ccb-a11b-b7c81523c90b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)walked back its initial support for the measures, citing concerns over free expression and due process.
The threat of deporting international students with objectionable views has raised serious legal and ethical questions.
There's a path forward that balances the need for campus safety with the preservation of civil liberties. But this isn't it.
It's become less about protecting Jewish students and more about boosting political power.
**Grade: D**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/587201f3-ac98-4baf-babb-e8162413ceeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Student protests at Columbia University
**The Pentagon**
Since President Trump appointed Pete Hegseth as Defense Secretary, the Pentagon has been in a whirlwind of scandal.
Under Hegseth's leadership, pages honoring African American and female service members were quietly removed from official Pentagon websites. Military academy libraries reportedly pulled the memoirs of Maya Angelou--while inexplicably leaving _Mein Kampf_ on the shelves. And in the most jaw-dropping episode, senior officials discussed soon to be launched military operations over an unsecured platform, a platform that's previously been breached by Russia, while accidentally adding _The Atlantic 's _editor in chief, Jeffrey Goldberg, and family members.
This isn't just incompetence. It's dangerous and put our F-18 pilots lives in even more danger. It undermines the professionalism and values of our armed forces. If this was done by someone on active duty, they'd be rightfully court martialed and in jail.
NPR reports that Hegseth may soon be replaced as his senior staff have exited the building, this after previously firing the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, the Chief of Naval Operations, the Vice Chief of the Air Force, and the top JAG attorneys leading each military branch. Our troops are resilient and the best in the world, but the damage to America's global reputation and within the ranks may already be done.
**Grade: F**
**DOGE**
One of the first initiatives of Trump's second term was the launch of the Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE. Its mission was bold: cut $2 trillion in government spending and return those savings to the American people through massive tax cuts.
Like many things in this administration, it sounded better on paper.
I'm all for efficient spending of taxpayer dollars - in fact, I helped save tens of billions of taxpayer money while in Congress and the Pentagon - but it's quite clear that DOGE has not come close to fulfilling its promise.
So far, DOGE has claimed $92 billion in cuts, without offering much in the way of evidence. The latest projections suggest that number might eventually reach $150 billion. That's not nothing--but it's a far cry from the promised $2 trillion they promised, less than 5% of their goal.
More damningly, one in three federal works being fired are veterans, and it's more of a case of 'Fire, Ready, Aim' than 'Ready, Arm, Fire.' And the consequences are already being felt. Agencies like the Social Security Administration are understaffed and overwhelmed, with over three hour wait times for seniors trying to call for information on their social security. Social security has been America's best anti-poverty initiative, and now services are lagging. Other departments have seen massive layoffs that left them unable to function effectively.
All in all, it's been a poorly executed program whose (questionable) savings were not worth the cost of a less trusted and weaker government.
**Grade: F**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1d9a05e5-2d41-4b7c-90a1-5c553d20abf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk addressing reporters in the Oval Office
Let's hope the next 100 days are better than the first. I'm praying and hoping for that to be true, but my optimism has been lost due to folks who have a general distaste for public service.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjE5NzMxODAsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MjQzMzUsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAxNjMzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.gAyyXkiV04uWDvG_LOMYeXM3fxkTe5Id7ACyTc8PKtI?)

clean_body: What's working, what's unraveling, and what it means for America | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? What's working, what's unraveling, and what it means for America | | | Apr 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | The first 100 days of any presidency are a moment to separate campaign promises from the governing realities and to understand where we're heading as a country. That's true for every president--and it's especially true for the second term of Donald Trump. Here's my report card of Trump's first 100 days. ? | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump signing one of many Executive Orders Tariffs On April 2nd, President Trump declared "Liberation Day," announcing sweeping tariffs on nearly every major U.S. trading partner. The stated goal was simple enough: bring back manufacturing, pressure China, and negotiate better deals. In theory, it was a show of strength. In practice, it set off economic disaster. In the days that followed, over $6 trillion in value was sold off in the stock market. Keep in mind most Americans have their retirement tied to the stock market. And while the administration has pointed to new trade deals supposedly in the works, the immediate effects tell a different story. Despite the cheering from a few sectors, small business owners, entrepreneurs, and everyday Americans are feeling the most pain. The price of everything from car parts to groceries will get more expensive (it's like an added tax on top of inflation). While Trump's team claims the long game will pay off, the immediate pain is real--and it's being felt hardest by the very people this policy was supposed to help. Separately, the price of eggs went from $3.65 in November to $6.23 now in April. So much for campaign promises about lowering prices on day one! Grade: D(which is being optimistic) Russia & Ukraine If there was any doubt about where Donald Trump stood on the war in Ukraine, the first 100 days have put it to rest. When Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Washington pleading for continued support to defend his country against Russia's brutal invasion, he wasn't greeted with warmth. He was berated like a child. The decision to effectively abandon a democratic ally fighting for its survival after after his country was invaded two years ago sends a message far beyond Kyiv. It tells autocrats around the world that American support for freedom and sovereignty is negotiable. It also tells Vladimir Putin exactly what he wants to hear. For decades, American leadership across the political aisle stood by nations fighting for freedom. Trump has flipped that script, choosing alignment with authoritarian strongmen over imperfect, but vital allies. Grade: F | | ---|---|--- President Zelensky and President Trump's infamous Oval Office encounter Israel, Gaza, and the Hostages One of the few silver linings has been President Trump's sustained effort to secure the release of Israeli hostages held by Hamas since their horrific attack on October 7, 2023. From the moment he returned to office, Trump made the hostages a central priority, and unlike many of his other promises, this one translated into real action. The pressure he applied mattered. Working in coordination with the outgoing Biden administration, the two sides helped broker a deal that brought home. It was a rare and welcome moment of bipartisan cooperation. If you disregard his social media posts declaring "Shalom, Hamas" or his big talk of wanting to turn Gaza into the next Mediterranean Riviera, something real and meaningful happened: lives were saved. The ceasefire ended on March 1st, leaving 59 hostages captive in Gaza. Only Unclear when new talks will resume. Grade: B+ Free Speech on College Campuses One of the most polarizing issues in President Trump's second term has been his campaign to crack down on elite universities over their handling of pro-Gaza student encampments from 2024. The administration has waged war, threatening to pull billions in federal funding if these schools don't meet its demands. Antisemitism on college campuses is a real issue. Some of the protests crossed over into harassment, hate speech, and intimidation of Jewish students. That deserves serious reckoning. Jewish students deserve to feel safe, and schools that fail to protect them must be held accountable. But what's happening now is something else. It's the executive branch turning campus discourse into a political spectacle impeding basic freedoms. It's for these reasons that the back its initial support for the measures, citing concerns over free expression and due process. The threat of deporting international students with objectionable views has raised serious legal and ethical questions. There's a path forward that balances the need for campus safety with the preservation of civil liberties. But this isn't it. It's become less about protecting Jewish students and more about boosting political power. Grade: D | | ---|---|--- Student protests at Columbia University The Pentagon Since President Trump appointed Pete Hegseth as Defense Secretary, the Pentagon has been in a whirlwind of scandal. Under Hegseth's leadership, pages honoring African American and female service members were quietly removed from official Pentagon websites. Military academy libraries reportedly pulled the memoirs of Maya Angelou--while inexplicably leaving Mein Kampf on the shelves. And in the most jaw-dropping episode, senior officials discussed soon to be launched military operations over an unsecured platform, a platform that's previously been breached by Russia, while accidentally adding The Atlantic 's editor in chief, Jeffrey Goldberg, and family members. This isn't just incompetence. It's dangerous and put our F-18 pilots lives in even more danger. It undermines the professionalism and values of our armed forces. If this was done by someone on active duty, they'd be rightfully court martialed and in jail. NPR reports that Hegseth may soon be replaced as his senior staff have exited the building, this after previously firing the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, the Chief of Naval Operations, the Vice Chief of the Air Force, and the top JAG attorneys leading each military branch. Our troops are resilient and the best in the world, but the damage to America's global reputation and within the ranks may already be done. Grade: F DOGE One of the first initiatives of Trump's second term was the launch of the Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE. Its mission was bold: cut $2 trillion in government spending and return those savings to the American people through massive tax cuts. Like many things in this administration, it sounded better on paper. I'm all for efficient spending of taxpayer dollars - in fact, I helped save tens of billions of taxpayer money while in Congress and the Pentagon - but it's quite clear that DOGE has not come close to fulfilling its promise. So far, DOGE has claimed $92 billion in cuts, without offering much in the way of evidence. The latest projections suggest that number might eventually reach $150 billion. That's not nothing--but it's a far cry from the promised $2 trillion they promised, less than 5% of their goal. More damningly, one in three federal works being fired are veterans, and it's more of a case of 'Fire, Ready, Aim' than 'Ready, Arm, Fire.' And the consequences are already being felt. Agencies like the Social Security Administration are understaffed and overwhelmed, with over three hour wait times for seniors trying to call for information on their social security. Social security has been America's best anti-poverty initiative, and now services are lagging. Other departments have seen massive layoffs that left them unable to function effectively. All in all, it's been a poorly executed program whose (questionable) savings were not worth the cost of a less trusted and weaker government. Grade: F | | ---|---|--- Elon Musk addressing reporters in the Oval Office Let's hope the next 100 days are better than the first. I'm praying and hoping for that to be true, but my optimism has been lost due to folks who have a general distaste for public service. -Patrick The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter. Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? \- Honorable Patrick J. Murphy | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Patrick J. Murphy ? ?

name: MTG
subject: A deranged Democrat was charged with Terroristic Threats and Acts at my town hall
body:
Deranged protestors attacked my town hall meeting. The media is twisting the story so I need you to hear it directly from me.

| | | | |
---
Friend,
At my recent town hall in Georgia, I went to fulfill my promise to serve my constituents and listen to them as I represent their interests in Congress.
Unfortunately, deranged leftist protestors immediately sought to turn the event violent.
**This wasn’t just a protest...**
**This was much more deliberate, and much more dangerous.**
****It was so violent that one of the attackers was charged with Terroristic Threats and Acts, a serious felony under Georgia law.****
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_A real image of a leftist fighting the police at my town hall._
They **resisted arrest**.They **assaulted police officers**.And they made it clear: **they came for me**.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_A violent leftist attacking a police officer who asked him to leave the event._
They wanted to send a message to me, and to you, and to everybody else in our movement: _“Back down, or else.”_
The only thing standing between me and real harm was the brave law enforcement officers who stepped in... **And thank God they did.**
But here’s the hard truth: _Those officers aren’t with me 24/7._
I’ve had sitting Members of Congress go on CNN and call for “actual weapons” to be used against me. I routinely get death threats sent to my home, my office, and to my family.
In fact, I receive the most death threats of anyone in Congress.
**I know how it feels to carry on with a smile while knowing there are people who would celebrate if I didn’t make it home.**
The threats don’t stop when these events end. They don’t stop when the cameras turn off. They don’t stop when I go home.
**I face these threats every single day a****nd the more I speak the truth, the more the radical Left tries to shut me down.**
It’s becoming clearer than ever that I need to step up my security detail until things calm down, but as a rank and file Member of Congress I have to pay for that with campaign funds or out of pocket. _And after this has happened so many times I don’t know how much longer I’ll be able to keep funding it on my own._
**_[That’s why I need your help to boost my security detail – not out of fear, but out of necessity](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I don’t say that lightly and I don’t ask for help casually.
[DEFEND MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
When I walk to my car, when I lay down at night, I know the threats don’t clock out just because the cameras do.
That night I had law enforcement between me and the people who came to shut me down but the police aren’t always there – and the people that sent those agitators to wage violence know that.
I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t very, very real. If you’re able to help, I hope you know how much it means to me and to this movement.
_With strength and gratitude,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an8E/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/an7A/?__vbtrk=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg2Njg3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=286687&trkid=659053327&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sean Feucht
subject: A cyclone destroyed their church, but it could not steal their song.
body:
| | | [](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxckctyokAAAL9mvGnNCwYOHII4iomgIjFysYbhIQqCvBS-fmuT2hz23N2njgwRK0SSSWwgRhWKKYX65GKEikI0qIWJAhOWUCGJDJWEqVKFiSpJNMkMDLECKSZIhSrVZ6GmJ5BgokWQKihJAIV53HbNs6ybS1bNZDnJjUvbVoC8AcwB5nl2vzWz_ySAeQMwlwBzu1-kGbyeMEXvvKtu2maZHZyTXFndsHSYZVZyu596z_lwXIciTbdH5-xVzQ15mGNbLK5j2frOYbc4msulOY7-4Yvfu3O8t4rFw1Q6vZ6365Ur00AmXli768Bhu_N1cS5WYx_3Snd8n9rnCDn-JknmbNypj7Wm8btyL95yz9P9nPRDULyrZim3gdOMzKWm2_r1OC3KXf-A3LezWi3DJdrDO7Km7DPenpJyxe1n8YK5FbjD5gK3F8bg856-Npp9zPrg8znfpuO5f0a11r02QfDm7V8EX33LMfN5PR0PfDMdHvacnFaHxjuZrtO6t6LEg1gupmN9cr-iD9ca3E3qo9UOYP5yfZqVzK4_Rq8LMo_3n-bp0gajOO6X--8X2qSIWxGJVhiAmQDjIm4akcZ2BDD-Poa1KIaRkDIicUgp0TUECQk1RU9kiEjI_op4DjBu46LKRfvbIkYRYrr-Q6u6vMay_QexynT6Q6QoKpGl99-OEIQIgoBZk9qIqmeW51mjMkBhWogsn8mymPQG_hMAAP__Q5Pc5w)

| | Dear Peter,
---
**Tarps, string, rough-cut lumber** **—** not the elaborate trappings of the modern American church. But in a tiny town in Mozambique, still reeling from a devastating cyclone, the Holy Spirit filled that humble space and turned tarps and string into a picture of heaven on earth. A cyclone destroyed their church building, but it couldn’t steal their song. **Watch the worship below and be encouraged — where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is FREEDOM, church building or not!**
---
| | [](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxc0c92sjgcxvGrwZ2e8EsgyYIFLzZWRWvxX3XjCQEEJYIEoXr1c2Z6pot3_Xm-qyfxZOpghQepZ1PiECAE8UHuKScjjGSAMkkzjhFDUoFrK6YcFbskHRQeIHAQAWy7yCV8FDOeIQyYJYg4dpZZBJVp-zB91Zi8qEeqGpRe3ra1hX0LhAWiLG5XM_prZIEwFghlgRBFtUaxUwiIWNvvmV5uGWydeBqO8Xo5fJS3_fM9cz8fq_lyvvpq87F5i_Uuz7sPehj6h-70TMX9tDFxswtEjuWOPA99GcJ4Ffk8bvwF_w4OwX1f4GvG5-xyum3tCY03p3sbTPT-Sur-pRftn_W9PtLXepPVl-ioQ7gmixWpXcSnzmtiMibdcGtv4s_v_muW1ceSie_hQZsMaL27T_x3xQJD1oEJ9Wl6al7yxsr47O5nyZezRXI_H0fNmcsldiK6PCSLsJvDXG2fWgTsOpkJfAWkqyrt5HF87JrJSou6eLwWuzCR3SrK6RwI76eXhW-WkR_7vtwYWXSz6P7mDHsLxGpfvzPgSlyGFaT8c1r0YT2jTXdV5cf0gCwQbKDTViaylZ5F_1gAOjVGntNpYgH89xiwJEWJVCrBaUwI5sxGGMfM4ZmKbRzTf4cQWABtqutStr-tTYltU85_tG6qS6ra_xFcysmPKKlrWZxvvx3Gto1tZNHxoPGSui_KsjAutQg6a1mUI1XpQefBPwEAAP__PQbbaA)
---
| | The continent of Africa and the African people are often overlooked by the media and forgotten by the rest of the world — but they are **beloved in the kingdom of God**. The Lord is at work, and the Holy Spirit is stirring the hearts of Africans. Spending Holy Week in South Africa and Mozambique stirred my faith. My hope and prayer is that the videos, social media posts, and emails we’ve shared have encouraged you — and reminded you to pray for the forgotten people, because **they are not forgotten in the rolls of heaven**.
---
[ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxckctyokAARb8Gd1r94tELFqAiigooRuPGarqbhzRCADXx66cyqcli1ueczb3CZlLHHI-kDU2iE0QIoKPCNqiQhFmcE45MDigUBANuCZoxnRoEjkobAaQDgjA0gEHoJLVoBjDClgBEh1mmEaDkcO-fTdcXZTvhzUjZxTC0GnY05GnIU-Wt6if_SRryeg15XEOeZ7I5oBdBePxy9GG5i-INOcFAqMJL8vm4mh2S0h3K7A4jWoJ-vKfWlSVuMzvud0nokpxA2l6eb94Drjta7Rfn4d0SaHy_f3kA7xN3tw7Lsb-Avo987rdz4cgq9oXHX4XYyjOPqxqGj3gaTk-3IAPHQvm-I_lheyebfBmPlXiqw7TZ7j4adX0o6zZvyEbyxWmJvHPcfL4od6mT9Y8wPryiqvMlfSjnveuC88ufrUTUeHKxqG89WLs6T2d6vWr74qvqtmnw4vODW8FBUOsIndPcuB0JTlZXGnbhPDpGweXyvvGj2CzyRD99bN7qdJYE91mzzoN4etq4fMmfZ_69tZUHUdXtP57XO_5c78Nmu4hXIjEGp1t0wSP-Vka1HJhgA7M109UQqmXfs1wuhYbQ38eQJSQQjHOBZUoIphYEGKeWTjOeQpya3yKaaggNsm4VG35baBIITUp_aNs1V8mHfxAZJiU_hLO6ZWV---0whhBDoJmzUWeL9lkqVfaGqRGQ16xUE97Uo4eN_gQAAP__k1Xalw)

Sean

subject: Stop Trump from defunding our public broadcasting >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106363466/541277848/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.23_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmMGI2YS01ZTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNomoZ5xJYY9pvUrMfJmASCMfkC6Lh2tOlWxAUUBcQc=&emci=bdf1ba41-b61f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0dff0b6a-5e20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) **🔴 Alert from The Hill: Trump plans order to cut funding for NPR and PBS**

name: John Goodman For Illinois
subject: We FINALLY Ditched Durbin!
body:
Now let's put a Real Republican in the seat!

| | | | | [](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=f11f31b138&e=94c8429215)
---
| | | | | **Hello Friends!**

We did it. We have **FINALLY DITCHED DURBIN**!But we can not celebrate yet. We all know the Democrat Machine here in Illinois is going to put in someone more progessive and woke then Dick Durbin was to be his successor. And we can’t let that happen!Illinois deserves **strong, principled leadership** —someone who isn’t afraid to stand up for what’s right. Someone who is going to fight for Social Security, Real Education, American Jobs, and the Economy. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. **I’m here to win, but, I need serious support from people who care about this country as much as I do.**
This race isn’t just about Illinois; it’s about the future of America. The radical left has deep pockets, and they will stop at nothing to keep Illinois under their control. **We need to fight back—and that starts with building the war chest we need to win.**
I’m asking you to join me as a [**founding donor**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=c97d59cf0e&e=94c8429215) of this campaign. Your leadership and investment today will ensure we have the resources to take on the democratic machine and bring real change to Illinois.
**Can I count on you to step up with**[**$25**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=466dafb194&e=94c8429215)**,**[**$50**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=a39ca49922&e=94c8429215)**, or**[**$100 DONATION**](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=a35fecbac5&e=94c8429215)**?** ⬇️
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Click Here to Show Your Support For John Goodman!](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=85bde04835&e=94c8429215)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | With your help, we will build a movement strong enough to **restore safety to our communities, defend our freedoms, and secure a brighter future for the next generation.**
Illinois can lead the way in taking our country back. But it starts with you. **Make a statement today with a maximum or high-impact donation, and let’s win this together.**_We the People deserve better.

_ With your support, we can win this race—for our children, for Illinois, and for America.God Bless,John GoodmanRepublican Candidate for US Senate serving Illinois
P.S. - I ask that you share my emails with all your friends, and follow my socials. Every Precinct Committeeman, Volunteer and Voter is a vital part of my campaign. This campaign is not just about me, it’s about each of you and how we can fix Illinois. Please consider [Volunteering](https://goodmanforillinois.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0c6fe2abbb0109c63a8cab52c&id=7cd65eed60&e=94c8429215) for my campaign today, as well.
---
|
---

---

name: Eric Sorensen HQ
subject: Pete Hegseth should be fired
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106365097/541283025/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFhZjkxMi02MjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCGiPp3-Ttk91gcuujatBoRvMMTWtNKTIIFsXMutFN8=)
Peter, Again? A group chat leak on national security, again?!? **Let’s start with the obvious: Pete Hegseth should be fired.** Hegseth has now repeatedly used unsecured Signal chats to discuss classified military operations – and those chats could be accessed by anyone, including bad actors hoping to hurt our military at any time. Eric is a proud member of the House Armed Services Committee, representing thousands of military personnel in our district, and he has called for Hegseth to be fired. It’s deeply offensive to us that such stupidity is leading our armed forces, and putting our active military at significant risk. But we have a president so weak, he and House Republicans overlook all the gaffes, and cheerlead on as their “trusted” secretary shows time and again that he can’t be trusted. Our men and women in service can’t afford that risk. [**The urgency of electing advocates for our military has never been more clear. Help us start the hard work now to take back the House majority and ensure accountability over Trump’s cabinet.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106365098/541283028/-1812448514?refcode=em-4.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFhZjkxMi02MjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCGiPp3-Ttk91gcuujatBoRvMMTWtNKTIIFsXMutFN8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106365099/541283030/-1812448514?refcode=em-4.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODFhZjkxMi02MjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCGiPp3-Ttk91gcuujatBoRvMMTWtNKTIIFsXMutFN8=)

Hegseth has now repeatedly used unsecured Signal chats to discuss classified military operations – and those chats could be accessed by anyone, including bad actors hoping to hurt our military at any time. Eric is a proud member of the House Armed Services Committee, representing thousands of military personnel in our district, and he has called for Hegseth to be fired. It’s deeply offensive to us that such stupidity is leading our armed forces, and putting our active military at significant risk. And second, it will call to DEPORT all foreign-born terrorist supporters on campus and revoke their student visas.President Trump and his Administration made a promise:

These animals murdered, raped, and tortured over 1,400 Israeli citizens on October 7th.And right now the radical Left is putting their full support behind student visa holders who think these terrorists are “heroes” and “martyrs.”The solution is simple. If you wrote down on your student visa application that you were going to support Hamas or engage in violent riots at your school, your application wouldn’t be accepted.So when these student visa holders LIE to the U.S. Government to get into our country then betray our values and put Americans at risk......we should kick them out!No questions. No debates.If you are here on a visa to go to school, teach, or work at a university... and you support Hamas terrorists...YOU ARE GONE!It’s simple.And it’s NOT controversial. President Trump just took an incredible first step by sending ICE to arrest Mahmoud Khalil – the leader of the Columbia University group who burnt campus buildings to a crisp and called for genocide of their Jewish classmates.But there is so much more to be done. **[That’s why your BANKRUPT AND DEPORT HAMAS TERRORIST SUPPORTERS Petitions also demand we go after the woke universities who are enabling and shielding these terrorist supporters.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75410677d6994c9ea1c172b0013352c8&_e=DJa4k3TLfvwJK5NnX81ewSyZKV6Lk4n2kApEYk3xD03r5d9XG7s_nxvObFJzU-Fn1JyqOPNd7tmBo7s5dJOJsED9Q3BxuCZaunLgtiaOM9xtIAr0m4cuGJ3rfLixsIN39371907rreiQZclisoU-gF3czWDlE0kxy26wTo6WRfBnkP5LxYDDP55J2MSE8pykQ1ER5n3qHT49Nlvto_KUmRj08pngsDQ6jBCgh2Dm6N6uTBD1mOx1oqn2zqdYXUEhXWU7lKHiwZTtqSvzTonsPzZidTr4Mccmm0SJH0F03KPGQZLecZy21H21m1exG-qoQ0LT1EYRBzKoSMED-qpQBtTZSFxl8fh3MjFoELVX_mraOF91jsRaYUUxqsuJDQPVCb0Jhbyr1EoCkmFkRRePiWnXlUCKw1sdBZQO3pvZm4s%3D)** Take Columbia University, for example. They currently hold over **$5 billion** in federal grants. And over **30%** of their students are international. So not only are you – the American taxpayer – subsidizing the pro-terrorist indoctrination of American young adults... **but you’re also paying for _foreigners_ to hate America, too!** That’s why one of your petitions is addressed to your state’s Department of Education Superintendent. They must immediately stop all public funding, cancel grants, and revoke tax-exempt status of any university in your state that teaches its students to support terrorists or enables violence.This has been bubbling under the surface for years in our colleges, but now we have ripped the veil off. I will send the first to President Donald Trump and his Administration to encourage them to keep up the fight.And I will send the second to your state’s Department of Education Superintendent. They control the purse strings and can defund the terrorist-supporting universities in your state. I will collect these Petitions and deploy them as fast as possible. We don’t have a moment to waste, every day our students are being taught to hate America and support terrorism.**[**So please, sign your BANKRUPT AND DEPORT HAMAS TERRORIST SUPPORTERS Petition right away.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=75410677d6994c9ea1c172b0013352c8&_e=DJa4k3TLfvwJK5NnX81ewSyZKV6Lk4n2kApEYk3xD03r5d9XG7s_nxvObFJzU-Fn1JyqOPNd7tmBo7s5dJOJsED9Q3BxuCZaunLgtiaOM9xtIAr0m4cuGJ3rfLixsIN39371907rreiQZclisoU-gF3czWDlE0kxy26wTo6WRfBnkP5LxYDDP55J2MSE8pykQ1ER5n3qHT49Nlvto_KUmRj08pngsDQ6jBCgh2Dm6N6uTBD1mOx1oqn2zqdYXUEhXWU7lKHiwZTtqSvzTonsPyXZ6VFOGJ87kJUS0Hqq3wvgoa42MeyW6e4tF05BkZ_cbBIDeb0KFrFWWHzm74eu-s9EJGmyxwCur9kB5s7ayqktZhoTo4jDEnctSpLU0JBHRf7cMc8Hvv4llEjSw79aTyFoLyufS5k6M37KNDGxqoE%3D)** And after you sign your Petitions, I’m also asking you to make a one-time, tax-deductible donation of $23.Your $23 gift will allow me to mail, email, process and submit 43 more **BANKRUPT AND DEPORT HAMAS TERRORIST SUPPORTERS** Petitions. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: 🚨 PETITION 🚨 Stop The Cartels
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

“The cartels are waging war on America, and it’s time for America to wage war on the cartels.”

That bold proclamation from President Trump forms the foundation of my work as the leader of the newly-formed Cartel Task Force in the House of Representatives.

Every day in Washington, in Texas, and where duty calls nationwide, I am working shoulder to shoulder with President Trump to defeat the Mexican narco-terrorists who have flooded America with deadly illegal drugs, violent criminals, and human traffickers.

[Can we count on your support in this righteous fight?](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[Please add your name to my official STOP THE CARTELS PETITION, which my staff prepared in hopes of getting enough support from patriots like you to force Congress to take decisive action.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[STOP THE CARTEL'S PETITION](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)
[Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)
[Poll ID #: 7391-455](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)
[Status: NAME MISSING](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

I know that with incredible grassroots patriots like you at my side, we can put a stop to the cartels who are flooding deadly drugs and violent criminals into our country once and for all.

Right now as I type this, Mexico’s most powerful and ruthless cartels operate in all 50 states, causing the worst drug crisis in U.S. history. In fact, the fentanyl trafficked into our country by the Mexican drug cartels (and their Chinese partners) kills tens of thousands of Americans each year.

These are not low-level lawbreakers Peter, they are organized criminal enterprises that profit off death and addiction.

In order to dismantle them for good, we are working in Congress to give President Trump total authorization to use the "full force of the American military" against the largest migrant criminal groups that have been wreaking havoc on American cities.

[STOP THE CARTELS PETITION >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

>From trafficking illicit drugs and illegal aliens into our country and often turning the Mexican side of the border into a war zone, the threat cartel organizations pose is a national security NIGHTMARE.

The bottom line is that these cartels and other transnational criminal organizations are killing tens of thousands of Americans, and we MUST use every capability we have available to us to combat them.

As you know, I’m already fighting every day in DC to secure our country and combat the terrorists running the cartels.

And now, we are working to authorize the use of military force against cartels to empower the U.S. military to operate against cartels in coordination with Mexico.

If you AGREE with me that Congress must give our President the “green light” to take a sledgehammer to these criminal networks and their supply chains, [I urge you to add your name to my STOP THE CARTELS PETITION and join me in demanding action from Congress to address this crisis before there’s any more carnage . . . before even one more American family is hurt.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

In Service,

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/stop-the-cartels-petition/?utm_campaign=202504122&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JSHRB3YCY9N1RQ0DKVVSGY64&r=01JSHRDHG4HSCRMPEC774XPNC5).
Team Crenshaw 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007

I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander. I learned the value of hard work by watching my parents – who owned their own landscaping business – build things. Heavy machinery equipment, bobcats, plows, dirt, grease, and grime – it was all part of my childhood.
Later in life, I got the call to give back to the state I love during a time of great uncertainty: the Great Recession. **I can’t tell you how unfathomable it was to hear the words “bankruptcy” and “General Motors” in the same sentence.** So I stepped up to do my part and served as chief of staff for the Auto Rescue initiative under President Obama.
We brought workers, corporations, and union leadership around the same table to stabilize the auto industry. On Friday nights, I’d stay in the office until the late evening and return every call from every Michigander who called our office worried about the future. _In the end, we saved 200,000 Michigan jobs. _
I can’t help but see parallels between then and now as we find ourselves in another moment of great uncertainty, thanks to the chaos forced on us by Donald Trump and his billionaire buddy Elon Musk.
People are rightly concerned about rising costs, shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and attacks on our personal freedoms. **Michiganders need a fighter in their corner – and that’s who I’ve been my entire life. **

Hey team,
Trump has spent his first 100 days in office pandering to Big Oil at the expense of our health, climate, and wallets. We’re going to show you how to fight back.
[Join us and our friends at Climate Action Campaign TOMORROW at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT for our Climate Impacts National Call.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106367093/541290663/1687535965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzg2OThmMi02NTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcpNwzkBN_ZZK2L_DqnGmezSo750jSf17TyDZ_iFgSs=&emci=3c704255-d21b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fc8698f2-6520-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

### Help Larry Quintal Win! Join Us for a Sunday Door Knock in Taunton 🇺🇸
---
---
| Friend,
This Sunday, we're hitting the pavement for a true conservative fighter--Larry Quintal, our Republican nominee in the Third Bristol District special election!
📍 Meet-Up Location: 80 Broadway, Taunton 🗓️ Date: Sunday, April 27 ⏰ Time: 11:00 AM
Larry is a longtime community leader, small business owner, and staunch advocate for taxpayers. He's running to bring common sense back to Beacon Hill--and he needs your help to get across the finish line.
Every door we knock brings us closer to flipping this seat red and sending a message to the Beacon Hill insiders: the people are taking their voice back.
Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or new to canvassing, your support makes a huge difference. We'll provide all the materials and training you need--just bring your walking shoes and Republican spirit!
Let's rally behind Larry and show the Second Bristol District what strong GOP leadership looks like.
See you on the trail, MassGOP Field Team
---
---

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Peter, First, I want to thank you for helping to pave the way for my father’s return to the White House. Your support for our House Majority has a direct impact on my father’s agenda. I can’t tell you how important it is that we have brave Americans like you who are willing to go the extra mile to ensure my father has every opportunity to save our country. Thank you! In just his first months in office, President Trump has already demonstrated the brute strength and power of our America First agenda. subject: “A working-class candidate who understands struggle”
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106367934/541293953/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I1Mzk4Mi02ODIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPDiMG8Vl7kcdR6u8gcbRh8EAEq5C1Sjxdj-zmDMbpQ=&emci=52b01d7c-6820-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=43b53982-6820-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Hi Peter, _The Guardian_ just published a national profile of Rebecca — and it makes one thing clear: she’s the real deal, and this campaign has momentum. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106367935/541293954/-2087246159?refcode=em-4.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I1Mzk4Mi02ODIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPDiMG8Vl7kcdR6u8gcbRh8EAEq5C1Sjxdj-zmDMbpQ=) | _“She describes herself as a ‘working-class candidate’ who ‘understands struggle,’ and says she supports legislation that would help reduce costs for families in areas such as childcare and healthcare.”_
---
That’s why Rebecca is running again – and this time, she’s even better positioned to flip WI-03. **Cook Political Report just rated this race a toss-up.**
Rebecca’s campaign is rooted in lived experience. She’s waitressed since she was a teenager, grew up on a dairy farm, and has built her life around service. That kind of perspective doesn’t just win headlines – it wins elections.
**But we’re already up against massive spending from oligarchs who want to keep the status quo. To keep building the working class future we deserve, we need grassroots support from people like you.**
[**If you’re able, please chip in $3 or whatever you can to be part of the momentum and help us flip this seat:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106367936/541293955/-2087246159?refcode=em-4.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I1Mzk4Mi02ODIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BPDiMG8Vl7kcdR6u8gcbRh8EAEq5C1Sjxdj-zmDMbpQ=)

Issuing an executive order that dangerously oversteps presidential power, falsely claiming voter fraud in 2020, and demanding sweeping changes to how states run elections – what Trump is doing is unconstitutional, undemocratic, and, frankly, un-American.
And that's not all:
* **He’s pushing the SAVE Act** , a voter suppression bill that would disenfranchise millions – especially women who changed their last names after marriage.

* **He’s gutted cybersecurity protections** at the agency responsible for securing our elections.

* **And he’s retaliating against officials** who dare to speak the truth about the 2020 election.

We are a democracy – not a dictatorship – and this is an authoritarian power grab. I will not stand by while Trump prioritizes his own quest for unchecked power above the rights and will of the people.
**But I can’t do this alone. I’m asking for your support right now to defend voting rights, protect free and fair elections, and fight back against Trump’s abuse of power.[Will you chip in today to help me protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106368362/541295414/-1997846894?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1886-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZmOWQ1MC02OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hdO96fEy8ox5ALRhC4ern3oULuqwY1kUGnQLhsMAJok=)**

James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, we’re only asking for $1. $1 to help us unseat the MAGA Republicans that have broken their promise to lower prices for everyday Americans. $1 to hold Donald Trump and Elon Musk accountable for gutting the federal workforce, fighting to eliminate Social Security, and giving tax breaks to billionaires. $1 to help common-sense Democrats FLIP the House so we can be on track towards an agenda that empowers working families. name: Kyle Sweetser
subject: the American Dream can be a reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b9c3b63-014d-44cd-a278-befe26d93be0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11796e6f-c664-46b4-af97-bdb5d88da927/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, My name is Kyle Sweetser, and I’m running for the United States Senate. America was founded on freedom. But today, too many people work 40+ hours a week and barely make enough for rent. They’re not free, and if they live in Alabama, they have a senator who doesn’t even live in the same state. We deserve better. I’m running to replace Tommy Tuberville, a senator who blocked over 400 military promotions and has been called the most uninformed, least effective member of Congress. He’s a national embarrassment, and Alabama deserves better. We need honest, everyday working people in Washington. We need real representatives, not party pawns. Honest people who welcome accountability and transparency. That’s how we save the American Dream. [Peter, this is a fight we can win, but only if we work together. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddc51f8d-11e2-4baa-8044-17ee897464bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e6853a3-526f-459f-b0e5-d3971d63f625/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90faa490-409f-4cdb-8b03-189b9a25de54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28b8b676-991c-4f57-a6df-450befeea261/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | If you work hard, you should be able to own a home and raise a family. Yet, too many Americans are feeling economic anxiety and fear. Costs continue to rise, and wages don’t keep up, while big corporations make record profits and scheme to become monopolies. I understand this more than most. My mother grew up in public housing and relied on veterans’ benefits, Social Security, and expired food from the nearby prison. My father grew up not knowing where he would get his next meal. He didn’t even know his date of birth until he applied for a driver’s license. They met in high school and got married the summer they turned 18. He installed cable while she worked at Sears, each earning $3 an hour. I'm the youngest of three children raised in Mobile. I attended the United States Military Prep School and went on to play football at West Point until an injury cut my career short. When the 2008 recession hit, I returned home to help keep my parents' business afloat — ultimately guiding it from the Yellow Pages to the Internet, helping build our American Dream. When the Deepwater Horizon rig exploded off the coast of Alabama in 2010, I joined a special task force with the Coast Guard as a civilian small boat captain in rough seas, dragging booms to protect the beaches from incoming oil. That’s where I come from, and I’ve worked every day to honor that legacy. But right now, Alabama is hurting. Grocery prices are up. Wages are stuck. Folks can barely afford to live, while billionaires and big corporations are making more money than ever. That’s why I’m running for Senate. If you can, [split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign today to help us make the American Dream a reality.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b41627f-93d0-4b77-b91b-0315c4c84302/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I hope you’ll join me. We are stronger together. Thank you, Kyle
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f0e2c08-6300-4430-b001-25baec7cc8f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[So here I am, a bit desperate. # [The Collapse of Trust: From Surveillance to Sovereignty](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=161895230&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODk1MjMwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDU0MzE5MDEsImV4cCI6MTc0ODAyMzkwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6xtD-fdovWr0JbLlXWTcDFJBk_lmt-6Z2GPOZagfaIE)
### Trust is the foundation of every thriving society--and its collapse signals the unraveling of everything else. Introducing The Havenseed Chronicles: a visionary fiction series born from that collapse.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=161895230&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODk1MjMwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTQzMTkwMSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4MDIzOTAxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hF5jklXgVFyshacTAi60iKPPqv9_3ISjyDbFoUfZdDA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
