Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Karen Bass
subject: The State of the City address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Karen Bass for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID #1471359)
body:
|
---
Friends, On Monday, I delivered my annual State of the City address. Los Angeles is a world-class city — and Angelenos deserve a City Hall that’s ready to evolve and buck the status quo to solve our greatest challenges. This isn’t the first time we’ve faced adversity, but we’ve met every challenge with collaboration, grit, and a shared purpose of doing what’s right for Angelenos on every street and in every neighborhood throughout the City. Initiatives like my Inside Safe program have reduced homelessness in Los Angeles for the first time in years, and recent crime data shows we’re making our communities safer and stronger. Just last week, I joined Councilmember Traci Park at the Palisades Library to highlight debris removal after January’s wildfires. We’re months ahead of expectations in the recovery process, and we’re not slowing down any time soon. You and I both know that this won’t be the last challenge we take on. But to solve our biggest problems, we must be brave enough to change the status quo, bring new ideas to the table, and work together to keep moving LA forward. **[Watch my State of the City address here, and learn about my plan to make sure we keep delivering for the people of Los Angeles>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106377741/541327662/1603934327?refcode=AU_KRB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTJiYmZhNi04MDIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TesogeUjP7DogJObvE5ks4Ga_j7-qgkJCyuuqpUVzoU=&emci=e3d13db8-d01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=312bbfa6-8020-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2429742)** | [WATCH HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106377742/541327669/1603934327?refcode=AU_KRB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTJiYmZhNi04MDIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TesogeUjP7DogJObvE5ks4Ga_j7-qgkJCyuuqpUVzoU=&emci=e3d13db8-d01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=312bbfa6-8020-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2429742)

The Biden administration failed to monitor hundreds of thousands of
illegal immigrant minors who entered the United States through Mexico
and tens of thousands simply vanished from the government’s radar,
according to a federal audit. Judicial Watch has covered the scandal
extensively and is investigating the Trump administration’s plan to
locate the young migrants, known as Unaccompanied Alien Children
(UAC). A few weeks ago, several media outlets reported that the Trump
administration directed Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to
track down UAC to, among other things, prevent them from being
trafficked or exploited. As the “premier” Homeland Security law
enforcement agency created after 9/11 to safeguard the nation and
preserve national security, ICE is responsible for monitoring the
location and status of all UAC inside the U.S. but somehow the agency
lost track of around half a million.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73542&L=35042&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWNlLXBsYW4taWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cb1f9132d6c963c1a566bfc2d3f8651fdc1506ebcf8f2d58de16b0c184ae401c]

clean_body: The Biden administration failed to monitor hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrant minors who entered the United States through Mexico and tens of thousands simply vanished from the government’s radar, according to a federal audit. [alttext] [*****] April 23, 2025 [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch"_ - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [article-image] [] The Biden administration failed to monitor hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrant minors who entered the United States through Mexico and tens of thousands simply vanished from the government’s radar, according to a federal audit. Judicial Watch has covered the scandal extensively and is investigating the Trump administration’s plan to locate the young migrants, known as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). A few weeks ago, several media outlets reported that the Trump administration directed Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to track down UAC to, among other things, prevent them from being trafficked or exploited. As the “premier” Homeland Security law enforcement agency created after 9/11 to safeguard the nation and preserve national security, ICE is responsible for monitoring the location and status of all UAC inside the U.S. but somehow the agency lost track of around half a million. * **$880 billion cut from Medicaid**
* **$230 billion cut from food aid**
* **$7 trillion in tax cuts for billionaires like Elon Musk**

**It couldn’t be more clear: House Republicans are catering to their billionaire donors.** Emilia knows the Republican budget will raise health insurance costs, eliminate critical food programs, and leave the middle class behind. **That’s why she’s fighting back.** **[Emilia stands with the working families that call Northeast Ohio home – and she wants to know if you will stand with her. Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[clashed with an ABC News host](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba84b7-9739-47f0-9392-782d1a105690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia to El Salvador, during a tense live interview.
"Tattoos are one of many factors we look at, it's not the only factor!!" Homan snapped, annoyed by the woke reporter.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba84b7-9739-47f0-9392-782d1a105690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba84b7-9739-47f0-9392-782d1a105690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The ABC host pressed Homan about an apparent lack of "due process" in Abrego Garcia's deportation case. "Do you have any qualms about sending people to that notorious prison in El Salvador with no assurance that they will ever have a chance to get out, people that have no record and have not been convicted of any violent crimes?" the reporter asked.
**["I believe in removing public safety threats and terrorists!"](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba84b7-9739-47f0-9392-782d1a105690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Homan fired back. "If people wore my shoes for the last 40 years, and seen the tragedies I've seen, they would understand that the worst of the worst need to be sent to a prison like that!"
The host pushed back again, "And you're saying there are no mistakes?! That everybody sent o this prison, with no guarantee of any right to challenge their imprisonment, and none of these people, as you've acknowledged, have gone through a full trial!"
"You need to read the Alien Enemies Act!" Homan said. "You're talking like it's a Title 8 removal, its not, it's a different procedure!"
"They have no chance to prove their innocents!" the report repeated. "Somebody has a bad tattoo,... I mean you acknowledge tattoos are part fo the equation here!"
Homan snapped, frustrated by being asked the same question again and again, "That's one of many factors!"
Watch the heated brawl here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7eba84b7-9739-47f0-9392-782d1a105690?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _**Resurfaced:**_**Tucker Carlson DEFEATS his worst enemy in Fox News screaming match**
Watch Tucker Carlson **[go scorched earth on"Creepy P0rn Lawyer" Michael Avenatti](https://substack.com/redirect/4cfced35-9ae7-4891-9b58-019cc398b642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before he was convicted of fraud and sent to prison for 19 years.

# FROM THE DESK OF **CONRAD BLACK**
---
| | Dear Friend,You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western world.We published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph, Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the leading newspapers in Canada and Australia. I am proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.Too many journalists are not only failing to live up to public expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the public on behalf of the powers they favor.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now ->](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuejfjIteknop5I9ITm9umluka&s=ELMHBKBAGCBPJOEM)
---
| | The New York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic newspaper that places principle over politics and people over party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it. It maintains the highest professional standards without being pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong. The Sun is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle dissent.The only one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort. Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore American journalism, we will be unstoppable.Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up now. Every single person counts.
---
| | [ Join the Sun Now ->](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuejfjIteknop5IaITm9umluka&s=ELMHBKBAGCBPJOEM)
---
| | Please join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.This is a newspaper that our country desperately needs.
---
| | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuejfjIteknop5IbITm9umluka&s=ELMHBKBAGCBPJOEM)
---
|

| | **Conrad Black
** Columnist, The New York Sun

name: John James
subject: The Woke Lie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI
body:
| | | Patriot, Democrats say you can’t be conservative and Black. _I’m living proof that’s a lie._ My name is John James — I’m a combat veteran, a father, a husband, and a Christian. I flew Apache helicopters in Iraq. I built a business that created good-paying jobs in my home state. The radical Left doesn’t want people like me to exist — **because we shatter their narratives**. Those in the Marxist Left claim to stand for “diversity.” They don’t. The moment a Black man speaks out for faith, freedom, and personal responsibility — **they****smear****,****silence****, and****viciously attack****.** I know that firsthand. **_That’s what I’m facing right now. _** I’m not backing down because I know how important it is to STAND UP against the woke racist garbage that has infected the Democrat Party.
---
[ **JOIN MY MISSION** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a6b6f510b0844937a34fefc37273cdcc&_e=8fRHWAFe51CQk6fq45rxMMme7bc3DkRgmieudE_tdxqBm6wjbHT56Ue-YmdbdhFBTz1sa82EW0HudovRa8QedoctAB82miCpmMQ6T9qAh5_Y3ZlWGg639fFytVe6xIdiLpSQwSpanCOr-M_bfApktTexulWBtgShoao-r67HsstZ3wE60K8T5vzEueC7Nc4xs1bZD6uoZ4O2zbdpAlkHqrB4ZH8Hapua-ANQj72McMBOb1p-LFBkGEtySmOCvo8eo1T9r_ZhhMsmo5845mYa61T5JcESRjIDpCfTl7bucRxrIN84VeVamvRojfk06LO-4uBa_WCed17jjiX0jZRSRiWOiXLdogc_VR0yy0-0_RrU5-qYCmkx3ib8icPt__vA-3W1fskMhepErEA9GBn5YQ%3D%3D)

**I’m fighting for an America where you can:**
* Think freely, no matter your background.
* Raise a family with faith.
* Build a business - and a life - without government interference.

I’m fighting FOR a Michigan — and an America — where **_everyone_** can succeed. That’s why I’m under attack by the Democrat Establishment, and why I need your support to make this mission a reality. **[**Will you join me?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a6b6f510b0844937a34fefc37273cdcc&_e=8fRHWAFe51CQk6fq45rxMMme7bc3DkRgmieudE_tdxqBm6wjbHT56Ue-YmdbdhFBTz1sa82EW0HudovRa8QedoctAB82miCpmMQ6T9qAh5_Y3ZlWGg639fFytVe6xIdiLpSQwSpanCOr-M_bfApktTexulWBtgShoao-r67HsstZ3wE60K8T5vzEueC7Nc4xs1bZD6uoZ4O2zbdpAlkHqrB4ZH8Hapua-ANQj72McMBOb1p-LFBkGEtySmOCvo8eQ04goaB20F7QOfGY5dNyH-iPGjpLp9kK5TgYAfJnVOuHprkr1kngRs4Dv8AbcEKMwfCgATg5XfUXKxbfvq_qMmdLru7A_s6r4DN2Sz2MzGnjCgBYNRohxI-N2Y2FSwdK0QG8UT3uTNR0MijvF2IhYw%3D%3D)**

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: The Left is cashing in — and we’re falling behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Left’s early fundraising lead could cost us the Senate if we don’t act fast. | Peter -- The latest FEC reports are _in_ -- and what we're seeing is downright alarming.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15a1a38efb2843ed92400463ec5ad955&_e=HZG0EbjPwaecgdPE9VDsgNnp1ndw0iyRLPo6X49frutJXJ_Bjc3ktXbwTRScq4WZMFRXUdb9ihXSq2XjieH9g0KHwEk1HrYGW68OMqit3pcBuQAP_yTQMOJdmqGVki6juark_xMpGMvwUJRKqZS-1Y67wvAHRvnM9DUUsxTnhDQck_hyl1q_dXIh3GSct9uI33t0iCwG8tphBUq7Hi-zLX17R9mqooYb7mirl5i69RwVBlSvAF3LJqybW6amftYdNyUvACK8GaLRerMSDwm8x-f3UFMtIUxfL8k117jrnICMPMoNkRcnCc3YuNOVueUsz1rtGrBnK7i9d2zoJh1wANZmk-0-NrsG6VCvg24UaKMAuCNhuYFlnJCihnBMN5L_lqK0712FuVBzIWO_Pnd7p9Theft1ipV8oGjBaWhxKMg6pzBR9cf6RZE_cdBtF6bnM5lTBwlFy8oGvaTJyg476o1IzqmgSK9J0t4rGRRy6Te53R2mgFCWpFTbuTymFn4z)
Democrats have posted MASSIVE fundraising hauls in critical Senate battlegrounds like Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. Even in places with NO incumbents and NO clear frontrunners, their candidates are pulling in **seven figures.**

Meanwhile, some key Republican incumbents are being outraised or stuck waiting while Democrat war chests grow.

**Let me be crystal clear:** we cannot afford to fall behind this early.

If we allow Democrats to dominate the fundraising race now, they’ll define the narrative, flood the airwaves, and buy their way back into the Senate majority.

_What will they do with that power?_

**➤ Reopen the borders
➤ Pack the Supreme Court with woke activist judges
➤ Raise your taxes to bankroll socialist welfare schemes and illegal immigrant handouts.**

We are launching an emergency blitz to close the gap and fight back. Our goal is to raise $500,000 in grassroots donations in the next 72 hours.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help Republicans protect and expand our Senate majority in 2026?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=15a1a38efb2843ed92400463ec5ad955&_e=HZG0EbjPwaecgdPE9VDsgNnp1ndw0iyRLPo6X49frutJXJ_Bjc3ktXbwTRScq4WZMFRXUdb9ihXSq2XjieH9g0KHwEk1HrYGW68OMqit3pcBuQAP_yTQMOJdmqGVki6juark_xMpGMvwUJRKqZS-1Y67wvAHRvnM9DUUsxTnhDQck_hyl1q_dXIh3GSct9uI33t0iCwG8tphBUq7Hi-zLX17R9mqooYb7mirl5i69RwVBlSvAF3LJqybW6amftYdNyUvACK8GaLRerMSDwm8x-f3UFMtIUxfL8k117jrnICMPMoNkRcnCc3YuNOVueUsz1rtGrBnK7i9d2zoJh1wANZmk-0-NrsG6VCvg24UaKMBFjwY91mAi1yY_rA1lU5hHsZO90RPRaEWBl-ur6fPe86_L9y9qiCjV2fMoGtV3TxqoQprqhxlpkKNSgYeHHONmPJgH7CQ9hNqUIlCGQ5xLKL0sKzKCoMh7kdPtIKXKmO8dM4u9fu_cqNEzbyewucA)

We are in the fight of our lives, and the future of President Trump's America First agenda depends on keeping the Senate RED.

The Dems are sprinting out of the gate.

_Let's remind them this is still OUR country._

clean_body: The Left’s early fundraising lead could cost us the Senate if we don’t act fast. | Peter -- The latest FEC reports are in -- and what we're seeing is downright alarming. Democrats have posted MASSIVE fundraising hauls in critical Senate battlegrounds like Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. Even in places with NO incumbents and NO clear frontrunners, their candidates are pulling in seven figures. Meanwhile, some key Republican incumbents are being outraised or stuck waiting while Democrat war chests grow. Let me be crystal clear: we cannot afford to fall behind this early. If we allow Democrats to dominate the fundraising race now, they’ll define the narrative, flood the airwaves, and buy their way back into the Senate majority. What will they do with that power? ➤ Reopen the borders ➤ Pack the Supreme Court with woke activist judges ➤ Raise your taxes to bankroll socialist welfare schemes and illegal immigrant handouts. We are launching an emergency blitz to close the gap and fight back. Our goal is to raise $500,000 in grassroots donations in the next 72 hours. We are in the fight of our lives, and the future of President Trump's America First agenda depends on keeping the Senate RED. The Dems are sprinting out of the gate. Let's remind them this is still OUR country. Tim Scott Chairman, NRSC If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I'm Back from El Salvador and Ready for the Fight Ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106378554/541330766/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzgwYzljZS04MzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFavHsrmwSgJWGuqXsONXcRiYNz8y9hM7QdNnEFTP5Y=)
Friends,
Donald Trump is defying a 9-0 Supreme Court order to bring Kilmar Abrego Garcia back home.
I just returned from El Salvador, where I joined three other Democratic Members of Congress to advocate for the release and return of Kilmar. We made this trip to uphold the due process that every person in America is entitled to.
We need Democrats in Congress to fight like our Democracy depends on us, because it actually does. I have been doing my best to fight back against Trump and Elon Musk; to ensure that we are protecting Democracy; to protect the working class; and to protect our federal institutions from the hatchet that Trump and Elon Musk are taking to everything we hold dear as Americans.
[And I’m hoping I have your support. It’s folks like you that keep this fight alive and make it possible to do everything we can to push back against the destruction of the Trump Administration. Will you help today, and make a contribution to our campaign so we can continue to fight back with everything we have? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106378555/541330780/-1342475269?refcode2=4780c9ce-8320-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250423&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzgwYzljZS04MzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFavHsrmwSgJWGuqXsONXcRiYNz8y9hM7QdNnEFTP5Y=)
The Trump administration and Republicans in Congress are testing the limits of our Democracy: denying due process, shredding our federal workforce, dismantling departments, cutting social programs like Medicaid and Social Security, starting trade wars with our allies, the list just goes on!
We can’t let them get away with this.
We’ll go wherever we need to go, and do whatever it takes to defend the rights of every person in this country and uphold the promise of America.
But we can’t do it alone.
This fight is far from over. With your help, we can keep the pressure on, demand accountability, and protect the rule of law before it’s too late.
Together, let’s make sure we protect what makes America the greatest Democracy in the world.

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106378556/541330786/-1342475269?refcode2=4780c9ce-8320-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250423&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzgwYzljZS04MzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFavHsrmwSgJWGuqXsONXcRiYNz8y9hM7QdNnEFTP5Y=)

Thank you for standing with us,
Robert

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Reining in the unelected billionaire in the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
It’s pretty simple: Musk shouldn’t be able to dismantle our government while making $8 million a day off of government contracts.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2529%2E4032634%2Eu4UFpR)
---
I recently introduced a bill to rein in Elon Musk and other Special Government Employees. It’s pretty simple: an unelected billionaire should not be acting as co-president of the United States, sitting in the Oval Office, joining Cabinet meetings, and making official decisions, all while making $8 million _a day_ on government contracts while he’s at it. You may be wondering why this scenario could even be possible in the first place. It’s because Trump made Musk something called a “Special Government Employee” or SGE. These SGEs serve for a short period of time and have weaker ethics requirements than most other government employees. That’s why I introduced a new bill that will crack down on conflicts of interests and enforce stronger ethics rules for all SGEs. [**I’m doing everything I can in the Senate to stop unelected billionaires from hijacking our government for their own financial gain. Add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the SGE Ethics Enforcement & Reform Act to strengthen conflict-of-interest barriers, prevent financial self-dealing, and shine a light on the finances of these government employees.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-seer-act/?source=EMZ25M_ENG_E_20250423_V1S1&t=8&akid=2529%2E4032634%2Eu4UFpR) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-seer-act/?source=EMZ25M_ENG_E_20250423_V1S1&t=9&akid=2529%2E4032634%2Eu4UFpR)
---
Look, Musk has a huge ownership stake in Tesla, so he should be walled off from conversations about electric cars.
He's selling his services to the federal government to launch rockets into space, so he should be walled off from federal contracts for SpaceX.
He and his companies are under investigation by federal regulators, so he should be walled off from law enforcement action.
I’m still fighting to put a stop to Musk taking a chainsaw to our government. But along the way, this bill would make sure he cannot make a bigger profit while he has the ear of the president.
[**I’m going to keep bringing these clear conflicts of interest to public attention and calling them out over and over on behalf of the American people. If you support my plan to enforce stronger rules on Musk and other SGEs, please add your name to become a grassroots co-sponsor of this bill.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-seer-act/?source=EMZ25M_ENG_E_20250423_V1S1&t=10&akid=2529%2E4032634%2Eu4UFpR)

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: It’s pretty simple: Musk shouldn’t be able to dismantle our government while making $8 million a day off of government contracts. | | | I recently introduced a bill to rein in Elon Musk and other Special Government Employees. It’s pretty simple: an unelected billionaire should not be acting as co-president of the United States, sitting in the Oval Office, joining Cabinet meetings, and making official decisions, all while making $8 million a day on government contracts while he’s at it. You may be wondering why this scenario could even be possible in the first place. It’s because Trump made Musk something called a “Special Government Employee” or SGE. These SGEs serve for a short period of time and have weaker ethics requirements than most other government employees. That’s why I introduced a new bill that will crack down on conflicts of interests and enforce stronger ethics rules for all SGEs. | Look, Musk has a huge ownership stake in Tesla, so he should be walled off from conversations about electric cars. He's selling his services to the federal government to launch rockets into space, so he should be walled off from federal contracts for SpaceX. He and his companies are under investigation by federal regulators, so he should be walled off from law enforcement action. I’m still fighting to put a stop to Musk taking a chainsaw to our government. But along the way, this bill would make sure he cannot make a bigger profit while he has the ear of the president. **Peter, the Trump administration just ripped away $35 million in funds from Wisconsin’s Head Start Centers.** These harmful cuts only serve to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy, leaving working families to pay the price now that the services they depend on are at risk. Across the state, Tammy has been hearing from parents about the challenges of affording good child care and opportunities for early learning. **This move from the Trump administration will only make it worse.** Multiple centers nationwide have already been forced to close with many others now at risk. Tammy is fighting back. She’s calling on Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to answer for these closures — and to the nearly 15,000 children and their families supported by Wisconsin’s Head Start Centers. **[Tammy is committed to protecting quality child care and vital resources for Wisconsin families. Peter **—** Last week, I held a town hall in Bellows Falls. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380104/541333196/-1865709748?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhiZWUyMC04NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3QXql5XWdpM4oif-iBApWzgh07-j8d-x4IYTQYUstE=) With a population of just under three thousand people, Bellows Falls isn't the type of place that representatives in Washington typically spend time in — but it's important to me that I hear from as many Vermonters as possible, _including those with different perspectives than mine._ And over 400 of you took the time out of your evening to share your thoughts with me, ask questions, and engage in our democracy. Folks who came out expressed worry, anger, and fear. Trust me, I feel it too. But I said it then, and I’ll say it now: **We will get through this together.** **[If you support my work on behalf of ALL Vermonters, please chip in an amount that works for your budget.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380105/541333198/-1865709748?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhiZWUyMC04NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3QXql5XWdpM4oif-iBApWzgh07-j8d-x4IYTQYUstE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380106/541333200/-1865709748?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjhiZWUyMC04NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3QXql5XWdpM4oif-iBApWzgh07-j8d-x4IYTQYUstE=)

clean_body: | = Peter — Last week, I held a town hall in Bellows Falls. = With a population of just under three thousand people, Bellows Falls isn't the type of place that representatives in Washington typically spend time in — but it's important to me that I hear from as many Vermonters as possible, including those with different perspectives than mine. And over 400 of you took the time out of your evening to share your thoughts with me, ask questions, and engage in our democracy. Folks who came out expressed worry, anger, and fear. Trust me, I feel it too. name: Katherine Clark
subject: I’m back home and I’m fired up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
If you're frustrated, you're not alone |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380094/541333174/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzllNjkxYS04NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOaXtySJ5IHWJBR4xLcLVa0_xkbZ31pBKNzF4au6448=)

Peter, Congress may be in recess right now, but let me be clear: I haven’t taken a break. I’ve been in-district with the people I represent. Listening. Learning. And, honestly, I feel fired up by how many of you are demanding more — more protection for our rights, more accountability from leaders, and more action to defend our democracy. That’s exactly what Fair Shot PAC is about: supporting Democratic candidates across the country who are ready to fight for our shared values and flip the House. The contrast couldn’t be clearer. While we’ve been working — listening to constituents and showing up for our communities — many of our Republican colleagues have spent their time doubling down on cruel, chaotic policies and cozying up to MAGA extremists — all while refusing to meet with the people they’re supposed to represent. **If you're frustrated, you’re not alone. name: David Hogg
subject: We’re coming for Republicans too
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Yes, we’re backing primary challengers – but we’re also flipping red seats. Here’s our plan.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250423-1&t=1&akid=2029%2E587540%2E00AW8e)
We’ve been getting a lot of questions this week since we announced our $20 million initiative to primary ineffective, out-of-touch Democrats, Peter:
_Is Leaders We Deserve only focused on primary challenges now?_
Let us be clear: **NO.** Our mission hasn’t changed. We’re here to elect the next generation of progressive leaders. And that means we’re going to challenge extreme Republicans _and_ the Democrats who are unwilling to fight back hard.
Here’s our plan:
✅ Primary “safe” establishment Democrats who are asleep at the wheel
✅ Flip red-to-blue seats by supporting bold young progressives ready to lead
✅ Replace the aging, ineffective, out-of-touch, asleep at the wheel politicians – no matter the party – with young champions who will show up, speak truth, and deliver for their communities
✅ Elect generational leaders in state legislatures across the country
We’re not in this fight to preserve the same old status quo that has failed our generation. We’re in this fight to win – and transform our politics in the process.
**That’s why we’ve committed $20 million to elect bold young leaders in select Democratic primaries _and_ red-to-blue districts in the 2026 midterm elections.**
Because let’s be honest: Too many in the current generation of leaders – _**across both parties**_ – are failing. And we can’t afford to wait around for that to change.
**[So Peter, can you pitch in $5 to power our fight to replace MAGA Republicans and do-nothing Democrats alike with a new generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250423-1?refcode=em20250423-2029&amount=5&refcode2=2029_587540_00AW8e&akid=2029%2E587540%2E00AW8e)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250423-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250423-2029&refcode2=2029_587540_00AW8e&akid=2029%2E587540%2E00AW8e)**
Thanks for being in this fight,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250423-1&t=2&refcode2=2029_587540_00AW8e&akid=2029%2E587540%2E00AW8e)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2029%2E587540%2E00AW8e)

name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: USPS is a service, not a business to be privatized
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Listen -- the Postal Service is a constitutional promise, a critical part of our public infrastructure, our economy, and one of the most beloved and trusted public institutions in American life. It delivers to over 168 million addresses every single day, and employs more than 630,000 people in a postal workforce where nearly 30% are Black, and over 40% are women.
This isn't something to be privatized and gutted for parts like a private equity vulture. The USPS is a crucial public service.
Help save the USPS: Tell your representatives in Congress to stop Trump's privatization plan ASAP >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=N2IBdUd6xSRo8MTFtjbmFml8zqAupmld1aHktPOtS5V1bELoxpn7AAa2BB/C9R/dCDa7f862iZNaqVXvCv7//kMZNulJg0MN7w/98SWXrfw=]
Folks -- We know Donald Trump is attempting to take over the United States Postal Service and make it part of the Commerce Department. But now we know his true endgame.
Trump and his greedy billionaire buddies on Wall Street are trying to fully privatize the USPS. Their goal is simple: break it apart, and sell it off for its parts to the highest corporate bidder that has zero interest in continuing to serve every ZIP code.
Now, we have a real opportunity to have Congress take a stand and vow to stop Trump’s USPS privatization plan and save the people’s post office .
Almost 200 members of Congress have already co-sponsored bipartisan resolutions that would draw a clear line in the sand that Congress intends to take every measure to ensure the Postal Service remains an independent public institution.
Tell your representatives in Congress to support the bipartisan bills in the House and Senate to stop this shady privatization scheme before it's too late >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 reaffirm the founding principle that the USPS exists to serve the people, not greedy corporate billionaires . These resolutions are proof that protecting our public post office is a bipartisan concern, with support from Democrats and Republicans alike. From Republican Rep. Don Bacon and Sen. Thom Tillis, to Democratic Sen. Maggie Hassan and Rep. Gerry Connolly, lawmakers across deep red and blue districts are rejecting privatization.
Leaders in both political parties know exactly who privatization would hurt: rural families, veterans, seniors, postal workers, Black-owned small businesses, Indigenous communities, and many more. The loss of the people’s post office and the public services it provides to folks across the country would be devastating.
Trump and his billionaire cronies tried dismantling the post office for their own profit before -- and we stopped them . But now they’re back with an even more aggressive plan. We can’t stay silent, Congress must hear from us that we will not allow a hostile takeover of the people’s post office to succeed. The damage will be irreversible.
Congress must act before it’s too late. This is our chance to once again show Wall Street our broad, bipartisan support for the defense of the Postal Service from being gutted for corporate gain.
Urge your members of Congress to co-sponsor and pass bipartisan H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 to stop Trump's privatization plan now! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/save-the-usps-3/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

clean_body: Listen -- the Postal Service is a constitutional promise, a critical part of our public infrastructure, our economy, and one of the most beloved and trusted public institutions in American life. It delivers to over 168 million addresses every single day, and employs more than 630,000 people in a postal workforce where nearly 30% are Black, and over 40% are women. This isn't something to be privatized and gutted for parts like a private equity vulture. The USPS is a crucial public service. Help save the USPS: Tell your representatives in Congress to stop Trump's privatization plan ASAP >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [=] Folks -- We know Donald Trump is attempting to take over the United States Postal Service and make it part of the Commerce Department. But now we know his true endgame. Trump and his greedy billionaire buddies on Wall Street are trying to fully privatize the USPS. Their goal is simple: break it apart, and sell it off for its parts to the highest corporate bidder that has zero interest in continuing to serve every ZIP code. Now, we have a real opportunity to have Congress take a stand and vow to stop Trump’s USPS privatization plan and save the people’s post office . Almost 200 members of Congress have already co-sponsored bipartisan resolutions that would draw a clear line in the sand that Congress intends to take every measure to ensure the Postal Service remains an independent public institution. Thom Tillis, to Democratic Sen. Maggie Hassan and Rep. Gerry Connolly, lawmakers across deep red and blue districts are rejecting privatization. Leaders in both political parties know exactly who privatization would hurt: rural families, veterans, seniors, postal workers, Black-owned small businesses, Indigenous communities, and many more. The loss of the people’s post office and the public services it provides to folks across the country would be devastating. Trump and his billionaire cronies tried dismantling the post office for their own profit before -- and we stopped them . But now they’re back with an even more aggressive plan. We can’t stay silent, Congress must hear from us that we will not allow a hostile takeover of the people’s post office to succeed. The damage will be irreversible. Congress must act before it’s too late. This is our chance to once again show Wall Street our broad, bipartisan support for the defense of the Postal Service from being gutted for corporate gain. Urge your members of Congress to co-sponsor and pass bipartisan H.Res.70 and S.Res.147 to stop Trump's privatization plan now! >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: RFK Jr. is using your tax dollars to spread dangerous lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

RFK Jr. is no longer just spreading conspiracy theories from the sidelines — **he’s doing it from inside the federal government.**

As Secretary of Health and Human Services, he now controls a massive public health apparatus. And he’s using that platform **to promote discredited anti-vaccine claims and stigmatizing rhetoric — not evidence-based science.**

This week, in response to a new study on autism diagnoses, RFK Jr. doubled down on the **debunked and dangerous idea that vaccines are linked to autism.** But what he said next was even more disturbing:

“These are kids who will never pay taxes. They'll never hold a job. They'll never play baseball. They'll never write a poem. They'll never go out on a date. Many of them will never use a toilet unassisted."

As a doctor, I find this **deeply offensive, factually wrong, and profoundly harmful.** Statements like this spread stigma, fuel misinformation, and undermine decades of progress in both public health and disability inclusion.

And the worst part? **RFK Jr. is doing this with the authority of the federal government — and with zero pushback from Republicans in Congress.** They won’t investigate. They won’t hold hearings. They won’t stand up to this administration’s abuses of power.

**That’s why I’m fighting — as a Member of Congress and as DCCC Frontline Co-Chair — to flip the House in 2026 and bring back real oversight.**

[**👉 Can you chip in $15 today to help us hold RFK Jr. and this reckless administration accountable — and defend science, dignity, and truth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380639/541335127/1123237933?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_2025419_FR_MMFR_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjNjEzNC04NzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GWBnur3kGfRrmNjswqDlyFf-Je2TAsCDKzoIfYAdwRA=) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. **[DONATE $8 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106380640/541335134/1123237933?amount=8&express_lane=true&contactdata=ewSx7P0+jANC4V8Z3RvxCXZPsaOzO4HQzjKlJUxneU1OIwZiDHxKdTqHv/xlMi/ALLyU7M8aabvV87ZR7Cc8LrFx8C/JdcMse5cvWTPPMAqv3H2LcHiQtJ3wa/N7D630GPUDHgxUtfA7E2nDbEHz0nvPVHKy/bfrPy0LCJS3JU3gdEN5QMICWmEUn594YRLY&refcode2=3c0c6134-8720-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&source=EM_NBI_AB_2025419_FR_MMFR_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjNjEzNC04NzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GWBnur3kGfRrmNjswqDlyFf-Je2TAsCDKzoIfYAdwRA=)**

We cannot allow taxpayer-funded agencies to become platforms for misinformation and discrimination. Let’s fight back — and win.

Thank you for standing with me.

Be well,
**Dr. Ami Bera**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
THIS IS NOT A DRILL.
Donald Trump is escalating his war on democracy — and this time, he’s targeting the infrastructure that fuels it: ActBlue.
He and his allies are pushing for criminal investigations into ActBlue , the grassroots fundraising platform that powers virtually every Democratic campaign, PAC, and nonprofit in America — including GOTV PAC!
Their goal is painfully clear: choke off funding, criminalize organizing, and crush dissent.
This isn’t politics as usual. It’s authoritarianism with a plan.
And here at GOTV PAC, we’re not just watching this happen — we’re doing something about it. Because while Trump is trying to burn the system down, we’re building a firewall at the local and state level — funding candidates who believe in free elections, the rule of law, and the Constitution.
But if Trump succeeds in gutting ActBlue, the damage will be catastrophic. We could lose the ability to fund the candidates and campaigns who can actually beat him.
So here’s the ask: Will you rush a donation to GOTV PAC today and help us build a war chest outside the reach of Trump’s dictatorship ambitions?
Donate here via ActBlue while you still can! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04232025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email04232025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email04232025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email04232025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email04232025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04232025]
We’re not funded by billionaires. We don’t have Elon Musk writing checks for us. What we have is you — and if enough of us step up, we can out-organize, out-fund, and out-vote them.
But only if we act now.
Because make no mistake: they are trying to criminalize the very act of fighting back.
GOTV PAC
PS: If for some reason the link above does not work, you can donate here via Everyaction. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZCIFkQUU3k6_gQVW6bPtqg2]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Stand with Elon Musk
subject: This is SICK — and it’s getting worse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
A shocking new poll shows just how far the Left’s hatred has gone. You need to see this. | Peter,

This isn't just about politics anymore -- it's about **pure, unhinged hatred.**

🚨 According to a jaw-dropping new study, _**57.6%**_ of self-identified Leftists say it's at least partially acceptable to **destroy Tesla dealerships.**

**These people are sick.**

And that's just the beginning. You won't believe what else the radical Left thinks is acceptable when it comes to President Trump and Elon Musk. _We don't even want to mention it here..._

This is the modern Left -- emboldened by woke universities, fueled by radical social justice mobs, and propped up by the Democrat Party.

This is what they think is “normal.”

This is what they want to bring to the Senate.

That’s why the **National Republican Senatorial Committee** is launching an emergency petition to expose this radical sickness -- [**and we need your signature in the next 10 minutes.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54f6688c0eab44739d5b571907d4cfeb&_e=e0w7VwpF91ObeY0lp7c6J4wTnXRJpRmsaltX2HF3kzfGZbbv3GfVP3TUlsJEOZu6nVsP_wwH-ETErF7bOHE02BS7rgmgVESKoG3_yNxlA7i0LShXHyWekvrmG47BMEqLz9D73Pa_winl9_mjDRFJ3ueZLliky4VMCHl1qdvBTNfyteCF5xvs14IgB34U7P6SGLttqjeZ4qF8cy6lpzLdMvvJAC1XhB9e9dAEVhMCDvfCULGv25WRZ7gTn0wHwaJDH1kFQ1-g71dTj1okcMxzfnoS4jjW5FJv4rj3mlYoSpzr2cvmLZyV3lLB54JN5-rkyUSBATrIc9zgMoDYLS_78qPp4J2i5VcudcF0T4T0EVKbXVkNq639V5JhDZagItEYyXebreFlVylxtsgjFDhc7z2vaUcbElRbs44nQVahj4Ds2HHK2Un_1k6lsEjRMuKetarQV59i8J7U4dMdQJ2Yraph4k9rfW8fTmHdlYIAjJA%3D)

name: devastated
subject: This couldn’t get any worse…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress
body:
Here's what happened:
| |
---
| | | **The worst-case scenario just happened, Friend...**

_Things couldn 't get any worse..._

The nationwide GOP petition to BAN China from owning American farmland fell short by 4 names. **JUST 4!**

Our greatest adversary owns hundreds of thousands of acres across our country, some near our critical military installations. We need to kick them out ASAP!

clean_body: Peter, You came HIGHLY RECOMMENDED by GOP leaders. So now that I'm recruiting the strongest MAGA PATRIOTS to join the Official Republican Advisory Board, I want to extend the VERY FIRST invitation to YOU! ****** Party leaders and I all agree -- it's time that REAL American Patriots like you have a say in how this country gets run. Now that we've taken back the White House, our leaders are no longer kowtowing to the swampy agendas of DEEP STATE bureaucrats. We'll be taking advice from YOU. **** Peter - YOU ARE THE ONLY PERSON FOR THIS JOB. **** TOGETHER, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! God bless, JD Vance Vice President of the United States **** Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Driving Maryland’s economy forward
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381163/541336775/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDlkN2Y4OC04OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zrIJKEG-JIiL7MP665W5R5ajDdywOWiTa9LEgEiLMac=&emci=e0f1bc8b-7520-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=309d7f88-8920-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
This legislative session saw both the largest budget crisis since the great recession and the chaos of the new administration in Washington — **but the Moore-Miller administration stayed ready to fight for Maryland.** We fought for and are ready for Governor Moore to sign legislation that will support business growth, elevate apprenticeships, make our public schools some of the best in the country, and build our economy. [**We will explain just how these new laws will make this Maryland’s decade, but if you are ready to keep Governor Moore fighting for progress, chip in to power our movement today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381164/541336776/1077344675?refcode=em20250423-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDlkN2Y4OC04OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zrIJKEG-JIiL7MP665W5R5ajDdywOWiTa9LEgEiLMac=) 📝 We are **making state contracts more accessible to small businesses** through the Procurement Reform Act. 🌽 Through the Chesapeake Bay Legacy Act, we are creating incentives for Maryland farmers to **incorporate best conservation practices into their farming.** 🏢 We are **helping Marylanders with disabilities earn more pathways to work, wages, and wealth by providing policies and resources through the Department of Disabilities** through the Model Employer Act. 🏛️ The Expungement Reform Act **will help the thousands of Marylanders who have served their time get a fair shot at building their future.** 🔧 We are **expanding access to apprenticeships for employers and apprentices** through various programs established by the RAISE Act. 💪 The Protect Our Workers Act will **support federal workers and create pathways for public servants to find new jobs.** 🎒 The Excellence in Maryland Public Schools Act **shapes our schools by recruiting more teachers and providing the necessary resources to our students.** This is just the beginning of our work to win this decade. **[We’re coming up with new solutions night and day to make sure that you thrive. Will you pitch in $10 to help us with this mission?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381165/541336777/1077344675?refcode=em20250423-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDlkN2Y4OC04OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zrIJKEG-JIiL7MP665W5R5ajDdywOWiTa9LEgEiLMac=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Team Pramila
subject: Immigrants didn’t crash the economy. Billionaires did.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump wants people blaming anyone but himself and the billionaires backing him.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250423-4975-footer&t=1&akid=4975%2E420207%2EHCdoYT)
Pramila hit the nail on the head, Peter:

While the Trump administration throws the economy into chaos, raises prescription drug prices, and does _nothing_ to address the housing crisis, Trump wants people blaming _anyone_ but himself and the billionaires backing him.
**But the people see through their lies — and we’re fighting back by building a bold, populist movement that will kick them out of power in the next elections.**
**[Pitch in $3 to help](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250423?amount=3&refcode=em20250423-4975&refcode2=4975_420207_HCdoYT&akid=4975%2E420207%2EHCdoYT)**
Thousands of people across the country have attended Pramila’s Resistance Lab since launching these grassroots trainings just a few short weeks ago, and we’re only getting started.

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Show some love to these Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | | Peter,

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: $500K or we lose the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are flooding battlegrounds with cash — we need reinforcements NOW. | Fellow American -- The latest FEC reports are _in_ -- and what we're seeing is downright alarming.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c1e83fc2421e469b9a4720f80e404b96&_e=tow3aYglrCOJBo8Ty6rH3gfnIUGiKSh5g4Fj-pLUvCcqJU79LPO1RL6-2h7r3V8iTfPLluwMVd44_qmNow91JFMJbCNNIaupqi8jjxdUbUraL2rDPvJ5-45_k05BHQdNBeDOIStnmXTgL8ankBvIDdYKsxBniKZkcyJT9HyQ27z9c80Z4rDocrqqQLF0ODYlexkogdYLUCW9qqysJOzn2OyRVKljAcAIDepc_g9ay-ZniZhc0mHKgFb4JfVeTn7riiMs4Mv_TiTLLDuhWwYiFKKqme5dCBx2uWO0pGo1BKPmkJGL4-Mo7xvemo7k_Q0D6VMAgJTfOThlcK-dMfgX2m4OZscj-W0IeWek220AmBP70SdjIsYJqtiZElocK_f4iwK84jgb5x4hoQeQq2EROVQpPQ6eooXKGn7bRMpbYRmsfMb5y3nLSt29h7AKMW0k7mmxgSVynJmLYt6csjH0Gxe0jG0eBqSeUE-lA5CtiDD5tA4GfdBbKxxKb49YBLnD)
Democrats have posted MASSIVE fundraising hauls in critical Senate battlegrounds like Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire. Even in places with NO incumbents and NO clear frontrunners, their candidates are pulling in **seven figures.**

Meanwhile, some key Republican incumbents are being outraised or stuck waiting while Democrat war chests grow.

**Let me be crystal clear:** we cannot afford to fall behind this early.

If we allow Democrats to dominate the fundraising race now, they’ll define the narrative, flood the airwaves, and buy their way back into the Senate majority.

_What will they do with that power?_

**➤ Reopen the borders
➤ Pack the Supreme Court with woke activist judges
➤ Raise your taxes to bankroll socialist welfare schemes and illegal immigrant handouts.**

We are launching an emergency blitz to close the gap and fight back. Our goal is to raise $500,000 in grassroots donations in the next 72 hours.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help Republicans protect and expand our Senate majority in 2026?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c1e83fc2421e469b9a4720f80e404b96&_e=tow3aYglrCOJBo8Ty6rH3gfnIUGiKSh5g4Fj-pLUvCcqJU79LPO1RL6-2h7r3V8iTfPLluwMVd44_qmNow91JFMJbCNNIaupqi8jjxdUbUraL2rDPvJ5-45_k05BHQdNBeDOIStnmXTgL8ankBvIDdYKsxBniKZkcyJT9HyQ27z9c80Z4rDocrqqQLF0ODYlexkogdYLUCW9qqysJOzn2OyRVKljAcAIDepc_g9ay-ZniZhc0mHKgFb4JfVeTn7riiMs4Mv_TiTLLDuhWwYiFKKqme5dCBx2uWO0pGo1BKPmkJGL4-Mo7xvemo7k_Q0D6VMAgJTfOThlcK-dMfgX2hWkhI8GMYKYhmTTq3L5Otf3K4kHzPn51MgYT_tM1tPRMT39zEFTrWRjAaVxjTZhPODG6BG9LLrtufwkEvmAqF66e6y4ZCvF4dvJg0tz47Z6aWjyYZ4Qv_LVBElSlHRt6zjmLBGksNsuktFihDy-Ft2cAsYRWTEoy4cS9KhEJUYv)

We are in the fight of our lives, and the future of President Trump's America First agenda depends on keeping the Senate RED.

The Dems are sprinting out of the gate.

_Let's remind them this is still OUR country._

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c1e83fc2421e469b9a4720f80e404b96&_e=tow3aYglrCOJBo8Ty6rH3gfnIUGiKSh5g4Fj-pLUvCcqJU79LPO1RL6-2h7r3V8iTfPLluwMVd44_qmNow91JFMJbCNNIaupqi8jjxdUbUraL2rDPvJ5-45_k05BHQdNBeDOIStnmXTgL8ankBvIDdYKsxBniKZkcyJT9HyQ27z9c80Z4rDocrqqQLF0ODYlexkogdYLUCW9qqysJOzn2OyRVKljAcAIDepc_g9ay-ZniZhc0mHKgFb4JfVeTn7riiMs4Mv_TiTLLDuhWwYiFKKqme5dCBx2uWO0pGo1BKPmkJGL4-Mo7xvemo7k_Q0D6VMAgJTfOThlcK-dMfgX2qpGUNKAg9ANo_4yn1tar-kDw2BzopgZbnAf_LN4WEnF-9CkNJD4LjRevtG4cV8f7B8XB4tfS5gmdgH9VcxkL4302UBw14p_NV3z9LY5jGOZpwdAg1OdnleIANJrxw5zi8ubtGfiJJQlY_reWFhDMVbUJyyi3obExThl3zmxPFIS)

body:
---
| | [**BREAKING via NYT: “TRUMP ISSUES ORDER TO EXPAND HIS POWER”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381795/541339000/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=) This is the plain truth. During his first few months in office, Donald Trump has done EVERYTHING he can to expand his power. He has tried to undermine Congress’ power of the purse. He has tried to crush our vital safety net initiatives – specifically focusing on Medicaid and Social Security. He has tried to circumvent our Constitution at every step. He has even likened himself to a “KING.” [**And he thinks he can get away with ANYTHING – including gutting our health care to give a massive handout to his billionaire MAGA donors.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381796/541339001/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=) [**There they go again, trying to rip away your health care in order to enrich their big money MAGA donors.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381797/541339002/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=) When Republicans last controlled Congress and Trump was President, they passed a massive tax cut for the rich that gave 83% of the benefits to the top 1% and added $2 TRILLION to the national debt. Now, [**they are scheming to add $4 TRILLION to the debt and gut Medicaid that 72 million Americans rely on**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381798/541339003/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=) across party lines. [**It’s our job to prove him and the rest of his MAGA allies 100% wrong!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381799/541339004/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=) **[_And the only way to do that is to CRUSH our fundraising goal to show Trump/Musk and Republicans in Congress that Democrats are FIRED UP and united against their extremist agenda. Please: Will you join 1,000 Democrats and renew your Team Pelosi Membership before midnight? Every dollar will help Democrats DEFEAT swing-district Republicans so we can RECLAIM the House with Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker and finally put a check on Trump’s power. Together, we can send Republicans a message that they will never forget – but only if grassroots supporters like you chip in before midnight. Can I count on your $15? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381800/541339005/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106381801/541339006/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250423_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTFlYWQ0OC04YTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fq4sK4bB-EqQNxQKBNsisf61TVLry_VlktrElV9vIaE=)

**Billionaire donor dumps $1 million into Youngkin’s PAC and says he’ll be backing Winsome Earle-Sears next**

National Republicans and their megadonors are targeting Virginia because they know it’s a bellwether—and what happens here will send shockwaves across the country.

**Make no mistake: This is the GOP’s playbook.** They rely on billionaires to drown out voters and push their extreme agenda. They’ve done it everywhere in the country, but because this race is the biggest in 2025, they’re doubling down here.

clean_body: National Republicans and their megadonors are targeting Virginia because they know it’s a bellwether—and what happens here will send shockwaves across the country. | Peter, Did you see this? | | BREAKING NEWS: Billionaire donor dumps $1 million into Youngkin’s PAC and says he’ll be backing Winsome Earle-Sears next National Republicans and their megadonors are targeting Virginia because they know it’s a bellwether—and what happens here will send shockwaves across the country. Make no mistake: This is the GOP’s playbook. They rely on billionaires to drown out voters and push their extreme agenda. They’ve done it everywhere in the country, but because this race is the biggest in 2025, they’re doubling down here. While billionaires are dropping millions of dollars to prop up Abigail’s opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears’ campaign, we are building a different campaign – one that is driven by volunteers and an extraordinary grassroots infrastructure. Before we ask you to invest, let us tell you what we have built with the help of supporters like you: ✅ A volunteer force that collected over 40,000 petition signatures to get Abigail on the ballot. ✅ A coalition of grassroots donors with an average donation of less than $30. ✅ A field team that’s already knocking on doors across Virginia and engaging with voters where it matters most. We know what it takes to win in Virginia: one donation, one volunteer, one voter at a time. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Legacy media is shook over the new MAGA media stars disrupting everything inside the White House briefing room. Two of those stars are Monica Page Luisi and Natalie Winters, both on today's show. Along with Reagan Reese, White House Correspondent for The Daily Caller, this new wave of media personalities stand out for one main reason, they tell the truth. Legacy media outlets that have gaslit the American people for years are still reporting that Kilmar Abrego Garcia is just a "Maryland dad." They also didn't seem to care when millions of illegals were let into our country, now they can't handle 8 new voices that are actually delivering truthful reporting for the American people. New media is also providing alternatives to the White House correspondents dinner this weekend, hopefully this will be the last year the WHCA even attempts to hold the dinner as legacy media chokes on falling viewership. As big food ran rampant for years, suppressing the science on additives to our food, RFK Jr. is planning on getting all these poisons out of our food within 18 months. Biden racked up $1.7 Trillion in debt to American taxpayers for student loans and the Department of Education is taking this burden off the taxpayer and collecting on defaulted loans.

| Dear Peter,
As most of us know, Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company, xAI, is establishing a significant presence in Memphis with the construction of a large supercomputer facility and a proposed water recycling plant. This project will attract both economic opportunity and jobs.

Disruptor **State Rep. Justin Pearson** is organizing a number of gullible people to protest this advancement for Memphis. .

**I am asking you to join us on Friday,**_**April 25, 2025 from 5-7pm at:**_

**Fairley High School Auditorium**
**4950 Fairley Rd**
**Memphis, TN 38109**

We need your support to MAKE MEMPHIS GREAT AGAIN!

Can I count on you? Can Memphis count on you showing up? By saving Memphis, you are helping to promote Elon Musk and President Trump's agenda to help our city.

| Peter,

President Trump’s reckless tariff games are hurting working families, small businesses, and retirees. With every flip-flop, grocery bills climb higher, savings shrink, and businesses struggle to survive.

That’s why Congresswoman Linda Sánchez just introduced the **Stopping a Rogue President on Trade Act** —a critical bill to stop Trump’s chaotic trade wars and return power to the people’s representatives. This bill would **end Trump’s Tariff Hikes** and restore Congressional authority.

Trump is playing both the **arsonist and the firefighter** , creating market chaos just to let his allies cash in. We can’t afford to sit back while working Americans suffer. name: Tina Kotek
subject: I hope to see your name on this, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Will you join this fight with me? |
#
---
Peter, No matter how many bizarre headlines or hurtful policies the Trump Administration produces, I’m committed to defending our shared values. As Governor, I’m standing firm against every attack on Oregonians — our LGBTQ+ communities, our seniors on Social Security, our veterans, our students, our climate, our immigrant community, and more. Our most vulnerable communities are facing unrelenting attacks from Republicans in D.C. As long as I’m leading our great state, _these attacks will not go unanswered. _ **Through it all, I want you by my side as we defend our shared values and way of life. ** **[So I’m asking you: Please add your name to stand with me against these attacks and work towards a brighter future for every Oregonian.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106382693/541342157/675180918?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGUyNDMwNy04ZjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R4XXWL6_r3Wz0sotyCOfPeMLn50zoig95gjlYnOTVNk=&emci=76fbb038-5a20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=18e24307-8f20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)** | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106382694/541342158/675180918?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGUyNDMwNy04ZjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R4XXWL6_r3Wz0sotyCOfPeMLn50zoig95gjlYnOTVNk=&emci=76fbb038-5a20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=18e24307-8f20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

As Governor, I’m standing firm against every attack on Oregonians — our LGBTQ+ communities, our seniors on Social Security, our veterans, our students, our climate, our immigrant community, and more. Our most vulnerable communities are facing unrelenting attacks from Republicans in D.C. As long as I’m leading our great state, these attacks will not go unanswered. Through it all, I want you by my side as we defend our shared values and way of life. | Thank you for joining the fight today. Stay strong! Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e8c3fc93674d4f4181750d45f62d60f2&_e=K6q-7EvejQJyOjO6VLA-uaRnOWmvpCYhyPWa2v9yn2PWRf7xTjqMLFUUeaITMUIFsIvaQvaFXGiJSjprUAaiTjH81_MSXyJDyvvQDllUV8LN_KLTCMQRKovbWHGYgJsr0m4jicSrOkIAdBCZi0rEB6-2Z8bw7avgY7TNmFcYJv6r670xfMvVe6wiFiHa4scPZgghXlPA9qPBoFBAQ7wgS_sRHwttiIpRgvO8ktYtnowxfp6Y1nGup-Oa2BAygxBqZrJ3nqZv9HNyNr51-zRkvDifmsrjE1vQDTrvwJkfs5DXpGjYEfvuZL_EuddmET2Kyx7TwQv9GT9ak0GvwsIZhQ%3D%3D)
