clean_body: They are coming for us | BREAKING: NEW DEMOCRAT OPPONENT FOR SENATOR TOMMY TUBERVILLE ANNOUNCED | Peter, FIRST \- He claimed to be a lifelong Republican THEN \- He attended the Democratic National Convention and announced his support for Kamala Harris for President NOW \- He’s announced his campaign for Senate to try and TAKE OUR SEAT, FLIP it blue , and stand in the way of President Trump’s America First agenda This isn’t just wrong for Alabama, it’s perilous for America. The Democrats are desperate to take back control so they can keep our borders open, allow men to play in women’s sports, and continue to allow woke ideologies to seep across our country. I don’t want my opponent or his Democratic friends to even think they stand a chance. We need to show big numbers supporting our MAGA agenda, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. We’re living in President Trump’s America, who won in a LANDSLIDE victory. You can count on me to keep protecting his agenda and fighting back against any liberals who stand in our way. God bless, Coach Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

name: Logan Spena
subject: Can the government censor The Babylon Bee?
body:
People know and enjoy...
| |
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/gArmRYdwGkMqbz_ghSp6419io9INegE09pSM8S6bOYq_vOxcyu0SEZMKOsOq42zfbhB8GPDSda0ASEdxyBUbEBcFbUQlSMjq4dyUo5tm6Tbx80vLnlWfLz92-oj4JRxouV4wg14WWvNlrztYEAQjeyA_l-HqjgZSggZNhOAyTcK2nY9XpxnHC2p9BrU3xWA2u25eYVbX-DEdXivVJ1NLd647L_-i-ZPTBuhnRc5C2mS0ePj8SfOrotaCilpkkwnf1271bY0gWyUxx40FeKZm-6ePd3BYkDjfLe0y-r0nrj_rth9T7aYCiQ4_AgfJJBlbIk5NJ-SzXzrk5U8oI4Py-92gqs0vPHrcidLKyTbMc9eP1Emmf4hVbvnVYEfO1_6PZ8RSDAMN63AqiPW6kFpzEQ56BDNc-p8nKY5ZUVNdacJPz3zDWZn8qVcGz1pw6JqRVLyY6gqd/R-VJInEaqpcoswbeDJWPAq6BaUzNSoQn/8)
Dear Fellow American, People know and enjoy _The Babylon Bee_ because they produce funny, satirical content on any topic--from world news to housekeeping.

Their tagline says it all: "Fake news you can trust."

Unfortunately, though, the governor of California isn't laughing. And after one tweet from him, the California government passed two bills that infringe the First Amendment right of free speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Your voice today will tell government officials you believe the Constitution protects humor--whether or not they find it funny.

Will you stand with _The Babylon Bee_?

Click this link and stand with us today to preserve free speech for all: [https://adflegal.org/support/humor-first-amendment-statement](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/rBTRFeMrdpmtKK2v25xqjuFki_kfppBK32Hpd4a7bqIh2u3Tn9YIzV_V7f12r8CjLUpNocNQPX3cWuQf_b2yztcY6zYoyjmtcOSCgKHaay-GiNgVVbfq7VFogeSm8gfRuB5Dzswuy0r2Xws6x2W2aZz5pNOvPmW6Dg7zz6Liw1ZJboDCWvi0y4z8VUaLu11BKlj1YR_rn0QXjURcnmHLYs8dWm0ncE9pP77reW5tDXk8B3KOOvRviyzeym8IYapovpFqPWjXjXgUSG-ROSf1T8Qs4AQ-Sxz9L64zciU0ig6Z8z2uZBUhxdyYkcBnvSSI3tQA_Pws0b7MvYnW_daq3smsJm1fQLXevhZY8bOsV1IP58FeZNYZEgVE6fopCQqNRVt4x1_oPpuaEGQnlfEA0b6KV1cZP_6ZoZJNnY1IZwPOQQxu7wRb30fB8rLU-1Jy_SEK097U/IbTvtKu6hdrlJxW-p475v70NdUy09BXh/8).
For freedom, **Logan Spena** Legal Counsel [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/kw6HRQPY7LACE6-Wc8O6j1InpF-xPRwDDxfv0iNqQUxckp5vHNhwwsSQ6geoMXmp5k_txLanWR1uK34Gi6ALG1hv-6CN1hWkFq32GUq1kDdRq4-CEuIkDZA79jTNvp-1XQ8bXyGGTsN3qQ5J87_QXf7Ixa1_twKAjm_9w-i6y0P1Exqtl8emH_-poW7yiS3stmwUO2ze5YpU-ylbtACULTWKDmiMfKte18Kxj4vKn-9uzlm0HxSx8p-horZxuWvy7qjlQuISuozC9D06NszZzk1PkmTms4xGCyCkYMuDJIE9ztcJ1aS0BwFdGZBsZa6q5-J1vshil0FLCz3HTrvO9p0gQr6oeV1wY4AYB5tUEqNldsgpriWn-tqyDSyvSX0fViI9zMDE8j8ykREMm3oRNu2zUZVDvCB48VxcfEFwbJ-kYQn2W0aTn3rq2yAirRU16it9NEDA/8vMkQ9BSGRSjWoit7CfyV-LAlH3q_OTa/8)

name: The Democrats
subject: Republicans have proven they won’t check Trump’s power. We need to elect more Democrats who will.
body:
---
It’s Wednesday, April 23 — less than 100 days into Trump’s presidency. In that time, Trump has wreaked havoc on our economy, allowed an unelected billionaire to work to dismantle government agencies, and threatened to illegally send American citizens to Salvadoran prisons. _Now, he’s floating the idea that he’ll run for a third term._ **Republicans have proven they won’t check Trump’s power. We need to elect more Democrats who will.** [**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government is worth $3 to you, we’re asking you to make a contribution to the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250423_3248_fr&refcode2=3248_22930333_xLimGV&akid=3248%2E22930333%2ExLimGV) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250423_3248_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3248_22930333_xLimGV&akid=3248%2E22930333%2ExLimGV)** Thank you for everything, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=32fa8ed15a344e50838fdc4ff48e0d09&_e=qxqtVlHs-U-FsJB_6ltW4PQyDAEdj0zhCfKWRLSolB5zxDMHeUTZOv_CyQ0GCs6xik_nDM7_6OtaoCGnmPD9bUrbptXqrdyACzKZncX8xMZ-_eGnbKqZsDXsgjptg5CReV8yUzLL9spOCFpSjh0AhDtUPAJUR2rbbpeKuNCvnKL3-tFWeUGiTsARY8wIuefJIN2TmaH69pbIKnuU_2ec9IaIbKXmDiT2YHsfAt62MIAxdeNqcaW27FB-HVpe6uPhZxe-lqCqrIW_R-hwjeMv7vLnf3k6jrTGqBdKSNqtou3wVTWst1V7NIHjCUpvfIEtA0-7rbQMfTC-RUHdyq8FhihCuY_HCtFXY1iznbvskHvir75a1TfSNTYJWGEmXXPqGBRZ_LoFXKjlufoXKaSxg8WHWq_w0maEWdKRgUea8738PTx538Hj7JLEWuBiQ4e3) I’ve never seen this Fellow American.

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/2LdoDrqNXRGKEzqV3IIZ0sOlFLNQRhkfmn5RaBe-yzNk_Thk9VJgB4a_8pCgStu1rveP4Zfi-ZG6UDFccp1vQx_yoXcvpphBDX_IZLabRmKRfU67me-5vgxM_3mxNwMFPeCj3hxL_W8MDCdtPDtwoqnzdSnn0n2ZTJ7Rbn8Pq3vIxxdSLpLpXZSyv0EYbIFHZgL98rl-Sa8a0Dsp9zKAadAyfrSNWDgz41sOINwuQ8yfhpoXdwsH4i1AWdjuRspiYHYM60cMb5QIaTQWfY0qdeRsPib3T7cfZ_wFGyOxaYxxT1ZD1BnSksIvP09QiUiDrsCbKMfdt-nTtrKAv-gNx6Rs6W-Yrp4D5rA-gk7XvW7nPbzuus9r93aTIxoGGEjaJ3bIkFD8UTKGoQXS7B18NWsJbyyefeIdnPMzydBEMUx1SCXjXkv35GGYqQFzMSlbJ4-SxOpNgTXSdmAodHoLuplAnwc/DdtojKtmwURtMCbIDazCpbHK_s6dhRYV/8)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/-qt0QoR34kgJHg6n1ddNksG8BpiqNkWNfkddd-t3GqHMh5P8KW1HvyN1ARulp2Gms5ccaw9vwkoYOO1DOdaIRtF-289JVvuYfvQM0E_ggs59c2TlJ_ipw4bqK8NmIhXRxRIDJzB9FosMPtGe68v1hPYJRQ_-zt39JJ0LFR69-71rGLz1xVjRj-Z4OaiD9WtcYeTIoXBImjCHik3gUziLq6K4v3P7QowTnvvXr1HekPV6Cu9PN4Lt4zMHmDoV2tjkM9QuZXSR0eZ47o6sAq6bCu89eXsKMzJvoKcAfjUasFiTFGMyweLrZpWgbVDw4prBaHbeE3D7QUCKFWOWsOFtnK3Ju30iVbqhbIT1NT65S1wF66QnMq-Di4hqMGL0ai3n7N4ZS6gLpxWCmiMlnrfuNONDYcRdSab6ow_Zn8R9VjINKVdkH0reeNSJ9HF8qSKcN1MoYK-C-PO6HuJdpMd1817h5IU/e1FAQ1nSD12bPYTjgRFCya3_5Tlo9L0x/8)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/UGSBbyUSN6U6OMdUA7lSLtKAM4ZKVeW08CxKIPqYeh5kI8JvkpISWBbtKfRJiH4wAX-k4fn-s0Idr0hf253UevxV_5nRMQdDq2CEb7ezZNs8gLHeBtLqatn8IzN4pGPCwMpi1Dg4XjwBFk6r1npI2PSX59w4mpdMtGWaXh8grzpuiAvhdOjxsv1_2fbq2YMnhAJB-ZTjC4FCyLrrxum5JiIHbVNdFx-IgRLIwVOCfG58HIfoqZmXRWWQuRyqfMfQ2nEzkSj-H-9e6yTIpN8qcTRei4AFbb2Y5VBHCl-RW1awkK9O4JJXtfo19vI98JB29ImIj73j29l4eESh55vT0Ws1EK6-o18v1nkRjgzSovAyO6j6g7a6OA9ZV5zFow2ZVLDIOMI5bb7sleXm4lqelpDnpqCsZ5rUFXSwtCTLmoIVxr6BPEvKcjZaUppJA4aEcEh9py5uX8ldzvVsmkuLBRSRayI/HABlZIh8tjxtGZ5WXn8uHv53pVBUXux-/8)
---
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/UyH5EuPz4_B7yRmwBTkMzWSw-1q6YJ6nf4uOIB82r39Sen9wpMJJX93Tz0YCs3HoL45o4pnQ2l7JWXxVB0PesgUBsHgxFDCFCg7CVQ_PusjM2lgb5XhlmvhssNWqeaFXmDb5k_tzK9MhoofISbWU5GCu9Cr5varGHHU66BoOXab3dOTUSF3tmCUFNjXX9dOC_n-3K8LnjSQ_2L3_UVOWSylQbHZ5Pkk0NSlCckJa2W2FPXDvuDgLLuY0t4dSNmgAchrsNIV_pwsZzLZn0w4a6V2AMnPR3Kwp0PTrEsmLS1_iQdZIA49BlHUCs5c8CbJZWNb-JoBI67PeHMhlEwfgIrb7zFu6nbfzFzItnUyMvmCnCfCjUkmvmZcj8x_C6siMYhOBrHpsWrfah8NJIcJIOg_sDaDdv7RU_MN1ncd8ru2eWRli_TVq2dNVN19EjK2g6sUGi-B2zveq8kXL5WzI3t7F2sw/fEcydP9FfbY9nWuHAT4L0fdBljhpLNNA/8)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/MxwbR5sNmnCsQPFVQvOhB0VTluJ-hZZsZ9DWVmNMDviwGxzxaa37cG2BbojY3PqmUuMHLRnDVsEsRhMKlhMp-Nh9gP3efTpQbq5t0UrlYW1NICK5DJrXWASLtzgwfHImRlN0w3_3qHVU7PzmuA1PXRl73wKk-7xZLYLM0y2v_wsmvI0V6-WpolUjUtFYOXKfYHnrpBwrtGZ6nH24nYukVKlkXWWDUCIRdu4YijBAikaYmCYU1JhzduYaSLbqd_O6t9MODlrmxRSt8XlJLr1-OCGXgrgUXfKa1aWWJh1sTNyPQqDTMJAbdfBClqsvP8UtzHUGFMWf5bWg5KLx2CCfzUztQyoLxdGw/JuxkfjgQWDUvEFiEAKcaOuie9l-mpRSe/8)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/JhZLuzpU1hh9If-d7pdHNVHtnYJE4VBrFADVM7AMFyVxtFVMGrjvPXFGhg0UFmqCOqZ3xEfaW9KNDX_Egj-9lkGtEzoPdTd0ikNgja85-D3gW0rBApEZjbKFBn4KrrDZYB9cnGy57-yUsdAqW10aK8o_vDev23OQVk1Pza1s--wlDliBRnP3KrNPieRsO-xMuMlPXJb1XRxweVTmPxmLFGXYB2a65SS9LPC8u6mUDuBH5BZfEFSjmaXjEPxodslpc4amp2cNRrA_qdICWHYpx6BMM8XSOgb-bNhUy_i_Yg1rcLC0L7YCg5HTz6AopJLJdzLPVggtDXlJRHlkbotNexhtu0mIyoyM5UERDPeilDmuw-uDoWd_LwqTbdHIQChREA-MfOxywFmYkAPqnS4QNbgt8YLAi8RAi3ay2tRfn0PcRQ9sN6l7nw-PeKib0eDpL52yi4GQmNmOAf4tcZ5U5Hbp1zU/beOSRIOP-Kn295BoDPD-ATwQGT8zclVE/8) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/79bMhx7h1WEK-x0IECloWSYI4FfT6b1ezmZp9gKz1wY348auJHuyHKx9a1Ki5D91sU2UViNnnnlj7wRjQ5mHwf1B7NKlnM4OsBAYEW6ePZ_JFVUfzJ-NVU1scpHfN_9TkO2mF28apOo7lvy187GJb9_ATOzS21poCj76w2IsoIXItk2Ws_5Htg-Co9jlLNJuPvG_O7MJRG-mAqYHH4vXEvwVTgHeIe60QdoaSl6lvg73YoK4rBXZWGCupv2mUUNIurv8jeEf5x3RbP10HsnWJ1vjbtjeib3ziQF7kffAmMxlcouZy4b2uS4LDmygbeYLxLg3lSTFwA0kShFwfy4xUwvWy5UvTruGXEZIlOKu1ZyoTJUojJhnZcPpcyAZw9KrWYK6pnBfgoPpQqYeebh52qVTr-gQqCfKtzWbFLverYyyMSS_hpph6qC0opHPz31EuEx-1ms9z4ZsCOHCWj4DnKjYgl8/nvGMJvntB7i7URG0sOlxyZbMLFDuCnFa/8)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/9hwY287iEOofgyZecjX8K5Xh1SGzqrZbWpfw-Qp7lDT3XNpQ20Pw2W3B08YHb6kfv_q9sXxP0I3CfmERA_isCjx5g9vini-_z7AFPln18R5quKectIBuSfU18PQm3TYXPD0433AuAjOvHF_BWgiEYKIsuQtKLEn10ihsnaPS3gH9yHcw3H14qYguJOjPFrrjUoK2P0GEyYXnn5x7puENnLhdlQKtAzh3zCAFpyFmN80K5AC0ZVt08uDsOnZq0VkSlCL1wWKtzIlLaZ_oCi5rLWuO-LSEyv2VbtaUFGV9f2O3k5K-H0p-HOJcqmNDgiSr6RrOnUNuSeP1DEtgrDa7LUWU-lurBigWXJu-Kuijp7MvuMf-1meJ_Yp54QbkneoSzEs4Y-z89Y15Lk3WiN7hl_FS0-3VZrl2oSdHtZF4FZWQ-CKWLx9qvelpoP42Nq7iK8Fa_rE_MS4PQp2utI8NGluOsAU/ZugQvZPpm5tvk_jixlEt-iUXJmiRt63g/8)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

Peter, can you believe this BS? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106384169/541347284/936118789?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250423_FR_Hegseth_0_3MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDY0YTk5Zi05NDIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2M1cVFhHambZNKM5J1GfNYopA3QqB7pRY1-zIBSEQhY=) Unbelievably, for not the first time, our Secretary of Defense shared sensitive information on a non-secure platform. _This time with his family members, on his personal phone.

**It’s unacceptable. Hegseth needs to go.**_

We _need_ competent people in our government. Not this mess, never knowing what we’ll wake up to.

**The chaos won’t stop until Trump and his loyal MAGA followers are removed from every level of government. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: I know this hurts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
There’s going to be rainy days | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=df4073a5c372450bb6438d4e7fa46778&_e=vfzlfu_-_UNv_d9VXatc9LVYt8F5iJvX4W4w0RW-xYD42s3FJB1M815iYyHbeDQD4ZUGzr3tRgfALuq4ty7kV4fuO5agTdaUBLg2-u_fheZnBWawe_f_IbXeH3tFCplPwVB1Eaq9m7s1a29xt1ObfKhvNvcqvGqSFp_7K_PWNZWs6cWlBhBxA0gXxeYJaa6v78FYLz8nY5QzzO8mo2clAAsm3YcR0ITartxBePl1AKJpQX_Tss5ybmcflDMKDhNqT_MOGS2I7tSBi5Z2fyHLNhtVEugyu6wbK4Zb_dW_gSe8rsbYqeodl-e-LqzH-HVKMl5rsmCwftTFeekvOeVC0Q%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I know this is going to hurt, but there’s going to be rainy days.

That’s just how the cookie crumbles sometimes, but what matters is how we respond to adversity.

**My team just sent me a fundraising report, and we are BEHIND our monthly projections.**
This is TERRIBLE NEWS. Our monthly fundraising projections are the lifeblood of my campaign. Each month, we set aside a budget to spend on reaching grassroots supporters to make sure they’re on and remain on our team.

[**If we don’t catch up, we won’t be able to continue our grassroots efforts, and the Radical Left will have an open door to reach our most important voters.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=df4073a5c372450bb6438d4e7fa46778&_e=vfzlfu_-_UNv_d9VXatc9LVYt8F5iJvX4W4w0RW-xYD42s3FJB1M815iYyHbeDQD4ZUGzr3tRgfALuq4ty7kV4fuO5agTdaUBLg2-u_fheZnBWawe_f_IbXeH3tFCplPwVB1Eaq9m7s1a29xt1ObfKhvNvcqvGqSFp_7K_PWNZWs6cWlBhBxA0gXxeYJaa6v5SjdBgYw5paQCzvTOLTPsBs6tu5cvqtkXiFCMel0rSVvKCLpVZe98yhyMXoCb-zWCU2MuOpP6lafvnqYevx4v-aOKNNLAEW41EKAhvHLuJFtYnVdvQUllLM1EtclfpRkN75msKR15yleuvLlEhLvZA%3D%3D)

I get it – it’s over a year away from the election. Why does it even matter right now?

**I’ll be completely honest with you – it completely matters. The Left has already been raising millions of dollars. They’re angry they lost last November. And they’re angry that America has left their woke ideology behind.**

Now, they’re Hellbent on buying America back. We can’t let them win. It’s IMPERATIVE that we start hitting these deadlines NOW so we can get ahead of the curve.

[**With all that said, will you rush a donation of just $5 or more before midnight to help me catch up?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=df4073a5c372450bb6438d4e7fa46778&_e=vfzlfu_-_UNv_d9VXatc9LVYt8F5iJvX4W4w0RW-xYD42s3FJB1M815iYyHbeDQD4ZUGzr3tRgfALuq4ty7kV4fuO5agTdaUBLg2-u_fheZnBWawe_f_IbXeH3tFCplPwVB1Eaq9m7s1a29xt1ObfKhvNvcqvGqSFp_7K_PWNZWs6cWlBhBxA0gXxeYJaa6vwvSB5I--hZbfAlsEUX98okpQINhQB-MkMYV5zDSjiDRF0JcfmaZIQkocbXBKhFhsgA480zmFFwbE0gR8lCwknxtziI3HinJ__7Lq8LgwkL7aUZRfj442DlIgT6tvUjLcBs7QpJ10U7uTKif6ObFnFg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=df4073a5c372450bb6438d4e7fa46778&_e=vfzlfu_-_UNv_d9VXatc9LVYt8F5iJvX4W4w0RW-xYD42s3FJB1M815iYyHbeDQD4ZUGzr3tRgfALuq4ty7kV4fuO5agTdaUBLg2-u_fheZnBWawe_f_IbXeH3tFCplPwVB1Eaq9m7s1a29xt1ObfKhvNvcqvGqSFp_7K_PWNZWs6cWlBhBxA0gXxeYJaa6vcd1f1gaXhE5pNH2AK1U2RS4S6rmlxopfb4R7mFvtdtEqkqnbWJRw1jQGTKYIyi1N0XiWaB5LVzqHgYExgYRdugbyXyYJERRvfLR6z0zL9UZjbFpDO55h5x21wPW-y3uvaThzyJJIi9LvbtqqFQD9YQ%3D%3D)

That’s just how the cookie crumbles sometimes, but what matters is how we respond to adversity. My team just sent me a fundraising report, and we are BEHIND our monthly projections. Derek: Happy 117th birthday to the U.S. Army Reserve!

Today, and every day, I'm thankful to the men and women who dedicate their lives to protecting ours. As a third-generation veteran, I know how important it is to care for those who choose to serve our country. It’s one of the reasons I’m on the House Armed Services Committee and lead the Military Personnel Subcommittee.

**_Right now, the Trump Administration is making our work harder and putting the lives of both our current servicemembers and veterans at risk. And he’s doing it with the support of Congressional Republicans who have the power to stop this reckless and dangerous behavior. _**
From discussing classified plans for U.S. military strikes in Yemen over Signal in MULTIPLE group chats to firing thousands of employees at the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (with plans to fire more) – **the Trump Administration is jeopardizing the safety and security of our current and past military members.**
I called for Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to resign and invited VA Secretary Doug Collins to visit our local VA to see firsthand the mission-critical work being done there. I won’t stop.
**But I don’t do it alone, Derek. With our military and veterans at risk, I'm calling on 100 supporters to sign my petition and stand with those who fought for our freedom – including you.**[**Please, will you add your name to show your support for our military and veterans before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106384827/541349369/-1160744854?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1111-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTU0ZGZiNi05NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYrbFjQgl_c7fSww0S8KEpkHSd3bOD0WXHLU78eUCCk=&emci=8ed366b4-4d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1154dfb6-9620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
| | [Sign on to show your support for our military and veterans!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106384828/541349370/-1160744854?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1111-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTU0ZGZiNi05NjIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OYrbFjQgl_c7fSww0S8KEpkHSd3bOD0WXHLU78eUCCk=&emci=8ed366b4-4d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1154dfb6-9620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfJ6FdO4z5Q1z1bBnTP8kn57zVBDh6hQN0dNIuK0FEZke3eqydNZOPC2tE2vSR9schLfUvMFPXGVTBthsufauPLbMf59DHJ5wkzbPWEz0kB5d5Z0pNqRVVOR5S0Zl99n2xxBPJnX1OWduLH5BYmeX-FETVq2idrcmrXqRaDZUXlrhP5gn2vrStlE0H57WevRGc8OHj2xm-AesJ1hWJXbVkAOmxriX0Obp2G_pNSvikPbVeHtrY9rokfbroW_cuACVRvuTYtrIgJpFc3aOuD-n6JY/4fw/tTuiVwsUTqyK74IFfjBzTQ/h0/h001.fLM9J3VjRXPzZeV_qM0EYprSQx420gNHv-H55LcsG4s)
Friend! We are excited to endorse Daniel Hernandez for Congress in Arizona's 7th District special election on September 23, 2025. Daniel is not just an ally; he embodies the hope for progressive values that Southern Arizona and families across the nation cherish—our rights, livelihoods, and democracy. His commitment to healthcare advocacy stems from a near-fatal experience due to lack of access, transforming him into a fierce proponent of universal healthcare. With hands-on experience in a cancer research lab and as a nursing assistant, Daniel’s dedication to accessible healthcare is unwavering. On January 8, 2011, Daniel's bravery shone when he provided life-saving aid to Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, earning national recognition. As a member of the Arizona State House, he co-founded the House LGBTQ caucus and championed reproductive rights, gun safety, and healthcare access, earning accolades as a Women’s Healthcare Champion. **As he prepares for national service, Daniel is ready to defend our rights and vital services like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.** **[Support Daniel Hernandez and contribute to Able Dems to empower leaders who fight for justice. Together, we can make a difference!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcSzgOvaKukkllACdq2W1GjtwDk_MY8XYDpgk7HH9dIaQ5YL-hqmcSGLJKndwlXMavH2s9ThbOJZMqmyUvfWIfVIuXSSOZIlM9C1W-LXWFKmFurpT39Fpde5lcxe9sZmOATnlEGqtoERwMU1z0yy-jKkCYEmr4TQiMUmmYcFZlJfct-X4IbJ2efiGsfWjXbmDL-DqfW2giq58sJAZMpNczAgmF1raVJ65QqFNZ2vHPo74nI85ZXMIU0xFZLJu4lizEOEt3nayXhNeGMa4fPjx2ew/4fw/tTuiVwsUTqyK74IFfjBzTQ/h1/h001.eS6AzEJy2ZakoKhe6KiQH8EHZSiwB8MAhb3Bl_3Ob1k)** Together, we can secure a brighter future for all.

clean_body: | | | Friend! We are excited to endorse Daniel Hernandez for Congress in Arizona's 7th District special election on September 23, 2025. Daniel is not just an ally; he embodies the hope for progressive values that Southern Arizona and families across the nation cherish—our rights, livelihoods, and democracy. His commitment to healthcare advocacy stems from a near-fatal experience due to lack of access, transforming him into a fierce proponent of universal healthcare. With hands-on experience in a cancer research lab and as a nursing assistant, Daniel’s dedication to accessible healthcare is unwavering. On January 8, 2011, Daniel's bravery shone when he provided life-saving aid to Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, earning national recognition. As a member of the Arizona State House, he co-founded the House LGBTQ caucus and championed reproductive rights, gun safety, and healthcare access, earning accolades as a Women’s Healthcare Champion. As he prepares for national service, Daniel is ready to defend our rights and vital services like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Together, we can secure a brighter future for all. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Peter, I rarely write with such urgency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Together, we can defend our democracy — and we must.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106385517/541351915/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjQ3NTFkLTk4MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sFplj7YUi0ak26qRSCzGdBNZKyPOt5rvc5HjzaOk5Z8=&emci=ba280032-7a20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a464751d-9820-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, I rarely write with such urgency, but what is happening in North Carolina right now should alarm every American who believes in democracy and the rule of law. Recently, the North Carolina Supreme Court issued an outrageous ruling throwing out legally cast ballots from overseas voters and specifically targeting military members from Democratic counties. This ruling requires them to once again prove their identities within a narrow 30-day window to ensure the votes they cast in November are counted. **Let me be absolutely clear: This enables a naked attempt to steal an election.** [**And we must all come together to reject these kinds of blatant attacks on our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106385518/541351916/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGNC_email_20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_campaign=AGNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjQ3NTFkLTk4MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sFplj7YUi0ak26qRSCzGdBNZKyPOt5rvc5HjzaOk5Z8=) As a former Attorney General who made protecting voting rights a top priority at the Justice Department, I am appalled to see the judiciary abandon its most fundamental responsibility — protecting the rights of the people. Too many members of the Republican majority on North Carolina's highest court cherry-picked whose votes count based purely on partisan calculations. It is the height of political arrogance to tell military members who serve and sacrifice for our country, and other voters, that their votes and those of their family members are somehow questionable. The facts of this case aren't complicated, Peter. Multiple recounts, the state Board of Elections, and the trial court all concluded that Justice Riggs was re-elected in November. Like North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls powerfully stated in her dissenting opinion: "It is no small thing to overturn the results of an election in a democracy by throwing out ballots that were legally cast consistent with all election laws in effect on the day of the election... Some would call it stealing the election, others might call it a bloodless coup, but by whatever name, no amount of smoke and mirrors makes it legitimate." **This case reminds us how every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals._Now it is our time._** It is only when the times are toughest that we are truly tested. Rest assured that we, like those before us, are up to this test. The tasks before us will not be easily accomplished. In the first year of our independence Tom Paine said, “tyranny, like hell, is not easily conquered; yet we have this consolation with us, that the harder the conflict, the more glorious the triumph. What we obtain too cheap we esteem too lightly; it is dearness only that gives everything its value.” **Together, we can defend our democracy — _and we must_.** [**As the NDRC continues to fight for free and fair elections in North Carolina and around the country, please make a donation of $30 or more today to help power this work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106385519/541351917/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGNC_email_20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_campaign=AGNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjQ3NTFkLTk4MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sFplj7YUi0ak26qRSCzGdBNZKyPOt5rvc5HjzaOk5Z8=) Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States
Chairman, NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106385520/541351918/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGNC_email_20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250423-NDRC-Tier1-AGNC-NOR_125&utm_campaign=AGNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjQ3NTFkLTk4MjAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sFplj7YUi0ak26qRSCzGdBNZKyPOt5rvc5HjzaOk5Z8=)

clean_body: Together, we can defend our democracy — and we must. | Peter, I rarely write with such urgency, but what is happening in North Carolina right now should alarm every American who believes in democracy and the rule of law. Recently, the North Carolina Supreme Court issued an outrageous ruling throwing out legally cast ballots from overseas voters and specifically targeting military members from Democratic counties. This ruling requires them to once again prove their identities within a narrow 30-day window to ensure the votes they cast in November are counted. Let me be absolutely clear: This enables a naked attempt to steal an election. = As a former Attorney General who made protecting voting rights a top priority at the Justice Department, I am appalled to see the judiciary abandon its most fundamental responsibility — protecting the rights of the people. Too many members of the Republican majority on North Carolina's highest court cherry-picked whose votes count based purely on partisan calculations. It is the height of political arrogance to tell military members who serve and sacrifice for our country, and other voters, that their votes and those of their family members are somehow questionable. The facts of this case aren't complicated, Peter. Multiple recounts, the state Board of Elections, and the trial court all concluded that Justice Riggs was re-elected in November. Like North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls powerfully stated in her dissenting opinion: "It is no small thing to overturn the results of an election in a democracy by throwing out ballots that were legally cast consistent with all election laws in effect on the day of the election... Some would call it stealing the election, others might call it a bloodless coup, but by whatever name, no amount of smoke and mirrors makes it legitimate." This case reminds us how every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals.Now it is our time. It is only when the times are toughest that we are truly tested. Rest assured that we, like those before us, are up to this test. The tasks before us will not be easily accomplished. In the first year of our independence Tom Paine said, “tyranny, like hell, is not easily conquered; yet we have this consolation with us, that the harder the conflict, the more glorious the triumph. What we obtain too cheap we esteem too lightly; it is dearness only that gives everything its value.” Together, we can defend our democracy — and we must. = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States Chairman, NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

The Trump administration has instructed Congress to cut $1.1 billion — or two years’ worth of funding — from the nonprofit organization that supports NPR and PBS.

Right now, we need to make our voices heard and show support for public broadcasting.

NPR and PBS are not the only targets of Republicans’ pursuit against “woke media”. Free educational kids' programming, emergency alerts _and_ public safety information are all at risk of being cut.

_Congress hasn’t acted yet, so we still have time to gather public support to stop this direct attack against free and public media._

But we must act now.
**If you want to help save NPR and PBS, sign our petition. Trump wants to censor public media, but we cannot let this happen.**

[**_25,000 signatures needed by midnight: Sign on now to show Trump that the American people want to protect free and accessible broadcasting >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106385610/541352297/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.23_Public-Broadcasting_B2_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ3MmJhMy05OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T04Idy5L_aOi5_HIqFclEyg5NCeoASUceRg9SzKsgX4=&emci=a554c47d-9020-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea472ba3-9920-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029) | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106385611/541352298/436175811?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.04.23_Public-Broadcasting_B2_F1_S1_C1_NO_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ3MmJhMy05OTIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T04Idy5L_aOi5_HIqFclEyg5NCeoASUceRg9SzKsgX4=&emci=a554c47d-9020-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ea472ba3-9920-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: | 🔴 Alert from The Hill: Trump plans order to cut funding for NPR and PBS The Trump administration has urged Congress to end nearly all federal funding for public media — including NPR and PBS. This is censorship, and we have to raise our voices before it’s too late. | | The Trump administration has instructed Congress to cut $1.1 billion — or two years’ worth of funding — from the nonprofit organization that supports NPR and PBS. Right now, we need to make our voices heard and show support for public broadcasting. NPR and PBS are not the only targets of Republicans’ pursuit against “woke media”. Free educational kids' programming, emergency alerts and public safety information are all at risk of being cut. Congress hasn’t acted yet, so we still have time to gather public support to stop this direct attack against free and public media. But we must act now. If you want to help save NPR and PBS, sign our petition. Trump wants to censor public media, but we cannot let this happen. | | Thank you for your help, — Gillibrand HQ * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: The Squad
subject: Fighting on all fronts
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250423-1325-foote&t=1001&akid=1325%2E342411%2E5dbhCJ ]Squad Victory Fund

Hey Peter, it’s
the Squad!

With Trump and his billionaire allies waging war on working families, we
are more committed than ever to be all in fighting for a country that
works for everyone.

We’re creating spaces where the people — not corporations, not
billionaires — call the shots. From town halls to rallies, we’re making
sure every voice is heard. When we rise together and demand justice, those
in power have no choice but to listen.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250423-movement.weNx14&refcode=em20250423-1325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1325%2E342411%2E5dbhCJ ][IMG]

We’re standing up to the corrupt politicians and billionaires running our
government. Each time Trump rolls out a new plan to enrich his friends at
our expense, we speak out loudly and clearly. We will never be quiet when
our leaders put corporate profits above human dignity.

We’re fighting to pass transformative legislation in Congress. We have to
raise the minimum wage. We have to pass Medicare for All. We have to enact
bold climate action. These fights are at the core of our mission, and we
will never back down.

At a recent town hall in Boston, Ayanna put it best: “In solidarity, that
is how we resist and reject authoritarianism and fascism.” We are standing
in solidarity to take on these big fights and win, but we need you on our
side.

As a grassroots movement, we refuse corporate PAC money. Instead, we rely
on grassroots, people-powered support to win.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250423-movement.weNx14&refcode=em20250423-1325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1325%2E342411%2E5dbhCJ ]Will you chip in to our Squad today to fuel our campaigns, keep us
moving, and amplify bold, people-first policies? If we work together, we
can win a future where all Americans can thrive.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250423-movement.weNx14&refcode=em20250423-1325&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1325%2E342411%2E5dbhCJ ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1325%2E342411%2E5dbhCJ

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Friend,
More than 100 elected and community leaders across Colorado have already endorsed Jena Griswold for Attorney General because they know she’s the leader we need to protect our rights and stand up to extremists like Donald Trump.
From county commissioners to state lawmakers, from rural advocates to grassroots organizers—leaders from every corner of the state are uniting behind Jena’s vision for justice, accountability, and the Colorado way of life. See some of Jena’s endorsers below:

name: Rebecca Weber
subject: Do you remember the 2002 election?
body:
We have just months to make this happen| |
---
| | I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qIgyoyGfnLGNvSu8NdNRG7ArIQx3bqvy2hPLJjJ5aas-xtzzpCSVL762k38K8__BJhQPIEe43inEh2S51kwpPX7HeTwyIQH7dWwweGgYQsi26DSLQo3wl-ufgrKTBIVDslMJWWfW6aLdg2Xqb2xxuXQZsaNN9TwV1JR0NmeePKOY)
---
| | My Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.And today, I need to warn you about what’s at stake, **[**and tell you how you can help.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qEuhoP8S_zPtN7H08VSgUrve7O6crDezoLUq9DQXYSIgLCN_QN1nqo5WmW0ICLt0VCl-FUxfo5AYkiqDB7NQR99vrEnt0eBO86UsMK2xEuCiTDTk4eHuQJ3C-gFWfMq__aUt7gBKH9Sn-R0EJaiPPTiMcM3shNkSe9Dy6NBVmozY)** Do you remember the 2002 election? Republicans had won the House, Senate, and White House for the first time since Eisenhower.**But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda.** The opportunity for lasting conservative change had been wasted. Now, the results of the 2024 election have given us the chance to undo the damage of Biden and Harris. But if we don’t demand action from Republicans, _this victory could slip through our fingers just like it did in 2008._ **[You can take action today by partnering with AMAC Action, the most influential group in America when it comes to standing up for the values of conservative seniors!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qIo2j3LJpHQ8hAEDxai8OJYncGLSyLY_wDcVp5Mthll7aBOOZjDVo8qDOxyKbwIEBeW7bCdzJ38xsCZ_PBJLXsoNfR5cn5pLgDAAoKyBMjO3b3JvDdLfA02bHipINw51xfsHneZbRQw6tNHaKavPwJFXEjuinoX0RbpTqCuLIDhB)** My friend, it’s simple: The Democrats work as a cohesive unit that bands together to push their agenda forward. But too many Republicans in Congress are content to sit on the sidelines.Donald Trump has hit the ground running in his first few months in office. He’s signed countless executive orders, secured our border, sworn in his rock-solid cabinet, and laid out his vision for:
---
| |
* Lowering inflation and taxes
* Saving Medicare and social security from insolvency
* Protecting our children and grandchildren from woke left-wing ideologies
* Protecting our constitutional freedoms
* Keeping America safe and strong
* Securing our elections

---
And so much more. **But none of this happens without the Republican majorities in congress getting their act together – and no one is in a better position to whip them into shape than AMAC Action.** Remember, Donald Trump’s first term was undermined at every turn not just by the radical left, but by weak RINOs. AMAC Action will not stand by and let radical Democrats and weak-kneed Republicans tank the America First Agenda of We the People.In the months ahead, we will be taking every step possible to undo the damage done by the Biden-Harris trainwreck......to protect the interests of you and your family...** ** **[...but we can’t do it without you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qP8ehewQdiukK1F6Rzh6aYFKt4IykPPnwIOwyXMiiaD6N6wEe4D1FZZzG_7GhstIM7JOSBvNn4x2i8TZgoQjqY4l4sLLi1mTxf1pq8MKl3yh8KYHc9Mjk4qs4auRYi1wdvjeGJgCVm_4MBxlngD0YU2dRbTbpKj80d75e_OPEzNl)** My friend if you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections.That’s why we have 77 chapters and over 340 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage.AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you.And our advocacy has NEVER been more important than it is today.Because if patriotic conservatives like you and I don’t stand up and demand change this opportunity will be wasted, and all you and I have worked for will be for nothing.But with your help, and with conservatives holding the trifecta of Government, White House, House, and Senate...We can not only undo the chaos of the Biden/Harris administration AND the Obama/Biden years...But we can also create lasting conservative change.It's clear 2025 is going to be a year of epic battles. **[And your AMAC Action membership donation of $30, $47, $75, $100, $250 or more FUELS our critical advocacy operations.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qLdHhdrPOx5-tBm8slrUD8a1DPSYgh3FtWa0319KkShU6e75r0XUfxEv00V87dJhQkhFaGD4IqFeWFnysZfvxHsUfx01riuQ8r4kNG0AxaUHtl9j9mqRNlY_H3Ov-j5Okx2p4n-fepTCdyiOEEJ-aA2VoA13vttiDSzTXoRrJgjn)** So please friend, make an investment in the America First movement today!Don’t let this opportunity go to waste.Become a force multiplier by joining millions of fellow conservatives in demanding change.And I don’t want to rush you, but it’s critical that we make the change we want to see happen before the midterm season, when Congress will all but grind to a halt...That means we don’t have four years, we have just months to make this happen. So don’t wait, **[**make your AMAC Action membership donation of $30, $47, $75, $100, $250 or more right away to maximize your impact.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fff3f7d63dbf4c5fb917f6b43acc6647&_e=SPIbBGB3nKeCvrfHZprlbckKvYQ8zl8VFDCzyWsfymfZH1fYWmeX1yUMjPHqEKclzyPsLAxKcyh3cD4HHHwCsio4iox5TJMBVWEhzUSrxrfVRHj-ujaWI-szyqRjhI8mdxlN-677_1nCohAvRoIYFHGegDmh9lHlM91NXogtpWC2s-PNLQe55tybSdSe9tE8CyCAq3Kr0a1X_yvVjrC0qJ4OBmUcFxruGS4MJ45whLrt-f363K9t_7Jmxkp2QFO2eq21AMiPmG9gQuwPVJFnIBN33ntkqVBp68pxdJZkEmmJJXzG3_-s6-Cbg2wzO3JRPc8k_TikdnBT5OGy8ed1Rg7xvg6fyeBGx2XeMAHex8IqGvFY0z8kLhTQKdRYjZ63)** Thank you, friend. clean_body: We have just months to make this happen| | | | I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community. | | | | | | My Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.And today, I need to warn you about what’s at stake, Do you remember the 2002 election? Republicans had won the House, Senate, and White House for the first time since Eisenhower.But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda. The opportunity for lasting conservative change had been wasted. Now, the results of the 2024 election have given us the chance to undo the damage of Biden and Harris. But if we don’t demand action from Republicans, this victory could slip through our fingers just like it did in 2008. My friend, it’s simple: The Democrats work as a cohesive unit that bands together to push their agenda forward. But too many Republicans in Congress are content to sit on the sidelines.Donald Trump has hit the ground running in his first few months in office. He’s signed countless executive orders, secured our border, sworn in his rock-solid cabinet, and laid out his vision for: | | Lowering inflation and taxes Saving Medicare and social security from insolvency Protecting our children and grandchildren from woke left-wing ideologies Protecting our constitutional freedoms Keeping America safe and strong Securing our elections And so much more. But none of this happens without the Republican majorities in congress getting their act together – and no one is in a better position to whip them into shape than AMAC Action. Remember, Donald Trump’s first term was undermined at every turn not just by the radical left, but by weak RINOs. AMAC Action will not stand by and let radical Democrats and weak-kneed Republicans tank the America First Agenda of We the People.In the months ahead, we will be taking every step possible to undo the damage done by the Biden-Harris trainwreck......to protect the interests of you and your family... My friend if you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections.That’s why we have 77 chapters and over 340 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage.AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you.And our advocacy has NEVER been more important than it is today.Because if patriotic conservatives like you and I don’t stand up and demand change this opportunity will be wasted, and all you and I have worked for will be for nothing.But with your help, and with conservatives holding the trifecta of Government, White House, House, and Senate...We can not only undo the chaos of the Biden/Harris administration AND the Obama/Biden years...But we can also create lasting conservative change.It's clear 2025 is going to be a year of epic battles. So please friend, make an investment in the America First movement today!Don’t let this opportunity go to waste.Become a force multiplier by joining millions of fellow conservatives in demanding change.And I don’t want to rush you, but it’s critical that we make the change we want to see happen before the midterm season, when Congress will all but grind to a halt...That means we don’t have four years, we have just months to make this happen. So don’t wait, Thank you, friend. History will remember what you and I did to save our great nation. | | I look forward to your response. For Freedom, Rebecca Weber, ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 |

name: Team Wiley
subject: A packed town hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
Wiley is committed to answering tough questions and fighting for North Carolina. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106385986/541353516/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjU3ZGY5NS05YzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMHSId0e5gXlwL9fKsT4YeUBOm5V22jH8KbeaHuw6UQ=)
---
Peter, **A few days ago, Wiley met with community members at a town hall meeting in Manteo, NC**. Although the invited Republican Congressman chose not to attend, it didn't stop Wiley from having a powerful and engaging discussion about the issues that matter most to North Carolinians. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106385987/541353517/-1331722497?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjU3ZGY5NS05YzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMHSId0e5gXlwL9fKsT4YeUBOm5V22jH8KbeaHuw6UQ=) Some Members of Congress won’t show up to meet with their constituents because they can’t explain the mess in Washington. They can’t answer your questions or explain their inaction while Trump tanks our economy and cuts your benefits. But **Wiley shows up, answers questions, and fights for what’s right for North Carolina.** At the town hall, Wiley highlighted how Donald Trump is shredding our constitution and billionaires are cutting Medicare, dismantling FEMA, and attacking our education system. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106385988/541353518/-1331722497?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250423_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjU3ZGY5NS05YzIwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMHSId0e5gXlwL9fKsT4YeUBOm5V22jH8KbeaHuw6UQ=) _Meanwhile, Thom Tillis stands by, putting his career above the needs of North Carolinians._ Our families are struggling with rising costs and low wages, and we deserve leaders who will stand up and fight for us. It’s clear that we need new leadership in Washington — leadership that is accountable to the people and doesn’t shy away from tough questions. That’s the kind of leadership Wiley brings. But we’re up against deep pockets and powerful interests that are determined to maintain the status quo. **Your support is crucial to advancing our work, including holding these town hall meetings and engaging directly with more families across North Carolina. clean_body: Wiley is committed to answering tough questions and fighting for North Carolina. | = Peter, A few days ago, Wiley met with community members at a town hall meeting in Manteo, NC. Although the invited Republican Congressman chose not to attend, it didn't stop Wiley from having a powerful and engaging discussion about the issues that matter most to North Carolinians. = Some Members of Congress won’t show up to meet with their constituents because they can’t explain the mess in Washington. They can’t answer your questions or explain their inaction while Trump tanks our economy and cuts your benefits. But Wiley shows up, answers questions, and fights for what’s right for North Carolina. At the town hall, Wiley highlighted how Donald Trump is shredding our constitution and billionaires are cutting Medicare, dismantling FEMA, and attacking our education system. = Meanwhile, Thom Tillis stands by, putting his career above the needs of North Carolinians. Our families are struggling with rising costs and low wages, and we deserve leaders who will stand up and fight for us. It’s clear that we need new leadership in Washington — leadership that is accountable to the people and doesn’t shy away from tough questions. That’s the kind of leadership Wiley brings. But we’re up against deep pockets and powerful interests that are determined to maintain the status quo. Your support is crucial to advancing our work, including holding these town hall meetings and engaging directly with more families across North Carolina. Every contribution fuels Wiley’s U.S. Senate campaign, making our impact stronger and our reach wider.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for joining us and believing in the possibility of a better North Carolina. — Team Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States ** | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: We just won a major battle in Florida, but the war is far from over - can I count on you to help me close a critical funding gap in my own campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
Just witnessed a 10:1 underdog victory in Florida, but now my own campaign is facing a $3 million deficit - can I count on you to help bridge the gap?

As Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I've seen firsthand the relentless attacks on our values and our President. But I've also seen the resilience and determination of the American people. Together, we can build a firewall against the left's attacks and secure a brighter future for our nation. Will you **[stand with me today](https://hdeliseforcongress.nationbuilder.com/r?u=pMx7Rp5MWHa-xXJHbz9Qn-drU3C8A6kEVwECbtsstjxp1druxW4PwDJLdfwP17WHtWemnCsmhLouOTtgAg4iA33R442BMHkSTtyrpSZq3nOupO4vcE-q89NL_ea4ABvYAuk_eprDcT9xEBp7x5Ta2H7wbfqpoQu-PCQ-LVeItIr_UtE25m8NozmwB4uDKl8B9GPG3adkKRHRwR95Bh-82VZ2JWTXdzWHBJWawdAT2xtiPxFNfvLBuOkF5ctt27KvshaZkZawUm86LIrpUnlF07VHmgEAx6f6Sf2TJYB3n6VwKfCFieLAMd6SIbO4HDUxSI92batQZKhXFVqa2pYDniuZeazyUXdTqrDdvDF16pFo24TU1r7ymGhx_5sR973aZYX75hwhY-iVQi0p2EyHv-s_lKLzJN3_D0IYleVfgoc3z_oKHUKVOrc_TNkHTRcDiygpXLhxeSxGC6QZqVFsOQ&e=f045ec7ded0fef0d79f85bdcebb2e817&utm_source=hdeliseforcongress&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_f9cf05d8d1a42b35d27176ff772&n=5)**? |

clean_body: Just witnessed a 10:1 underdog victory in Florida, but now my own campaign is facing a $3 million deficit - can I count on you to help bridge the gap? | Not interested? . Patriots, I'm writing to you today because I was reminded of why we do this work. As Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I've seen firsthand the relentless attacks on our values and our President. But I've also seen the resilience and determination of the American people. Just this month, we saw a crucial victory in Florida's special elections. Despite being outspent 10:1, we managed to hold off the Democrats' cash blitz and secure a win for our candidates. It was a and the importance of standing strong against the left's aggressive tactics. So I'm asking you to . Your contribution will go directly towards funding our grassroots campaigns and supporting our conservative candidates. Together, we can build a firewall against the left's attacks and secure a brighter future for our nation. Will you ? | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #00362650 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $25 or more | | Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership

name: Team Bonta
subject: Here’s what you and Rob have done together.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Rob has spent the last four years working to find solutions, hold bad actors accountable, and protect people in every corner of the Golden State.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250423&t=1&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)
Today marks **the four-year anniversary of Rob becoming California’s Attorney General!** To celebrate, we wanted to share some of the historic accomplishments we’ve made together.
**[But first, if you want to keep Rob in office fighting for every Californian for another four years, donate to our people-powered campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250423?refcode=em20250423-1751&amount=5&refcode2=1751_1088799_DemLEk&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)**
The most important job of the Attorney General is to protect public safety, something Rob will never forget. Whether it's organized smash-and-grab groups, illegal drug trafficking, or greedy landlords taking advantage of wildfire victims through price-gouging, Rob and his team will always hold bad actors who break the law accountable.
**Rob also took huge strides to curb gun violence in his first term.** His team seized illegal guns, arrested and charged those peddling them in our communities, and founded the Office of Gun Violence Prevention to promote research into the crisis and encourage collaboration on finding solutions. Their first reports showed the progress California is leading and laid out strategies to continue this critical work.
In the last four years, Rob recognized that the Department of Justice needed new tools to address the unique needs of _all_ Californians. That’s why he **launched the Racial Justice Bureau and the Office of Community Awareness, Response, and Engagement (CARE)** to better support the DOJ’s work to defend civil rights, end illegal discrimination, and ensure marginalized groups have access to _their_ DOJ.
To address the housing crisis, Rob formed the **Housing Justice Team** within the DOJ to fight for equitable, affordable housing for every Californian. So far, they’ve protected renters from unlawful evictions and ensured that local governments allow for the building of their fair share of affordable housing units.
Of course, we can’t forget Rob’s work to lower the costs of living, hold Big Polluters accountable, defend reproductive freedom, and protect the rights of the LGBTQ+ community, especially our youth.
And as we’ve entered the chaos of the second Trump administration, Rob and his team are working hard to protect Californians from the President’s illegal and harmful executive actions. **Rob’s already filed 14 lawsuits against the administration, and will keep doing so whenever Trump attacks Californians’ rights and futures.**
No matter what the problems of the day are, Rob has and will continue to work hard to find solutions, hold bad actors accountable, and protect people in every corner of the Golden State. That’s what he’s done for the past four years, and he doesn’t plan on stopping now!
**[Help us keep Rob in office fighting for us with a contribution of $5 today. While we’ve made progress, these fights are far from over, and we can’t risk losing Rob’s leadership.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250423?refcode=em20250423-1751&amount=5&refcode2=1751_1088799_DemLEk&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)**
Thank you so much for your support.
— Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250423&t=3&refcode2=1751_1088799_DemLEk&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1751%2E1088799%2EDemLEk)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

name: Royce
subject: I just want a chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I’m no quitter. I won’t give up until leadership is elected by the people, not selected by elites who fatten their own pockets. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCe0nNyuWDK6k_qMZpdjX6hO477wdeHXAikv5GPZYTsLuD_XGMSQKmA28lCorS3YQiWvatTdVsgUqsnPDrUP3m8yByzPoYei17IYY1FGPB_D-XbJ-V3OdUWORjsguh-unDhYpqrOHPxGF-FDzrJ1C6Juw%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

**My journey to politics is no ordinary journey.**

I wasn’t born into a political family, nor did I attend college with the dream of one day rubbing elbows with the DC elites. I was born in Minneapolis and raised by a single mother. I focused on basketball and gave it my all, but I was let down by the NBA’s lack of mental health policies.

**I fought hard to make a change.**

Then, in 2022, after years of being disillusioned by establishment politics, I saw an opportunity to make a difference. I ran for Congress and ultimately lost the Republican primary.

**But I’m no quitter. I know I can make a real difference.**

| [ **SUPPORT ROYCE’S FIGHT FOR YOU →** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCetWzUBNaV07zHDdFVjO6Bq_M1S1CtbWTVnLC8C7w9ilwb-M1pheUiLsHp_deuiLsU6q9XJsGuhLs1AML_HPJd-TA79G0I1n_zw0IiguKxVgDD0cgEJLYgdEiEZYa2SGiBi57zhUY-EcdMgVYRa8mnjg%3D%3D)
---

So in 2024, I tried again and ran for Senate to defeat incumbent Democrat Amy Klobuchar (who has held this seat since 2007).

Our movement started gaining real momentum, but we faced an **uphill battle** to unseat a career politician fueled by dark money and deep-pocketed out-of-state donors.

But again, I’m no quitter. I’m just asking for a chance to fix what is broken.

So the fight continues - **we are once again the underdogs in this race for US Senate.** With more than 500 days until Election Day in 2026, it may seem like there’s plenty of time to get our ducks in a row, but _**every single day counts.**_

[ **SUPPORT ROYCE’S FIGHT FOR YOU →** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCe_Pmp_319LwQUgKTAjGDxxOe8Ab_LQPi07loRZhKSGHzj357Q0KPjcg8tyuZtdjD4JrjBZGyKFgvccjzQDEmLQOxBCyNrEcg1cz8OV1QqkD73ISwQUw3e4Op6kslueSS9L3-VzA-33KQku095M3n9uw%3D%3D)
---

We need leadership that is elected by the people, not selected by elites who fatten their own pockets.

I’m not afraid to speak my mind or stand up to the establishment. I refuse to stand by as our nation is being held hostage by corrupt individuals who aim to manipulate the truth, exploit our children, subjugate us through crises and pharmaceuticals, and sow discord to keep us divided.

[**If my words resonate with you, I’d love to have your support over these next 500+ days.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCequuPA3MCJsMVPb2XgB6FcMcpDH2Gi2GIoGf6yQnqFLZUG6EEqidc-3YX74WlqvN1c4ViP0poSvuWj8SCyF7RQwZ-Qi1fztKNMqwA4Ja3Mle7m_hCVBNdb1CdiHBC8C0ErALBByC8mn8e8Qt4B36n5A%3D%3D)

[**My campaign is reliant on the support of PEOPLE,**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCeZOSazjrOWzo63eUWOVoOqkZrbRIRPevqerqhhkSlY_vyzn9-jd1X0hkySOWtgO3Ek4M6ZUY48fB8nfLS1bFE0fDOImXaG4V4K8N1K7w-E9hwYxnZfhE7iR1dFfLou1Ca5rqbbktHEUmQBEglR3uBIg%3D%3D) not dirty PACs who think they can own me.

My loyalty is to YOU.

For the people,

Royce White

[ **JOIN TEAM WHITE →** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCeslncFC8zKyuPbyUPiUcmds2XU72fK0HB-K3RG-W_EzZWFuaEawkKqg55mPqZpg7RU0HH751VMXtESjZBXMvG4K3qA2YKtiSQqogAlXNLei0oxEwtTLD36THSwdamG6ZztWBs4DbJXbOmIos7CG4v8Q%3D%3D)

[ **SUPPORT ROYCE’S FIGHT FOR YOU →** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCexpSCfH-q7CuBDfz-Isr6kYSciNnkACd4qJFQ6Ms8Yt_9G1NwXShpr0AoXLa-ePBqSBpcm8wPqz0lc349Q4UyAPo9zGzjk5g-89TWjoQYrI56H2wfHYf4unjeSsNL6APZ4ULlEULc2w7hEBTjHYE0xA%3D%3D)
---
