Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=f2981d742f0c4bcab7ee0b9a484ab34f&_e=TsqtSsXv2KQf_vWbCCYHX1cNMK_DmJ2T53b-kZnGx-2bzqp4rAzGDb-jpxbIlcIM8AG5RZLkaaSuzqMlmt9GS6yj8Fpc0RdEtGClrRGn6Hs4ZF-eUcIZtUMQOJaSs0oG0xkU94UUM0hhshF9Mi8rnFIUl8dhOlyEo4dbD2qHE-rTAj4YKtDlf2a1CqZyHlCe9IQR1sivZ_MBdmK82KFE6gcGb3aZKDvWC0w-cAnjWYM0liLhuaEgiDQeAdg5iDsawcYxOQYAK_bUYKauUrHVcpAMsm5wuUQcDdDM2d56NpPfKM06CXHaiXIp_Y1FmhaFpAt2cGPyf0TVgqtemEUKQA%3D%3D)

---

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

subject: Every member of Congress should hold a town hall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
Demand accountability now >>

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=HyI5ilaTa%2FvpdNV3HU7Y6I%2FwhWRoK%2F1cJF%2FLFflxC3eYBVBDG7JUJScsRRAXXII%2FaL%2Fe09RiPt5URzUSIZPE8zhP8O1P48Z7JYvLKzFoKSIXw1Al9Wi%2BCZqcD1mytcVxAg4GPJZhypmlTQkgHaPcOTcZdfuUI%2FQuFqX3JEVte5hA3tPy%2FJds49rOvclm%2BxPuH8opRVC9jJtlS0nUcGQRAE6wCnoJh7Aj8aTknf97W4yaLCyGdlidoTxigalqzPoIyfyV8Pzv%2FJQn%2BUQS%2F6pYm0GK1v7lJ2HSqRYfzqUxh2hYzM%2FJqkZ6R%2BALtld2ST8bIWwohO7tHJqyX%2Fr0%2F6EcmJ12CVHJF4H%2Bgvg7ZghULB%2F7uqIsO9JlUvHxgvMg6vx0URa%2FZKNW1kNvIRoCzFPA%2FeZpybkVwTni45IEJO788X3IcNhZbld5LEeHb21kYd2u)
---
| |
---
**House Republicans have made their choice.** They’re refusing to listen to the people they were elected to represent and instead catering to billionaires and special interests groups. And now, they’re dodging their responsibilities and refusing to face the communities they’ve left behind. They're ducking town halls, avoiding important questions from their constituents, and running _scared._ **The American people deserve better.** Add your name if you agree: [Every member of Congress should hold a town hall. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106386011/541353655/1147796948?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_042325_TOWNHALLS_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJmYWVlMjktOWQyMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pdm0i4QB-VF0Oph1FH8joEPrK7vFUj5M9iFu3MdqBb8=&emci=69f26a22-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bfaee29-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986) | | **[DEMAND TOWN HALLS NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106386012/541353656/1147796948?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_042325_TOWNHALLS_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJmYWVlMjktOWQyMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pdm0i4QB-VF0Oph1FH8joEPrK7vFUj5M9iFu3MdqBb8=&emci=69f26a22-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bfaee29-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986)**
---
Dr. Ruiz ran for Congress to serve – not to hide. That’s why he held town halls in Indio, Beaumont, and El Centro — three in April alone.
Dr. Ruiz understands that our communities deserve to be heard, especially now. People across the country are struggling, costs keep climbing, and programs that millions of depend on are on the chopping block. The very least our representatives can do is to **show up and listen.**
If House Republicans won’t face their constituents, _we need to make them_. **We’re aiming for 1,000 signatures by midnight to turn up the pressure.**
[Sign the petition and tell House Republicans: No more hiding. Hold a town hall. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106386013/541353657/1147796948?source=SBD_RR_EM_POLL_042325_TOWNHALLS_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJmYWVlMjktOWQyMC1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pdm0i4QB-VF0Oph1FH8joEPrK7vFUj5M9iFu3MdqBb8=&emci=69f26a22-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bfaee29-9d20-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: Demand accountability now >> While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | House Republicans have made their choice. They’re refusing to listen to the people they were elected to represent and instead catering to billionaires and special interests groups. And now, they’re dodging their responsibilities and refusing to face the communities they’ve left behind. They're ducking town halls, avoiding important questions from their constituents, and running scared. The American people deserve better. Add your name if you agree: | | Dr. Ruiz ran for Congress to serve – not to hide. That’s why he held town halls in Indio, Beaumont, and El Centro — three in April alone. Dr. Ruiz understands that our communities deserve to be heard, especially now. People across the country are struggling, costs keep climbing, and programs that millions of depend on are on the chopping block. The very least our representatives can do is to show up and listen. If House Republicans won’t face their constituents, we need to make them. Friend, My sister in service Congresswoman Ihan Omar just launched her re-election campaign for next year. She has to start grassroots organizing efforts early because far-right billionaires keep attacking her and trying to get her out of office. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJoYLO7imVk-0eAE_R-0L9oXrI6IhGrPiAO6w9ydVHixu5tSE4AFn3DMind763-ahDCIW1caEFM2vVk7D94EvrkemPleEHDLMRl-9xafhmeWUqzYR5-6LUyUQ8ANqwAP3Q-D6wl2p4Glr4oooNDkdjQFkRGypCDO9KTXVFbrByMYh4yS7zRfmjhrWJmGwxbOTccUPC1sky5NyhwCvtAEWfzu7pYk2Li4djEYffu73rI48HiF83__3ALiHpoLxI-T8C_H6xHdI1aIKTuFwaf3f1kw/4fw/5Gun3qwoQAqkGA7I1QEdrg/h1/h001.Qy4o7SW-ZKJFQVzJX-fS4rYA6wXLKswQUD-eS3xv334) As the first two Muslim women to serve in the U.S. Congress, Ilhan and I have faced death threats and hate. Trump targeted us during his first term in office, including blocking us from traveling to Israel and Palestine. **Now, Ilhan is leading the charge against Trump’s weaponization of the**** _Alien Enemies Act_** , a racist law that was used to forcibly displace and imprison over 100,000 people of Japanese __ descent during World War II—mostly U.S. citizens. I’m co-sponsoring Ilhan’s _Neighbors Not Enemies Act_ , legislation to fully repeal this dangerous 1798 law as Trump threatens to deport and imprison U.S. citizens abroad. We’ll keep defending human rights. Ilhan just kicked off her re-election campaign, so **it’s important to make this week a HUGE week for fundraising**. Our early support can show the far-right billionaires who are watching this campaign that Ilhan is ready to win once again. For our continued leadership on Palestinian liberation, Ilhan and I have faced censure and punishment by fellow members of Congress. But we’ve had each other’s backs, and we won’t be silenced.
As a Black Muslim woman who wears a hijab and came here as a refugee, Ilhan’s lived experiences are much-needed in Congress—especially right now. She knows that each of us has dignity and worth, and that everyone deserves to thrive.
Ilhan said at a Hands Off rally recently, “ _We are in a fight for the kind of future we want for this country... If you believe in a country where we take care of our neighbors, look after the poor and make sure our children have a future they can believe in, we have to fight for it!”_
Ilhan and I are ramping up our efforts to take on the oligarchy, including the corporations that are profiting off pollution and destruction. We will keep doing everything we can to resist Trump’s mass deportations and attacks on the working class.
We will keep demanding the bold changes our communities need, like free housing and healthcare—including through our leadership in the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
While in Congress, Ilhan has supported my legislation for workers’ rights, to end childhood poverty, and more. And **I’ve supported her policies like the**** _MEALS Act_****, which passed and fed 30 million schoolchildren early in the pandemic**.
When she first got to Congress, **Ilhan introduced the first bill to cancel student debt** and pushed President Biden to ultimately deliver historic student loan debt relief that helped over 5 million Americans.
**Because of her bold progressive leadership, right-wing billionaires keep trying to oust Ilhan from Congress.** She has faced well-funded attacks from Republican Super PACs, people trying to dismantle public education, AIPAC, and the person financing anti-abortion Supreme Court justices’ lavish lifestyles.
Last year,**in a leaked group chat of big donors who were bankrolling Ilhan’s opponent, they discussed working to elect “alt right Christian Neo Nazis.”** We must fight back against this hate and fascism. **Let’s have Ilhan’s back now.**
[**Will you split a contribution between our campaigns today to fight fascism and fight for the inclusive future we all deserve, where everyone can thrive?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJoYLO7imVk-0eAE_R-0L9oRDDF9w0rgc5THauzyK6xg2Zjka85k_j5jsqUOHcAK0ZGbtbnP-CEdus1wBCCXOmuSvf7htcP60jI3dXAn94bOulFylBzrGq3K7Ilidpp26BpSZYfN-DpWGPh7P0uzFzq2oy0XMVTz0cSa6S67K395oWWFhWLGEKH2SWcgpwvFPXg8xfnkVmGZoDPZLKXA3KeQ7UwzQrBG2GCGCiUdnAf_LZamgEeJdZWFe4B_9YQtzNETOw3Nib9F5lAakyXWZUpw/4fw/5Gun3qwoQAqkGA7I1QEdrg/h9/h001.GA9WbBjKIdXbZYygBycaKFvY-_4LBqYqXwPqDBotYmk)

Our early support can show the far-right billionaires who are watching this campaign that Ilhan is ready to win once again.
